message.content:
Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Integrate SheetMusicReader VexFlow Viewer into PQ Live Scores Tab

## Context

Jay wants the PQ Live "Scores" tab to display sheet music from SheetMusicReader (port 3495). Currently the Scores tab has a basic canvas-based score preview with hardcoded Fur Elise. The new version should show production-quality VexFlow SVG renderings, toggle to original PDF, play MIDI, and browse the full SheetMusicReader library.

## Architecture Decisions

1. **Server-side proxy** — PQ Live server proxies `/api/smr/*` to SheetMusicReader (configurable via `SHEET_MUSIC_READER_URL` env var, default `http://localhost:3495`). Frontend stays same-origin.
2. **Copy VexFlow code** — Port ~900 lines of rendering functions from SheetMusicReader into index.html (single-file architecture, no bundler). Prefix globals with `smr` to avoid collision.

## Files to Modify

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `src/agent/server.ts` | Add 3 proxy routes (~40 lines) |
| `static/index.html` | CDN scripts, new Scores tab HTML/CSS/JS, ported VexFlow renderer + playback |

## Implementation

### Phase 1: Server Proxy Routes (`server.ts`)

Add env var and 3 proxy routes:
```
SMR_URL = process.env.SHEET_MUSIC_READER_URL || "http://localhost:3495"

GET /api/smr/library        → ${SMR_URL}/api/library
GET /api/smr/output/*       → ${SMR_URL}/output/*
GET /api/smr/library-file/* → ${SMR_URL}/library/*
```
Use Node `fetch` (available in Node 18+) to proxy.

### Phase 2: CDN Scripts (`index.html` head)

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vexflow@4.2.5/build/cjs/vexflow.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/tone@14.7.77/build/Tone.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/pdfjs-dist@3.11.174/build/pdf.min.js"></script>
```

### Phase 3: Scores Tab HTML

Replace `#scoresTab` contents with:
```
scoresTab (flex column, height 100%)
├── score-toolbar (fixed top bar)
│   ├── [SVG] [PDF] toggle buttons
│   ├── [▶ Play] [⏸] [⏹] buttons
│   └── time display (0:00 / 3:24)
├── score-tree (collapsible, max-height 200px, overflow-y auto)
│   └── folder hierarchy from /api/smr/library
├── score-viewer (flex: 1, overflow-y: auto, min-height: 0)
│   ├── score-vexflow-container (VexFlow SVG pages)
│   └── score-pdf-container (pdf.js canvas pages, hidden by default)
└── score-info-bar (title · key · tempo · time sig)
```

### Phase 4: CSS (~30 lines)

Style toolbar, viewer, tree, info bar using existing PQ Live design language (dark theme vars, 10-11px fonts, border colors).

### Phase 5: Port VexFlow Renderer (~900 lines)

Copy from SheetMusicReader `static/index.html`:
- Lookup tables: `NOTE_NAMES_SHARP/FLAT`, `KEY_SIG_SHARPS/FLATS`, etc.
- Helpers: `keyToVexflow()`, `durToVexflow()`, `midiToVexflow()`, `getActiveKey()`, `fitRests()`
- Voice builders: `buildVoiceNotes()`, `buildVoiceWithRests()`
- Main renderer: `renderVexFlowInto(container)` — creates SVG pages with grand staff, beams, tuplets, annotations, pedal marks, 8va lines
- Dark theme recolor: invert all SVG elements to white

All globals prefixed with `smr` to avoid collision with existing `currentScore`, `scoreColorMode`, etc.

### Phase 6: Port Playback (~200 lines)

Copy from SheetMusicReader:
- `smrPlaybackState` object (playing, startTime, pauseTime, synth, scheduledIds)
- `smrStartPlayback()` / `smrPausePlayback()` / `smrStopPlayback()`
- `smrAnimateCursor()` / `smrUpdateCursorPosition()` / `smrRemoveCursor()`
- Tone.js PolySynth (triangle8 oscillator), Tone.Transport scheduling
- Red cursor line in SVG with auto-scroll

### Phase 7: Controller Functions (~100 lines)

- `loadSMRLibrary()` — fetch `/api/smr/library`, render folder tree with status dots
- `selectSMRFile(path, hasClaude)` — fetch JSON + text.json + layout.json, render VexFlow
- `toggleScoreView(mode)` — switch between 'svg' and 'pdf' views
- `toggleScoreTree()` — collapse/expand folder tree
- Replace old `loadScoreTree()` init call with `loadSMRLibrary()`

### Phase 8: Wire Existing Features

- `loadScoreToTargets()` adapted to read from `smrCurrentJson` (compatible format: measures[].notes[] with midi/beat/dur)
- Keep Color Mode button working with VexFlow (recolor SVG elements)

## Verification

1. Start SheetMusicReader: `cd SheetMusicReader && npm start` (port 3495)
2. Build + start PQ Live: `npx tsc && npm start`
3. Open browser → SCORES tab
4. Folder tree shows library files with status dots
5. Click a file → VexFlow SVG renders in viewer with scroll
6. Click PDF → original PDF renders via pdf.js
7. Click Play → Tone.js plays with red cursor + auto-scroll
8. DRILLS tab still works (no broken globals)
9. SVG scales to 560px panel width via viewBox

## Risks

- **Global collisions**: Mitigated by `smr` prefix on all ported variables
- **SVG readability at 560px**: VexFlow uses viewBox scaling — 45% of original 1241px width, still readable
- **SheetMusicReader not running**: Proxy returns error, tree shows "No sheets found" gracefully


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /home/takuma/.claude/projects/-home-takuma-1-jworks-A-ai-7-LiveAgents-PianoQuest-Live/153f6191-44ac-4d69-b541-6b066a2b7da5.jsonl

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>PianoQuest Live</title>
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #000000;
    --bg2: #0a0a0a;
    --bg3: #111111;
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --text: #ffffff;
    --text1: #ffffff;
    --text2: rgba(255,255,255,0.60);
    --text3: rgba(255,255,255,0.40);
    --accent: #ffffff;
    --accent-subtle: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    --accent-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    --purple: #a0a0a0;
    --rose: #fb7185;
    --blue: #93c5fd;
    --green: #86efac;
    --gemini: #60a5fa;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html, body { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; }
  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    height: 100%;
  }
  .app {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 8px 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
    height: 100vh;
  }

  /* Header */
  .header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 8px 12px;
  }
  .header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; }
  .header h1 { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
  .header h1 span { color: var(--accent); }
  .header-sub { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

  .controls { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }
  .status-dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #444;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .status-dot.connected { background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--green); }
  .status-dot.error { background: var(--rose); }
  .status-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text3); }
  .gemini-speaking {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2);
  }
  .gemini-speaking .vol-bar {
    width: 40px; height: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .gemini-speaking .vol-fill {
    height: 100%; width: 0%; background: var(--green); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.05s;
  }
  .gemini-speaking.active { color: var(--text1); }
  .gemini-speaking.active .vol-fill { background: var(--green); }
  button {
    padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg2); color: var(--text); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  button:hover { background: var(--bg3); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); }
  button.primary {
    background: #ffffff; border-color: #ffffff; color: #000000; font-weight: 600;
  }
  button.primary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }
  button.secondary {
    background: rgba(96,165,250,0.12); border-color: rgba(96,165,250,0.25); color: var(--blue);
  }
  button.secondary:hover { background: rgba(96,165,250,0.2); }
  button.danger {
    background: rgba(251,113,133,0.1); border-color: rgba(251,113,133,0.25); color: var(--rose);
  }
  button:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

  /* Main grid: left-col | handle | center | handle | score-col */
  .main {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 520px 6px 1fr 6px 560px;
    gap: 0;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;

<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #000000;
    --bg2: #0a0a0a;
    --bg3: #111111;
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --text: #ffffff;
    --text1: #ffffff;
    --text2: rgba(255,255,255,0.60);
    --text3: rgba(255,255,255,0.40);
    --accent: #ffffff;
    --accent-subtle: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    --accent-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    --purple: #a0a0a0;
    --rose: #fb7185;
    --blue: #93c5fd;
    --green: #86efac;
    --gemini: #60a5fa;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html, body { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; }
  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    height: 100%;
  }
  .app {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 8px 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
    height: 100vh;
  }

  /* Header */
  .header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 8px 12px;
  }
  .header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; }
  .header h1 { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
  .header h1 span { color: var(--accent); }
  .header-sub { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

  .controls { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }
  .status-dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #444;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .status-dot.connected { background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--green); }
  .status-dot.error { background: var(--rose); }
  .status-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text3); }
  .gemini-speaking {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2);
  }
  .gemini-speaking .vol-bar {
    width: 40px; height: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .gemini-speaking .vol-fill {
    height: 100%; width: 0%; background: var(--green); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.05s;
  }
  .gemini-speaking.active { color: var(--text1); }
  .gemini-speaking.active .vol-fill { background: var(--green); }
  button {
    padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg2); color: var(--text); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  button:hover { background: var(--bg3); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); }
  button.primary {
    background: #ffffff; border-color: #ffffff; color: #000000; font-weight: 600;
  }
  button.primary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }
  button.secondary {
    background: rgba(96,165,250,0.12); border-color: rgba(96,165,250,0.25); color: var(--blue);
  }
  button.secondary:hover { background: rgba(96,165,250,0.2); }
  button.danger {
    background: rgba(251,113,133,0.1); border-color: rgba(251,113,133,0.25); color: var(--rose);
  }
  button:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

  /* Main grid: left-col | handle | center | handle | score-col */
  .main {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 520px 6px 1fr 6px 560px;
    gap: 0;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    column-gap: 6px;
  }

  /* Resize handles as grid columns */
  .grid-resize-handle {
    cursor: col-resize; z-index: 10;
    background: transparent;
    transition: background 0.15s;
  }
  .grid-resize-handle:hover, .grid-resize-handle.dragging {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 3px;
  }

  /* Left column */
  .left-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden; }

  .panel {
    border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg2); overflow: hidden;
  }
  .panel-header {
    padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--text2);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  }
  .panel-header .dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; }

  /* Camera */
  .level-meter {
    padding: 6px 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  }
  .level-bar-bg {
    flex: 1; height: 3px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .level-bar {
    height: 100%; width: 0%; background: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.05s;
  }
  .level-label { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text3); min-width: 20px; text-align: right; }

  /* Coaching Focus Card */
  .coaching-card { padding: 12px; }
  .coaching-focus {
    font-size: 12px; color: var(--text2); line-height: 1.5;
    min-height: 36px;
  }
  .coaching-focus .focus-label {
    font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    color: var(--gemini); margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  /* Right column */
  .right-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; min-height: 0; }

  /* Piano MIDI stack */
  .midi-stack { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; flex: 1; min-height: 0; }
  .midi-header-tools {
    margin-left: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .midi-status {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text3);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .pedal-pill {
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text3);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .pedal-pill.active {
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    color: var(--accent);
  }
  .midi-select {
    min-width: 180px;
    padding: 6px 10px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg3);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  .midi-select:focus { outline: 1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.35); }
  .mini-btn {
    padding: 6px 10px;
    font-size: 11px;
    background: var(--bg3);
  }
  .roll-wrap {
    padding: 0;
    background: #0a0a0a;
  }
  .keyboard-wrap {
    padding: 0;
    background: #0a0a0a;
  }
  .staff-wrap canvas,
  .roll-wrap canvas,
  .keyboard-wrap canvas {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    display: block;
  }
  .keyboard-hint {
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text3);
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }
  .bpm-control { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
  .bpm-control label { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text3); }
  .bpm-control input[type=range] { width: 74px; accent-color: var(--green); }
  .bpm-control .bpm-val { font-size: 10px; color: var(--green); min-width: 20px; }


  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .main { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
    .grid-resize-handle { display: none; }
    .score-col { display: none; }
    .quest-map { overflow-x: auto; }
    .midi-header-tools {
      width: 100%;
      margin-left: 0;
      justify-content: flex-start;
    }
  }

  /* Devices panel */
  .devices-content { padding: 8px 10px; }
  .device-list-items { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
  .device-item {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    padding: 4px 6px; border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2);
  }
  .device-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }
  .device-name { flex: 1; }
  .device-roles-tags { display: flex; gap: 3px; }
  .role-tag {
    padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .role-tag.mic { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: var(--accent); }
  .role-tag.cam { background: rgba(251,113,133,0.15); color: var(--rose); }
  .role-tag.midi { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: var(--purple); }
  .room-bar {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    padding: 6px 10px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3);
  }
  .room-code {
    font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: var(--accent);
    letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-family: monospace;
  }
  .room-bar .mini-btn { margin-left: auto; padding: 3px 8px; font-size: 9px; }
  .device-count { margin-left: auto; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text3); }

  /* Secondary device mode */
  .secondary-app {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start;
    height: 100vh; gap: 0; padding: 0;
    background: #000; color: var(--text); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    overflow-y: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  }
  .secondary-app.camera-fullscreen {
    padding: 0; gap: 0; justify-content: flex-start; background: #000;
  }
  .secondary-app.camera-fullscreen .secondary-header,
  .secondary-app.camera-fullscreen .secondary-roles,
  .secondary-app.camera-fullscreen .secondary-status { display: none; }
  .secondary-app.camera-fullscreen .camera-preview-wrap {
    max-width: 100%; width: 100%; margin: 0; border-radius: 0; border: none;
    flex: 1; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .secondary-app.camera-fullscreen .camera-preview-wrap video { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .secondary-app.camera-fullscreen .camera-preview-wrap .hand-overlay { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
  /* Camera bottom bar — fixed overlay at bottom */
  .camera-bottom-bar {
    display: none; width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px;
    padding-bottom: calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px));
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.85);
    align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; z-index: 100;
  }
  .secondary-app .camera-bottom-bar { display: flex; }
  .secondary-app.camera-fullscreen .camera-bottom-bar { display: flex; }
  .camera-bottom-bar .cam-status { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }
  .camera-bottom-bar .cam-status.tracking { color: #86efac; }
  .camera-bottom-bar .cam-spacer { flex: 1; }
  .cam-btn {
    padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #fff; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }
  .cam-btn.exit-btn { border-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.4); background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }
  .cam-fs-btn {
    position: absolute; bottom: 8px; right: 8px; z-index: 10;
    padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); color: #fff; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }
  .secondary-header { text-align: center; }
  .secondary-header h2 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .secondary-header h2 span { color: var(--accent); }
  .secondary-room-code {
    font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .secondary-room-code b {
    font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent); letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-family: monospace;
  }
  .secondary-status {
    font-size: 12px; color: var(--text2); text-align: center;
  }
  .secondary-roles {
    display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center;
  }
  .secondary-role-card {
    padding: 16px 24px; border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg2);
    text-align: center; min-width: 100px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .secondary-role-card.active {
    border-color: rgba(134,239,172,0.3);
    background: rgba(134,239,172,0.06);
  }
  .secondary-role-card .role-icon { font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .secondary-role-card .role-name { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text2); }
  .secondary-role-card.active .role-name { color: var(--green); }
  .secondary-role-card .role-status { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 4px; }
  .secondary-role-card.active .role-status { color: var(--green); }
  /* Right panel tabs */
  .right-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 0; }
  .right-tab {
    flex: 1; padding: 8px 12px; text-align: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text3); cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .right-tab:hover { color: var(--text2); }
  .right-tab.active { color: var(--accent); border-bottom-color: var(--accent); }
  .right-tab-content { display: none; flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; }
  .right-tab-content.active { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  /* Stage tabs */
  .stage-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); overflow-x: auto; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .stage-tab {
    flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding: 5px 4px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer;
    border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: all 0.2s; user-select: none;
  }
  .stage-tab:hover { background: var(--bg2); }
  .stage-tab.active { border-bottom-color: var(--accent); background: var(--bg2); }
  .stage-tab span { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text3); white-space: nowrap; }
  .stage-tab.active span { color: var(--accent); }
  /* Drills panel */
  .drill-stage-header {
    padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text3);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
    user-select: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .drill-stage-header:hover { color: var(--text2); }
  .drill-stage-header .caret { font-size: 8px; transition: transform 0.2s; }
  .drill-stage-header.collapsed .caret { transform: rotate(-90deg); }
  .drill-stage-body { overflow: hidden; }
  .drill-stage-body.collapsed { display: none; }
  .drill-card {
    padding: 8px 12px; margin: 4px 8px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg2); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .drill-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
  .drill-card.active { border-color: var(--green); background: rgba(134,239,172,0.06); }
  .drill-card .drill-id { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text3); letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
  .drill-card .drill-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text1); margin: 2px 0; }
  .drill-card .drill-desc { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); line-height: 1.4; }
  .drill-result-bar { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; padding: 6px 0; }
  .drill-medal { font-size: 16px; }
  .drill-score { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text1); }
  .drill-metrics { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); line-height: 1.5; }
  .drill-settings { padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 11px; }
  .drill-settings label { display: block; color: var(--text2); margin: 6px 0 2px; font-weight: 600; }
  .drill-settings select, .drill-settings input {
    width: 100%; padding: 4px 6px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg1); color: var(--text1); font-size: 11px;
  }
  .drill-start-btn {
    margin: 8px; padding: 8px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--green);
    background: rgba(134,239,172,0.08); color: var(--green); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer; text-align: center; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .drill-start-btn:hover { background: rgba(134,239,172,0.15); }
  /* Technique report panel */
  @keyframes techFadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  .technique-entry {
    padding: 8px 10px; margin: 4px 0; border-radius: 8px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(192,132,252,0.15); background: rgba(192,132,252,0.04);
    animation: techFadeIn 0.3s ease-out;
  }
  .technique-finger { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .technique-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 6px; margin: 2px 0; }
  .technique-label { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; min-width: 28px; }
  .technique-label.eye { color: #c084fc; }
  .technique-label.ear { color: #60a5fa; }
  .technique-obs { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2); line-height: 1.4; }
  .technique-suggestion { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text1); font-style: italic; margin-top: 4px; }
  .camera-badge {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 10px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: var(--text3);
  }
  .camera-badge.off { color: var(--text3); }
  .camera-badge.warn { color: #fbbf24; border-color: rgba(251,191,36,0.2); background: rgba(251,191,36,0.06); }
  .camera-badge.ready { color: var(--green); border-color: rgba(134,239,172,0.2); background: rgba(134,239,172,0.06); }
  /* Camera preview on secondary device */
  .camera-preview-wrap {
    margin: 0 auto; position: relative; border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden;
    border: none; max-width: 100%; width: 100%;
  }
  .secondary-app .camera-preview-wrap {
    flex: 0 0 auto; width: 100%; max-width: 100%;
  }
  .camera-preview-wrap video { width: 100%; display: block; }
  .camera-preview-wrap .hand-overlay { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
  /* Score panel (right column) */
  .score-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden; }
  .score-browser {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%;
  }
  .score-tree {
    flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 11px;
    max-height: 300px;
  }
  .score-tree-folder { padding: 2px 0; }
  .score-tree-folder-name {
    cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text2);
    padding: 3px 4px; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
  }
  .score-tree-folder-name:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
  .score-tree-children { padding-left: 14px; }
  .score-tree-file {
    cursor: pointer; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px;
    color: var(--text2); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
  }
  .score-tree-file:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: var(--text1); }
  .score-tree-file.active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: var(--accent); }
  .score-preview {
    padding: 8px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .score-info { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2); padding: 4px 0; }
  .score-info .title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text1); margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .score-info .composer { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); }
  .score-info .meta { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 4px; }
  .score-canvas-wrap { background: #050505; border-radius: 6px; margin-top: 6px; }
  .score-canvas-wrap canvas { width: 100%; display: block; }
  .score-actions { display: flex; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 0; }
  .score-actions button {
    flex: 1; padding: 6px 8px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg2); color: var(--text2); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .score-actions button:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
  .score-actions button.active { border-color: var(--green); color: var(--green); background: rgba(134,239,172,0.08); }

  /* Chat / Conversation */
  .chat-area { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  .chat-area::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
  .chat-area::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
  .chat-area::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 2px; }
  .system-msg { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-style: italic; padding: 12px 0; text-align: center; }
  @keyframes msgIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  .chat-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; animation: msgIn 0.2s ease-out; }
  .chat-row.user { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
  .chat-row.bot { flex-direction: row; }
  .chat-msg {
    max-width: 80%; min-width: 60px; padding: 8px 12px;
    border-radius: 14px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .chat-msg .msg-label {
    font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin-bottom: 2px; opacity: 0.5;
  }
  .chat-msg .msg-time {
    font-size: 9px; margin-top: 3px; opacity: 0.3; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  }
  .chat-msg.user {
    background: rgba(147,197,253,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(147,197,253,0.15);
    border-bottom-right-radius: 4px;
  }
  .chat-msg.user .msg-label { color: var(--blue); }
  .chat-msg.user .msg-text { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }
  .chat-msg.user .msg-time { text-align: right; }
  .chat-msg.bot {
    background: rgba(134,239,172,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(134,239,172,0.12);
    border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
  }
  .chat-msg.bot .msg-label { color: var(--green); }
  .chat-msg.bot .msg-text { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }
  .chat-msg.bot .msg-time { text-align: left; }

  /* ====== Tablet Mode ====== */
  .tablet-app {
    width: 100%; height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .tablet-toolbar {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 6px 10px; background: var(--bg2); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    flex-shrink: 0; gap: 8px;
  }
  .tablet-pills { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .tablet-pill {
    padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: var(--text3); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }
  .tablet-pill:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
  .tablet-pill.active {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    color: var(--text1);
  }
  .tablet-toolbar-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .tablet-room { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); font-family: monospace; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
  .tablet-status { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2); }
  .tablet-speaking { font-size: 11px; color: var(--green); font-weight: 600; }

  /* Portrait: single column stack */
  .tablet-panels {
    flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden;
  }
  /* Landscape: two-column grid */
  .tablet-panels.landscape {
    flex-direction: row;
  }
  .tablet-panel {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: 0; min-width: 0;
    flex: 1 1 0; overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg2);
  }
  .tablet-panels.landscape .tablet-panel {
    min-width: 100px;
  }

  /* Partition drag handles */
  .tablet-partition {
    flex-shrink: 0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    transition: background 0.15s; touch-action: none; cursor: row-resize;
  }
  /* Portrait: horizontal bar */
  .tablet-panels:not(.landscape) .tablet-partition {
    height: 12px; width: 100%; cursor: row-resize;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  /* Landscape: vertical bar */
  .tablet-panels.landscape .tablet-partition {
    width: 12px; height: 100%; cursor: col-resize;
    border-left: 1px solid var(--border); border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .tablet-partition:hover, .tablet-partition.dragging {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  }
  .tablet-partition::after {
    content: ''; display: block; margin: auto;
    border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
  }
  .tablet-panels:not(.landscape) .tablet-partition::after {
    width: 40px; height: 3px; margin-top: 4px;
  }
  .tablet-panels.landscape .tablet-partition::after {
    width: 3px; height: 40px; margin-left: 4px;
  }
</style>
<!-- MediaPipe loaded dynamically in initDesktopMediaPipe() -->
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="header">
    <div class="header-left">
      <div>
        <h1>Piano<span>Quest</span> Live</h1>
        <div class="header-sub">CREATIVE STORYTELLER · REAL-TIME PIANO COACHING · v3.2.47</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="controls">
      <select class="midi-select" id="midiInputSelect" aria-label="MIDI input" style="font-size:10px;padding:4px 6px;">
        <option value="">No MIDI input</option>
      </select>
      <span class="pedal-pill" id="pedalStatus">Pedal Up</span>
      <span id="midiStatus" style="display:none;"></span>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin:0 8px;">
        <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">A</span>
        <input type="range" id="fontScaleSlider" min="80" max="200" value="150" step="10"
          style="width:60px;accent-color:var(--accent);"
          oninput="setFontScale(this.value)">
        <span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text3);">A</span>
      </div>
      <div class="status-dot" id="statusDot"></div>
      <span class="status-label" id="statusLabel">Disconnected</span>
      <button class="primary" id="btnStart" onclick="toggleSession()">Start Session</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Main content -->
  <div class="main">

    <!-- Left column: Camera + Coaching + Badges -->
    <div class="left-col" id="leftCol">
      <div class="panel" id="deviceManagerPanel" style="display:none">
        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="dot" style="background:var(--green)"></div>DEVICES
          <span class="device-count" id="deviceCount">1</span>
        </div>
        <div class="devices-content">
          <div class="device-list-items" id="deviceListItems"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="room-bar">
          Room: <span class="room-code" id="roomCodeDisplay">----</span>
        </div>
        <div id="qrPanel" style="text-align:center;padding:8px;background:#050508;border-radius:0 0 8px 8px;">
          <img id="qrImg" style="width:180px;height:180px;border-radius:4px;" alt="QR code">
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;">Scan to join this session</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panel">
        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="dot" style="background:var(--accent)"></div>AUDIO LEVEL
        </div>
        <div class="level-meter">
          <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);min-width:38px;">User</span>
          <div class="level-bar-bg"><div class="level-bar" id="levelBar"></div></div>
          <div class="level-label" id="levelLabel">0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="level-meter" id="geminiSpeaking">
          <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);min-width:38px;">Gemini</span>
          <div class="level-bar-bg"><div class="level-bar" id="geminiVolFill" style="background:var(--gemini);"></div></div>
          <span id="geminiSpeakLabel" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);min-width:38px;text-align:right;">Silent</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panel" id="recordPanel" style="padding:8px 12px;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
          <div class="dot" style="background:var(--red, #f66)"></div>
          <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:0.05em;">ON DEMAND</span>
          <div style="flex:1"></div>
          <button id="recordBtn" onclick="toggleRecordMode()" style="padding:4px 12px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);color:var(--text1);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Record</button>
        </div>
        <div id="recordStatus" style="display:none;font-size:10px;color:var(--red, #f66);padding:4px 0;">Recording... play a passage, then tap Analyze</div>
      </div>

      <div class="panel" style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:100px;">
        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="dot" style="background:var(--gemini)"></div>CONVERSATION
        </div>
        <div class="chat-area" id="chatArea" style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;">
          <div class="system-msg" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;padding:12px;">Start a session to begin conversation</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panel" id="techniquePanel">
        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="dot" style="background:#c084fc"></div>FINGER TRACKING
          <span class="camera-badge off" id="cameraBadge">Camera Off</span>
          <button id="refreshCameraBtn" onclick="refreshCamera()" style="display:none;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid var(--amber, #fbbf24);background:rgba(251,191,36,0.1);color:var(--amber, #fbbf24);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-left:4px;">Refresh</button>
        </div>
        <div id="remoteCameraWrap" style="display:none;background:#000;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;">
          <img id="remoteCameraImg" style="width:100%;display:block;" alt="Camera">
          <canvas id="desktopHandOverlay" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div id="techniqueEntries" style="padding:8px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);">Camera off</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Resize handle: left ↔ center -->
    <div class="grid-resize-handle" id="leftResizeHandle"></div>

    <!-- Center column: Scene + MIDI UI -->
    <div class="right-col">

      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:6px 12px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;flex-shrink:0;">
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);white-space:nowrap;">
          Scale:
          <select id="staffScale" title="Scale" style="font-size:12px;padding:3px 6px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text1);border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;">
            <option value="C major">C</option>
            <option value="G major">G</option>
            <option value="D major">D</option>
            <option value="A major">A</option>
            <option value="E major">E</option>
            <option value="B major">B</option>
            <option value="F# major">F#</option>
            <option value="F major">F</option>
            <option value="Bb major">Bb</option>
            <option value="Eb major">Eb</option>
            <option value="Ab major">Ab</option>
            <option value="Db major">Db</option>
            <option value="Gb major">Gb</option>
            <option value="A minor">Am</option>
            <option value="E minor">Em</option>
            <option value="B minor">Bm</option>
            <option value="D minor">Dm</option>
            <option value="G minor">Gm</option>
            <option value="C minor">Cm</option>
            <option value="F minor">Fm</option>
            <option value="F# minor">F#m</option>
            <option value="C# minor">C#m</option>
            <option value="G# minor">G#m</option>
            <option value="D# minor">D#m</option>
            <option value="Bb minor">Bbm</option>
            <option value="Eb minor">Ebm</option>
          </select>
        </label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);white-space:nowrap;">
          Tempo:
          <input type="range" id="bpmSlider" min="40" max="300" value="90" style="width:100px;height:14px;cursor:pointer;">
          <span id="bpmVal" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text1);min-width:28px;">90</span>
          <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);">bpm</span>
        </label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);white-space:nowrap;">
          Time signature:
          <select id="staffTimeSig" title="Time signature" style="font-size:12px;padding:3px 6px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text1);border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;">
            <option value="4/4">4/4</option>
            <option value="3/4">3/4</option>
            <option value="2/4">2/4</option>
            <option value="6/8">6/8</option>
          </select>
        </label>
      </div>

      <div class="midi-stack" id="midiStack">
        <div class="roll-wrap" id="rollWrap" style="background:#0a0a0a;border-radius:12px 12px 0 0;overflow:hidden;">
          <canvas id="pianoRollCanvas"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div class="keyboard-wrap" id="keyboardWrap" style="background:#0a0a0a;">
          <canvas id="keyboardCanvas"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div class="staff-wrap" id="staffWrap" style="padding:0;background:#050508;border-radius:0 0 12px 12px;overflow:hidden;">
          <canvas id="grandStaffCanvas"></canvas>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Resize handle: center ↔ score -->
    <div class="grid-resize-handle" id="scoreResizeHandle"></div>

    <!-- Right column: Drills + Score Browser -->
    <div class="score-col" id="scoreCol">
      <div class="panel" style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;">
        <div class="right-tabs">
          <div class="right-tab active" onclick="switchRightTab('drills')">DRILLS</div>
          <div class="right-tab" onclick="switchRightTab('scores')">SCORES</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Stage tabs (below DRILLS/SCORES) -->
        <div class="stage-tabs" id="stageTabs">
          <div class="stage-tab active" onclick="selectStage(1)"><span>1. Single Finger</span></div>
          <div class="stage-tab" onclick="selectStage(2)"><span>2. Two Fingers</span></div>
          <div class="stage-tab" onclick="selectStage(3)"><span>3. Five-Finger</span></div>
          <div class="stage-tab" onclick="selectStage(4)"><span>4. Scales</span></div>
          <div class="stage-tab" onclick="selectStage(5)"><span>5. Chords</span></div>
          <div class="stage-tab" onclick="selectStage(6)"><span>6. Advanced</span></div>
          <div class="stage-tab" onclick="selectStage(7)"><span>7. Musical</span></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Drills tab -->
        <div class="right-tab-content active" id="drillsTab" style="overflow-y:auto;">
          <div id="drillCatalogList"></div>
          <div id="drillSettings" style="display:none;">
            <div class="drill-settings" style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end;">
              <label style="flex:1;min-width:70px;">Root Note
                <select id="drillNote">
                  <option value="60">C4</option>
                  <option value="62">D4</option>
                  <option value="64">E4</option>
                  <option value="65">F4</option>
                  <option value="67">G4</option>
                  <option value="69">A4</option>
                  <option value="71">B4</option>
                </select>
              </label>
              <label style="flex:1;min-width:60px;">BPM
                <input type="number" id="drillBpm" value="80" min="40" max="200">
              </label>
              <label style="flex:1;min-width:60px;">Measures
                <input type="number" id="drillMeasures" value="8" min="2" max="32">
              </label>
              <label id="drillDynamicLabel" style="display:none;flex:1;min-width:60px;">Dynamic
                <select id="drillDynamic">
                  <option value="32">pp</option>
                  <option value="48">p</option>
                  <option value="64" selected>mp</option>
                  <option value="80">mf</option>
                  <option value="96">f</option>
                  <option value="112">ff</option>
                </select>
              </label>
              <label id="drillKeyLabel" style="display:none;flex:1;min-width:70px;">Key
                <select id="drillKey">
                  <option value="C">C Major</option>
                  <option value="G">G Major</option>
                  <option value="D">D Major</option>
                  <option value="F">F Major</option>
                  <option value="Bb">Bb Major</option>
                  <option value="Am">A Minor</option>
                  <option value="Em">E Minor</option>
                  <option value="Dm">D Minor</option>
                </select>
              </label>
            </div>
            <div class="drill-start-btn" id="drillStartBtn" onclick="startDrill()">Start Drill</div>
            <div id="drillResult" style="display:none;padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;"></div>
            <div id="drillCameraStatus" style="display:none;text-align:center;padding:4px 8px;font-size:10px;color:var(--green);letter-spacing:0.04em;">Camera active — Gemini watching technique</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Scores tab -->
        <div class="right-tab-content" id="scoresTab">
          <div class="score-browser">
            <div class="score-tree" id="scoreTree">
              <div style="color:var(--text3);font-size:10px;">Loading sheets...</div>
            </div>
            <div class="sheet-music-view" id="sheetMusicView" style="display:none;flex:1;overflow:auto;padding:4px;">
              <img src="/static/sheets/fur-elise-reference.png" alt="Fur Elise Sheet Music" style="width:100%;display:block;border-radius:4px;">
              <div style="text-align:center;padding:4px;">
                <a href="/static/sheets/fur-elise-full.pdf" target="_blank" style="color:#6af;font-size:11px;">Open full PDF</a>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="score-preview" id="scorePreview" style="display:none;">
              <div class="score-info" id="scoreInfo"></div>
              <div class="score-canvas-wrap">
                <canvas id="scoreCanvas"></canvas>
              </div>
              <div class="score-actions">
                <button id="sheetMusicBtn" onclick="toggleSheetMusicView()">Sheet Music</button>
                <button id="scoreLoadBtn" onclick="loadScoreToTargets()">Load as Target Notes</button>
                <button id="scoreColorBtn" onclick="toggleScoreColorMode()">Color Mode</button>
                <button id="scorePlayBtn" onclick="toggleScorePlayback()">Play</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ============================================================================
// State
// ============================================================================
let ws = null;
let audioCtx = null;
let playbackCtx = null;
let mediaStream = null;
let analyser = null;
let processor = null;
let animFrame = null;
let nextPlayTime = 0;
let sessionActive = false;
let playbackActiveUntil = 0;
let isBotSpeaking = false;
var lastBotSpeakEnd = 0;
let reconnectDelay = 1000;

// Font scale — persisted in localStorage
function setFontScale(val) {
  var scale = parseInt(val) / 100;
  // Scale the main content area (not the header)
  var main = document.querySelector('.main');
  if (main) main.style.zoom = scale;
  localStorage.setItem('pq_fontScale', val);
  var slider = document.getElementById('fontScaleSlider');
  if (slider && slider.value !== String(val)) slider.value = val;
}
(function() {
  var saved = localStorage.getItem('pq_fontScale') || '150';
  setFontScale(saved);
})();

// Device management state
let isPrimaryDevice = false;
let isSecondaryDevice = false;
let myDeviceId = '';
let myRoomCode = '';
let myRoles = { mic: false, camera: false, midi: false };
let deviceList = [];
let cameraEnabled = false;
let bothHandsDetected = false;
let mediapipeActive = false;
let lastFrameTime = 0;
let cameraStaleTimer = null;

let midiAccess = null;
let midiInput = null;
let midiSnapshotTimer = null;
let lastMidiSnapshotAt = 0;
let sessionStartTime = 0;

const onsets = [];
const activeNotes = new Map();
const fingerDownNotes = new Set();
const pedalSustainedNotes = new Set();
const noteHistory = [];
const recentMidiNotes = [];
let pedalDown = false;

const TOTAL_KEYS = 88;
const FIRST_MIDI = 21;
const WHITE_KEYS_COUNT = 52;
const BLACK_KEY_PATTERN = [false, true, false, true, false, false, true, false, true, false, true, false];
const NOTE_NAMES = ['C', 'C#', 'D', 'D#', 'E', 'F', 'F#', 'G', 'G#', 'A', 'A#', 'B'];
// Distinct colors per dynamic level — cool→warm (quiet=cool, loud=warm)
const DYNAMICS_COLORS = [
  { vel: 0,   r: 70,  g: 110, b: 210 },  // pp   cobalt blue
  { vel: 18,  r: 70,  g: 110, b: 210 },  // pp
  { vel: 36,  r: 50,  g: 190, b: 215 },  // p    cyan
  { vel: 54,  r: 60,  g: 210, b: 170 },  // mp   emerald
  { vel: 72,  r: 235, g: 190, b: 50  },  // mf   warm gold
  { vel: 90,  r: 250, g: 120, b: 40  },  // f    amber-orange
  { vel: 100, r: 240, g: 60,  b: 60  },  // f+   pure red
  { vel: 112, r: 235, g: 65,  b: 150 },  // ff   electric magenta
  { vel: 127, r: 255, g: 255, b: 255 }   // fff  white
];
const DYNAMICS_LABELS = [
  { vel: 0, label: 'ppp' },
  { vel: 18, label: 'pp' },
  { vel: 36, label: 'p' },
  { vel: 54, label: 'mp' },
  { vel: 72, label: 'mf' },
  { vel: 90, label: 'f' },
  { vel: 112, label: 'ff' },
  { vel: 127, label: 'fff' }
];
var KEYBOARD = buildKeyboard();
var KEY_BY_MIDI = new Map(KEYBOARD.map(function(key) { return [key.midi, key]; }));

const bpmSlider = document.getElementById('bpmSlider');
const bpmVal = document.getElementById('bpmVal');
bpmSlider.addEventListener('input', function() { bpmVal.textContent = bpmSlider.value; });

// Broadcast session settings to server whenever scale/bpm/timeSig changes
function sendSessionSettings() {
  console.log('[PQ] sendSessionSettings called, ws open:', ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN);
  if (typeof ws !== 'undefined' && ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({
      type: 'session_settings',
      scale: document.getElementById('staffScale').value || 'C major',
      bpm: parseInt(document.getElementById('bpmSlider').value, 10) || 90,
      timeSignature: document.getElementById('staffTimeSig').value || '4/4'
    }));
  }
}
bpmSlider.addEventListener('change', sendSessionSettings);
document.getElementById('staffScale').addEventListener('change', sendSessionSettings);
document.getElementById('staffTimeSig').addEventListener('change', sendSessionSettings);

document.getElementById('midiInputSelect').addEventListener('change', function(e) {
  setMidiInput(e.target.value);
});
document.getElementById('midiInputSelect').addEventListener('focus', function() {
  refreshMidiInputs();
});

// ============================================================================
// MIDI helpers
// ============================================================================
function buildKeyboard() {
  var keys = [];
  var whiteIdx = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < TOTAL_KEYS; i++) {
    var midi = FIRST_MIDI + i;
    var noteInOctave = midi % 12;
    var isBlack = BLACK_KEY_PATTERN[noteInOctave];
    keys.push({ midi: midi, isBlack: isBlack, whiteIndex: isBlack ? whiteIdx - 1 : whiteIdx });
    if (!isBlack) whiteIdx++;
  }
  return keys;
}

function noteName(note) {
  return NOTE_NAMES[note % 12] + (Math.floor(note / 12) - 1);
}

function detectTechniques() {
  var notes = recentMidiNotes.slice(-12).map(function(item) { return item.note; });
  var labels = [];
  if (notes.length < 2) return labels;

  var ascendingRun = 1;
  var descendingRun = 1;
  var repeatedRun = 1;
  var arpeggioRun = 1;

  function pushUnique(label) {
    if (labels.indexOf(label) === -1) labels.push(label);
  }

  for (var i = 1; i < notes.length; i++) {
    var diff = notes[i] - notes[i - 1];
    var absDiff = Math.abs(diff);

    if (diff === 1 || diff === 2) ascendingRun += 1;
    else ascendingRun = 1;

    if (diff === -1 || diff === -2) descendingRun += 1;
    else descendingRun = 1;

    if (ascendingRun >= 4) pushUnique('scale_run_ascending');
    if (descendingRun >= 4) pushUnique('scale_run_descending');

    if (notes[i] === notes[i - 1]) repeatedRun += 1;
    else repeatedRun = 1;

    if (repeatedRun >= 3) {
      pushUnique('repeated_note(' + noteName(notes[i]) + 'x' + repeatedRun + ')');
    }

    if (absDiff === 3 || absDiff === 4) arpeggioRun += 1;
    else arpeggioRun = 1;

    if (arpeggioRun >= 3) pushUnique('arpeggio');
    if (absDiff > 7) pushUnique('wide_leap');
  }

  return labels;
}

function dynamicsRgb(velocity) {
  if (velocity <= DYNAMICS_COLORS[0].vel) return DYNAMICS_COLORS[0];
  for (var i = 1; i < DYNAMICS_COLORS.length; i++) {
    if (velocity <= DYNAMICS_COLORS[i].vel) {
      var lo = DYNAMICS_COLORS[i - 1];
      var hi = DYNAMICS_COLORS[i];
      var t = (velocity - lo.vel) / (hi.vel - lo.vel);
      return {
        r: Math.round(lo.r + (hi.r - lo.r) * t),
        g: Math.round(lo.g + (hi.g - lo.g) * t),
        b: Math.round(lo.b + (hi.b - lo.b) * t)
      };
    }
  }
  return DYNAMICS_COLORS[DYNAMICS_COLORS.length - 1];
}

function dynamicsColor(velocity, alpha) {
  var c = dynamicsRgb(velocity);
  if (alpha == null) return 'rgb(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ')';
  return 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',' + alpha + ')';
}

function darkenedColor(velocity, factor, alpha) {
  var c = dynamicsRgb(velocity);
  var r = Math.round(c.r * factor);
  var g = Math.round(c.g * factor);
  var b = Math.round(c.b * factor);
  if (alpha == null) return 'rgb(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ')';
  return 'rgba(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ',' + alpha + ')';
}

// ============================================================================
// Visual Effects — particles, flashes, gradient tails
// ============================================================================
var VFX_PARTICLES = [];
var VFX_MAX_PARTICLES = 200;
var VFX_FLASHES = [];

function vfxSpawnParticles(note, velocity) {
  var keyInfo = KEY_BY_MIDI.get(note);
  if (!keyInfo) return;
  var canvas = document.getElementById('pianoRollCanvas');
  if (!canvas) return;
  var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  var W = rect.width;
  var H = rect.height;
  var whiteKeyW = W / WHITE_KEYS_COUNT;
  var blackKeyW = whiteKeyW * 0.65;
  var noteX = keyInfo.isBlack
    ? (keyInfo.whiteIndex + 1) * whiteKeyW - blackKeyW / 2
    : keyInfo.whiteIndex * whiteKeyW;
  var noteW = keyInfo.isBlack ? blackKeyW : whiteKeyW;
  var spawnX = noteX + noteW / 2;
  var spawnY = H; // bottom of waterfall
  var count = Math.round(6 + (velocity / 127) * 10); // 6-16 particles
  var c = dynamicsRgb(velocity);
  for (var i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    if (VFX_PARTICLES.length >= VFX_MAX_PARTICLES) {
      // reuse oldest
      var p = VFX_PARTICLES.shift();
      p.x = spawnX + (Math.random() - 0.5) * noteW;
      p.y = spawnY;
      p.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2.5;
      p.vy = -(1.5 + Math.random() * 3 + (velocity / 127) * 2);
      p.r = c.r; p.g = c.g; p.b = c.b;
      p.life = 1.0;
      p.decay = 0.015 + Math.random() * 0.01;
      p.size = 1.5 + Math.random() * 2;
      VFX_PARTICLES.push(p);
    } else {
      VFX_PARTICLES.push({
        x: spawnX + (Math.random() - 0.5) * noteW,
        y: spawnY,
        vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2.5,
        vy: -(1.5 + Math.random() * 3 + (velocity / 127) * 2),
        r: c.r, g: c.g, b: c.b,
        life: 1.0,
        decay: 0.015 + Math.random() * 0.01,
        size: 1.5 + Math.random() * 2
      });
    }
  }
  // Also spawn a flash
  VFX_FLASHES.push({
    x: spawnX,
    y: spawnY,
    w: noteW * 1.8,
    r: c.r, g: c.g, b: c.b,
    life: 1.0,
    decay: 0.06
  });
}

function vfxUpdate() {
  // Update particles
  for (var i = VFX_PARTICLES.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    var p = VFX_PARTICLES[i];
    p.x += p.vx;
    p.y += p.vy;
    p.vy += 0.08; // gentle gravity
    p.life -= p.decay;
    if (p.life <= 0) VFX_PARTICLES.splice(i, 1);
  }
  // Update flashes
  for (var j = VFX_FLASHES.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
    var f = VFX_FLASHES[j];
    f.life -= f.decay;
    if (f.life <= 0) VFX_FLASHES.splice(j, 1);
  }
}

function vfxDrawParticles(ctx) {
  for (var i = 0; i < VFX_PARTICLES.length; i++) {
    var p = VFX_PARTICLES[i];
    var alpha = p.life * 0.8;
    ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgb(' + p.r + ',' + p.g + ',' + p.b + ')';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size * p.life, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    // Soft glow around particle
    ctx.globalAlpha = alpha * 0.3;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size * p.life * 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
  }
  ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
}

function vfxDrawFlashes(ctx, waterfallH) {
  for (var i = 0; i < VFX_FLASHES.length; i++) {
    var f = VFX_FLASHES[i];
    var grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(f.x, waterfallH, 0, f.x, waterfallH, f.w * f.life);
    grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + f.r + ',' + f.g + ',' + f.b + ',' + (f.life * 0.6) + ')');
    grad.addColorStop(0.4, 'rgba(' + f.r + ',' + f.g + ',' + f.b + ',' + (f.life * 0.2) + ')');
    grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + f.r + ',' + f.g + ',' + f.b + ',0)');
    ctx.fillStyle = grad;
    ctx.fillRect(f.x - f.w, waterfallH - f.w * 0.7, f.w * 2, f.w * 0.7);
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// Chat / Conversation panel
// ============================================================================
function addMessage(text, type) {
  var chat = document.getElementById('chatArea');
  if (!chat) return;
  var sys = chat.querySelector('.system-msg');
  if (sys) sys.remove();

  var side = type === 'input' ? 'user' : 'bot';

  var row = document.createElement('div');
  row.className = 'chat-row ' + side;

  var div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className = 'chat-msg ' + side;

  var lbl = document.createElement('div');
  lbl.className = 'msg-label';
  lbl.textContent = side === 'user' ? 'You' : 'Gemini';
  div.appendChild(lbl);

  var p = document.createElement('div');
  p.className = 'msg-text';
  p.textContent = text;
  div.appendChild(p);

  var ts = document.createElement('div');
  ts.className = 'msg-time';
  ts.textContent = new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
  div.appendChild(ts);

  row.appendChild(div);
  chat.appendChild(row);
  chat.scrollTop = chat.scrollHeight;
}

// ============================================================================
// Tool-driven events — coaching focus + technique reports
// ============================================================================
function handleToolEvent(msg) {
  if (msg.type === 'coaching_focus') {
    document.getElementById('coachingText').textContent = msg.text;
  } else if (msg.type === 'technique_report') {
    showTechniqueReport(msg);
  }
}

function showTechniqueReport(data) {
  var panel = document.getElementById('techniquePanel');
  var entries = document.getElementById('techniqueEntries');
  if (!panel || !entries) return;
  panel.style.display = '';

  var placeholder = entries.querySelector('div[style]');
  if (placeholder && placeholder.textContent.indexOf('Camera') >= 0) placeholder.remove();

  var entry = document.createElement('div');
  entry.className = 'technique-entry';

  var finger = document.createElement('div');
  finger.className = 'technique-finger';
  finger.textContent = data.finger || 'Hand';
  entry.appendChild(finger);

  if (data.visual_observation) {
    var eyeRow = document.createElement('div');
    eyeRow.className = 'technique-row';
    var eyeLabel = document.createElement('span');
    eyeLabel.className = 'technique-label eye';
    eyeLabel.textContent = 'EYE';
    eyeRow.appendChild(eyeLabel);
    var eyeObs = document.createElement('span');
    eyeObs.className = 'technique-obs';
    eyeObs.textContent = data.visual_observation;
    eyeRow.appendChild(eyeObs);
    entry.appendChild(eyeRow);
  }

  if (data.audio_observation) {
    var earRow = document.createElement('div');
    earRow.className = 'technique-row';
    var earLabel = document.createElement('span');
    earLabel.className = 'technique-label ear';
    earLabel.textContent = 'EAR';
    earRow.appendChild(earLabel);
    var earObs = document.createElement('span');
    earObs.className = 'technique-obs';
    earObs.textContent = data.audio_observation;
    earRow.appendChild(earObs);
    entry.appendChild(earRow);
  }

  if (data.suggestion) {
    var sug = document.createElement('div');
    sug.className = 'technique-suggestion';
    sug.textContent = data.suggestion;
    entry.appendChild(sug);
  }

  entries.insertBefore(entry, entries.firstChild);
  while (entries.children.length > 10) entries.removeChild(entries.lastChild);
}

function resetMidiState() {
  activeNotes.clear();
  fingerDownNotes.clear();
  pedalSustainedNotes.clear();
  noteHistory.length = 0;
  recentMidiNotes.length = 0;
  onsets.length = 0;
  pedalDown = false;
  updatePedalStatus();
}

function updateMidiStatus(text) {
  document.getElementById('midiStatus').textContent = text;
}

function updatePedalStatus() {
  var el = document.getElementById('pedalStatus');
  el.textContent = pedalDown ? 'Pedal Down' : 'Pedal Up';
  el.className = pedalDown ? 'pedal-pill active' : 'pedal-pill';
}

async function refreshMidiInputs() {
  var select = document.getElementById('midiInputSelect');
  if (!navigator.requestMIDIAccess) {
    updateMidiStatus('Web MIDI not supported');
    select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Web MIDI unavailable</option>';
    return;
  }

  try {
    updateMidiStatus('Checking MIDI devices...');
    if (!midiAccess) {
      midiAccess = await navigator.requestMIDIAccess();
      midiAccess.onstatechange = function() { refreshMidiInputs(); };
    }

    var inputs = Array.from(midiAccess.inputs.values());
    select.innerHTML = '';
    if (!inputs.length) {
      select.innerHTML = '<option value="">No MIDI input found</option>';
      if (midiInput) midiInput.onmidimessage = null;
      midiInput = null;
      updateMidiStatus('No MIDI input found');
      return;
    }

    inputs.forEach(function(input) {
      var option = document.createElement('option');
      option.value = input.id;
      option.textContent = input.name || 'MIDI Input';
      select.appendChild(option);
    });

    if (!midiInput || !midiAccess.inputs.has(midiInput.id)) {
      // Auto-select: prefer CASIO, then saved device, then first available
      var savedMidiId = localStorage.getItem('preferredMidiInput');
      var casioInput = inputs.find(function(inp) { return inp.name && inp.name.toUpperCase().indexOf('CASIO') >= 0; });
      var savedInput = savedMidiId ? inputs.find(function(inp) { return inp.id === savedMidiId; }) : null;
      var best = casioInput || savedInput || inputs[0];
      setMidiInput(best.id);
      localStorage.setItem('preferredMidiInput', best.id);
    } else {
      select.value = midiInput.id;
      updateMidiStatus('MIDI: ' + (midiInput.name || 'Connected'));
    }
  } catch (err) {
    var name = err && err.name ? err.name : 'Error';
    if (name === 'NotAllowedError' || name === 'SecurityError') {
      updateMidiStatus('MIDI permission blocked');
    } else {
      updateMidiStatus('MIDI error: ' + name);
    }
    console.error('Failed to refresh MIDI inputs', err);
  }
}

function setMidiInput(inputId) {
  if (!midiAccess) return;
  if (midiInput) midiInput.onmidimessage = null;
  midiInput = inputId ? midiAccess.inputs.get(inputId) : null;
  if (midiInput) {
    midiInput.onmidimessage = handleMidiMessage;
    document.getElementById('midiInputSelect').value = midiInput.id;
    localStorage.setItem('preferredMidiInput', midiInput.id);
    updateMidiStatus('MIDI: ' + (midiInput.name || 'Connected'));
  } else {
    updateMidiStatus('MIDI not connected');
  }
}

function handleMidiMessage(event) {
  var data = event.data;
  if (!data || data.length < 2) return;

  var status = data[0];
  var command = status & 0xf0;
  var channel = status & 0x0f;
  var data1 = data[1];
  var data2 = data.length > 2 ? data[2] : 0;
  var nowMs = Date.now();

  if (command === 0x90 && data2 > 0) {
    handleNoteOn(data1, data2, nowMs);
    sendMidiEvent({ event: 'noteOn', note: data1, velocity: data2, channel: channel, timestampMs: nowMs });
  } else if (command === 0x80 || (command === 0x90 && data2 === 0)) {
    handleNoteOff(data1, nowMs);
    sendMidiEvent({ event: 'noteOff', note: data1, velocity: data2, channel: channel, timestampMs: nowMs });
  } else if (command === 0xb0) {
    handleControlChange(data1, data2, nowMs);
    sendMidiEvent({ event: 'controlChange', controller: data1, value: data2, channel: channel, timestampMs: nowMs });
  }
}

function handleNoteOn(note, velocity, nowMs) {
  recordMidiEvent(note, velocity, nowMs, true);
  // Close any open history entries for this note (e.g. pedal-sustained re-trigger)
  for (var hi = noteHistory.length - 1; hi >= 0; hi--) {
    if (noteHistory[hi].note === note && noteHistory[hi].endMs === 0) {
      noteHistory[hi].endMs = nowMs;
      if (!noteHistory[hi].fingerDurationMs) noteHistory[hi].fingerDurationMs = nowMs - noteHistory[hi].startMs;
      break;
    }
  }
  activeNotes.set(note, { note: note, velocity: velocity, timestamp: nowMs });
  fingerDownNotes.add(note);
  pedalSustainedNotes.delete(note);
  noteHistory.push({ note: note, velocity: velocity, startMs: nowMs, endMs: 0, fingerDurationMs: 0 });
  if (noteHistory.length > 500) noteHistory.splice(0, noteHistory.length - 500);
  recentMidiNotes.push({ note: note, velocity: velocity, timestampMs: nowMs });
  if (recentMidiNotes.length > 64) recentMidiNotes.splice(0, recentMidiNotes.length - 64);
  // Drill hit detection — check if this note matches an upcoming target
  if (drillRunning && targetNotes.length > 0) {
    var hitWindow = 250; // ±250ms
    var bestIdx = -1, bestDist = Infinity;
    for (var ti = 0; ti < targetNotes.length; ti++) {
      var tn = targetNotes[ti];
      if (tn.hit || tn.midi !== note) continue;
      var dist = Math.abs(nowMs - tn.arriveMs);
      if (dist < hitWindow && dist < bestDist) { bestIdx = ti; bestDist = dist; }
    }
    if (bestIdx >= 0) {
      targetNotes[bestIdx].hit = true;
      targetNotes[bestIdx].hitTime = nowMs;
      targetNotes[bestIdx].hitVelocity = velocity;
    }
  }
  vfxSpawnParticles(note, velocity);
  onsets.push(nowMs);
  while (onsets.length && nowMs - onsets[0] > 30000) onsets.shift();
  scheduleMidiSnapshot();
}

function handleNoteOff(note, nowMs) {
  recordMidiEvent(note, 0, nowMs, false);
  fingerDownNotes.delete(note);

  for (var i = noteHistory.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    var entry = noteHistory[i];
    if (entry.note === note && entry.endMs === 0) {
      entry.fingerDurationMs = Math.max(0, nowMs - entry.startMs);
      if (pedalDown) {
        pedalSustainedNotes.add(note);
      } else {
        entry.endMs = nowMs;
        activeNotes.delete(note);
      }
      break;
    }
  }

  if (!pedalDown) {
    pedalSustainedNotes.delete(note);
    activeNotes.delete(note);
  }

  scheduleMidiSnapshot();
}

function handleControlChange(controller, value, nowMs) {
  if (controller !== 64) return;
  var wasDown = pedalDown;
  pedalDown = value >= 64;
  updatePedalStatus();

  if (wasDown && !pedalDown) {
    pedalSustainedNotes.forEach(function(note) {
      activeNotes.delete(note);
      for (var i = noteHistory.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        var entry = noteHistory[i];
        if (entry.note === note && entry.endMs === 0) {
          entry.endMs = nowMs;
          break;
        }
      }
    });
    pedalSustainedNotes.clear();
  }

  scheduleMidiSnapshot();
}

function sendMidiEvent(payload) {
  if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return;
  ws.send(JSON.stringify({
    type: 'midi_event',
    event: payload.event,
    note: payload.note,
    velocity: payload.velocity,
    controller: payload.controller,
    value: payload.value,
    channel: payload.channel,
    timestampMs: payload.timestampMs
  }));
}

function scheduleMidiSnapshot() {
  if (midiSnapshotTimer) clearTimeout(midiSnapshotTimer);
  midiSnapshotTimer = setTimeout(function() {
    sendMidiSnapshot(false);
  }, 250);
}

function sendMidiSnapshot(force) {
  if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return;
  var nowMs = Date.now();

  var activePayload = Array.from(activeNotes.values()).map(function(note) {
    return { note: note.note, velocity: note.velocity };
  });
  var recentPayload = recentMidiNotes
    .filter(function(note) { return nowMs - note.timestampMs < 2500; })
    .slice(-8)
    .map(function(note) { return { note: note.note, velocity: note.velocity }; });

  var hasPerformanceSignal = activePayload.length > 0 || recentPayload.length > 0 || pedalDown;
  if (!hasPerformanceSignal) return;
  if (!force && nowMs - lastMidiSnapshotAt < 10000) return;
  lastMidiSnapshotAt = nowMs;

  ws.send(JSON.stringify({
    type: 'midi_snapshot',
    active_notes: activePayload,
    recent_notes: recentPayload,
    detected_techniques: detectTechniques(),
    pedal_down: pedalDown,
    bpm: parseInt(bpmSlider.value, 10) || 90,
    score: currentScore
  }));
}

// ============================================================================
// Session management
// ============================================================================
function toggleSession() {
  if (sessionActive) { stopSession(); return; }
  startSession();
}
async function startSession() {
  sessionActive = true;
  var btn = document.getElementById('btnStart');
  btn.textContent = 'Stop Session';
  btn.className = 'danger';
  setStatus('connecting');

  try {
    mediaStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
      audio: {
        echoCancellation: true,
        noiseSuppression: true,
        autoGainControl: true,
        channelCount: 1
      },
      video: false
    });

    audioCtx = new AudioContext();
    var nativeRate = audioCtx.sampleRate;
    var source = audioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(mediaStream);
    analyser = audioCtx.createAnalyser();
    analyser.fftSize = 2048;
    analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.8;
    source.connect(analyser);
    processor = audioCtx.createScriptProcessor(4096, 1, 1);
    source.connect(processor);
    processor.connect(audioCtx.destination);

    playbackCtx = new AudioContext({ sampleRate: 24000 });
    nextPlayTime = 0;
    var downsampleRatio = nativeRate / 16000;
    processor.onaudioprocess = function(e) {
      if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return;
      if (isBotSpeaking) return;
      if (playbackCtx && playbackCtx.currentTime < playbackActiveUntil) return;
      var f32 = e.inputBuffer.getChannelData(0);
      // Energy gate: skip silent chunks so Gemini detects end-of-speech
      var sum = 0;
      for (var j = 0; j < f32.length; j++) sum += f32[j] * f32[j];
      var rms = Math.sqrt(sum / f32.length);
      if (rms < 0.01) return;
      var outLen = Math.floor(f32.length / downsampleRatio);
      var pcm16 = new Int16Array(outLen);
      for (var i = 0; i < outLen; i++) {
        var srcIdx = Math.floor(i * downsampleRatio);
        pcm16[i] = Math.max(-32768, Math.min(32767, Math.round(f32[srcIdx] * 32767)));
      }
      ws.send(pcm16.buffer);
    };

    function connectWebSocket(isReconnect) {
      var proto = location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss' : 'ws';
      ws = new WebSocket(proto + '://' + location.host + '/ws/session');
      ws.binaryType = 'arraybuffer';

      ws.onopen = function() {
        setStatus('connected');
        reconnectDelay = 1000;
        sessionActive = true;
        if (!isReconnect) {
          sessionStartTime = Date.now();
          resetMidiState();
          currentScore = 0;
        }
        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'set_mode', mode: 'storyteller' }));
        refreshMidiInputs();

        if (!animFrame) {
          drawLoop();
        }
      };

      ws.onmessage = function(event) {
        if (event.data instanceof ArrayBuffer) {
          queueAudio(event.data);
        } else {
          var msg = JSON.parse(event.data);
          if (msg.type === 'story_scene' || msg.type === 'achievement' ||
                     msg.type === 'coaching_focus' || msg.type === 'quest_advance' ||
                     msg.type === 'technique_report') {
            handleToolEvent(msg);
          } else if (msg.type === 'video_frame') {
            var camImg = document.getElementById('remoteCameraImg');
            var camWrap = document.getElementById('remoteCameraWrap');
            if (camImg && msg.data) {
              camImg.onload = function() { runDesktopHandDetection(camImg); };
              camImg.src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' + msg.data;
              if (camWrap) camWrap.style.display = '';
              // Track frame freshness for stale detection
              lastFrameTime = Date.now();
              if (cameraStaleTimer) clearInterval(cameraStaleTimer);
              cameraStaleTimer = setInterval(function() {
                if (Date.now() - lastFrameTime > 5000 && cameraEnabled) {
                  mpBadge('Camera: FROZEN');
                  var badge = document.getElementById('cameraBadge');
                  if (badge) { badge.className = 'camera-badge warn'; }
                  var refreshBtn = document.getElementById('refreshCameraBtn');
                  if (refreshBtn) refreshBtn.style.display = '';
                }
              }, 3000);
              // Hide refresh button when frames are flowing
              var refreshBtn = document.getElementById('refreshCameraBtn');
              if (refreshBtn) refreshBtn.style.display = 'none';
            }
          } else if (msg.type === 'camera_state') {
            cameraEnabled = Boolean(msg.enabled);
            updateCameraUi();
          } else if (msg.type === 'you_are_primary') {
            isPrimaryDevice = true;
            myDeviceId = msg.deviceId;
            myRoomCode = msg.room;
            document.getElementById('deviceManagerPanel').style.display = '';
            document.getElementById('roomCodeDisplay').textContent = msg.room;
            updateQr(msg.room);
            startSpeechRecognition();
            // Send initial session settings so spectators/bridge get them immediately
            sendSessionSettings();
          } else if (msg.type === 'room_code') {
            myRoomCode = msg.room;
            var label = document.getElementById('statusLabel');
            if (label) label.textContent = 'Connected · Room: ' + msg.room;
          } else if (msg.type === 'session_settings') {
            // Remote settings update (e.g. from admin spectator on jayismocking.com/live)
            if (msg.scale) {
              var scaleEl = document.getElementById('staffScale');
              if (scaleEl) scaleEl.value = msg.scale;
            }
            if (msg.bpm) {
              var bpmEl = document.getElementById('bpmSlider');
              var bpmValEl = document.getElementById('bpmVal');
              if (bpmEl) bpmEl.value = String(msg.bpm);
              if (bpmValEl) bpmValEl.textContent = String(msg.bpm);
            }
            if (msg.timeSignature) {
              var tsEl = document.getElementById('staffTimeSig');
              if (tsEl) tsEl.value = msg.timeSignature;
            }
          } else if (msg.type === 'device_list') {
            deviceList = msg.devices || [];
            renderDeviceList();
          } else if (msg.type === 'role_assigned') {
            myRoles = msg.roles;
          } else if (msg.type === 'turn_complete' || msg.type === 'interrupted') {
            // Gemini finished speaking — re-enable mic
            isBotSpeaking = false;
            lastBotSpeakEnd = Date.now();
            var labelEl = document.getElementById('geminiSpeakLabel');
            var fillEl = document.getElementById('geminiVolFill');
            if (labelEl) labelEl.textContent = 'Silent';
            if (fillEl) fillEl.style.width = '0%';
          } else if (msg.type === 'input_transcript') {
            if (msg.text) addMessage(msg.text, 'input');
          } else if (msg.type === 'output_transcript') {
            if (msg.text) addMessage(msg.text, 'output');
          } else if (msg.type === 'midi') {
            // Remote MIDI from Ubuntu bridge — feed into existing visualization
            var nowMs = msg.timestampMs || Date.now();
            if (msg.event === 'noteOn' && msg.velocity > 0) {
              handleNoteOn(msg.note, msg.velocity, nowMs);
            } else if (msg.event === 'noteOff' || (msg.event === 'noteOn' && msg.velocity === 0)) {
              handleNoteOff(msg.note, nowMs);
            } else if (msg.event === 'controlChange') {
              handleControlChange(msg.controller || msg.note, msg.value || msg.velocity, nowMs);
            }
            updateMidiStatus('MIDI (remote bridge)');
          }
        }
      };

      ws.onclose = function() {
        setStatus('disconnected');
        if (sessionActive) {
          setTimeout(function() {
            if (!sessionActive) return;
            reconnectDelay = Math.min(reconnectDelay * 2, 30000);
            connectWebSocket(true);
          }, reconnectDelay);
        }
      };

      ws.onerror = function() { setStatus('error'); };
    }

    connectWebSocket(false);

  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Failed to start session:', err);
    setStatus('error');
    resetStartButton();
  }
}

function resetStartButton() {
  sessionActive = false;
  var btn = document.getElementById('btnStart');
  btn.textContent = 'Start Session';
  btn.className = 'primary';
}

// ============================================================================
// Web Speech API — browser-side speech-to-text for user transcript
// ============================================================================
var speechRecognition = null;

function startSpeechRecognition() {
  var SpeechRec = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
  if (!SpeechRec) { console.log('SpeechRecognition not supported'); return; }
  speechRecognition = new SpeechRec();
  speechRecognition.lang = 'en-US';
  speechRecognition.continuous = true;
  speechRecognition.interimResults = false;
  speechRecognition.onresult = function(e) {
    if (isBotSpeaking) return; // Don't transcribe Gemini's own voice
    // Also ignore results that arrived shortly after bot stopped speaking (echo tail)
    if (typeof lastBotSpeakEnd === 'number' && Date.now() - lastBotSpeakEnd < 1500) return;
    for (var i = e.resultIndex; i < e.results.length; i++) {
      if (e.results[i].isFinal) {
        var text = e.results[i][0].transcript.trim();
        if (text && ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
          ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'user_speech_transcript', text: text }));
        }
      }
    }
  };
  speechRecognition.onend = function() {
    // Auto-restart — Chrome and Safari can stop unexpectedly
    if (sessionActive && speechRecognition) {
      try { speechRecognition.start(); } catch(e) {}
    }
  };
