  { id:'4-3', stage:4, name:'Minor Scale', desc:'Natural minor scale, one octave.', settings:['bpm','measures','key'] },
  { id:'4-4', stage:4, name:'Arpeggio', desc:'Root-3rd-5th-octave pattern. Smooth hand position shifts.', settings:['bpm','measures','key'] },
  { id:'4-5', stage:4, name:'Chromatic Scale', desc:'All 12 semitones ascending and descending.', settings:['note','bpm','measures'] },
  // Stage 5: Chords & Voicing
  { id:'5-1', stage:5, name:'Block Chords', desc:'Play 3-note chords simultaneously. Even attack across all fingers.', settings:['bpm','measures','key'] },
  { id:'5-2', stage:5, name:'Broken Chords', desc:'Arpeggiate chords note by note. Smooth and even.', settings:['bpm','measures','key'] },
  { id:'5-3', stage:5, name:'Chord Progressions', desc:'I-IV-V-I progression. Smooth voice leading between chords.', settings:['bpm','measures','key'] },
  // Stage 6: Advanced Technique
  { id:'6-1', stage:6, name:'Octaves', desc:'Play octave intervals (1-5 fingering). Wrist relaxation is key.', settings:['note','bpm','measures'] },
  { id:'6-2', stage:6, name:'Repeated Notes', desc:'Same note repeated rapidly with finger substitution (3-2-1).', settings:['note','bpm','measures'] },
  { id:'6-3', stage:6, name:'Double Thirds', desc:'Parallel thirds moving stepwise. Finger independence challenge.', settings:['note','bpm','measures','key'] },
  { id:'6-4', stage:6, name:'Hand Independence', desc:'Right hand melody over left hand steady pulse.', settings:['bpm','measures','key'] },
  // Stage 7: Musical Application
  { id:'7-1', stage:7, name:'Sight Reading', desc:'Random melodic patterns. Read and play in real time.', settings:['bpm','measures','key'] },
  { id:'7-2', stage:7, name:'Rhythm Patterns', desc:'Mixed note values: quarters, eighths, dotted rhythms.', settings:['bpm','measures'] },
  { id:'7-3', stage:7, name:'Expression', desc:'Play a phrase with dynamics, rubato feel. Gemini evaluates musicality.', settings:['note','bpm','measures'] }
];

var STAGE_NAMES = {
  1: 'STAGE 1: SINGLE FINGER',
  2: 'STAGE 2: TWO FINGERS',
  3: 'STAGE 3: FIVE-FINGER PATTERNS',
  4: 'STAGE 4: SCALES & ARPEGGIOS',
  5: 'STAGE 5: CHORDS & VOICING',
  6: 'STAGE 6: ADVANCED TECHNIQUE',
  7: 'STAGE 7: MUSICAL APPLICATION'
};

var selectedStage = 1;

// Build drill catalog UI — filtered by selected stage
function buildDrillCatalog() {
  var container = document.getElementById('drillCatalogList');
  if (!container) return;
  container.innerHTML = '';
  DRILL_CATALOG.forEach(function(d) {
    if (d.stage !== selectedStage) return;
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'drill-card';
    card.id = 'drill-' + d.id;
    card.onclick = function() { selectDrill(d.id); };
    card.innerHTML = '<div class="drill-id">' + d.id + '</div>' +
      '<div class="drill-name">' + d.name + '</div>' +
      '<div class="drill-desc">' + d.desc + '</div>';
    container.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function selectStage(stageNum) {
  selectedStage = stageNum;
  var tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.stage-tab');
  tabs.forEach(function(t, i) {
    if (i + 1 === stageNum) t.classList.add('active');
    else t.classList.remove('active');
  });
  // Hide settings when switching stages
  document.getElementById('drillSettings').style.display = 'none';
  buildDrillCatalog();
}

function switchRightTab(tab) {
  var tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.right-tab');
  var contents = document.querySelectorAll('.right-tab-content');
  tabs.forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
  contents.forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('active'); });
  var stageTabs = document.getElementById('stageTabs');
  if (tab === 'drills') {
    tabs[0].classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('drillsTab').classList.add('active');
    if (stageTabs) stageTabs.style.display = '';
  } else {
    tabs[1].classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('scoresTab').classList.add('active');
    if (stageTabs) stageTabs.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

function selectDrill(drillId) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.drill-card').forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('active'); });
  var card = document.getElementById('drill-' + drillId);
  if (card) card.classList.add('active');
  activeDrill = drillId;

  var drill = DRILL_CATALOG.find(function(d) { return d.id === drillId; });
  if (!drill) return;

  var settings = document.getElementById('drillSettings');
  settings.style.display = '';

  // Show/hide controls based on drill settings
  var dynLabel = document.getElementById('drillDynamicLabel');
  dynLabel.style.display = drill.settings.indexOf('dynamic') >= 0 ? '' : 'none';
  var keyLabel = document.getElementById('drillKeyLabel');
  keyLabel.style.display = drill.settings.indexOf('key') >= 0 ? '' : 'none';
  var noteLabel = document.getElementById('drillNote').parentElement;
  noteLabel.style.display = drill.settings.indexOf('note') >= 0 ? '' : 'none';

  document.getElementById('drillResult').style.display = 'none';
  var btn = document.getElementById('drillStartBtn');
  btn.textContent = drillRunning ? 'Stop Drill' : 'Start Drill';
}

// ---- Note generators for each drill type ----

function generateDrillNotes(drillId, root, bpm, measures, beatsPerMeasure, targetVel, key) {
  var notes = [];
  var msPerBeat = 60000 / bpm;
  var startMs = Date.now() + 2000;
  var totalBeats = measures * beatsPerMeasure;
  var keyRoot = KEY_ROOTS[key] || 60;
  var scale = SCALES[key] || SCALES.C;

  function scaleNote(degree) {
    var octave = Math.floor(degree / scale.length);
    var idx = ((degree % scale.length) + scale.length) % scale.length;
    return keyRoot + octave * 12 + scale[idx];
  }

  function pushNote(beat, midi, dur, vel) {
    notes.push({ midi: midi, arriveMs: startMs + beat * msPerBeat, durationBeats: dur, velocity: vel || 64, hit: false });
  }

  switch (drillId) {
    case '1-1': // Tempo — single note on every beat
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '1-2': // Strength — single note at target velocity
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 0.5, targetVel);
      break;

    case '1-3': // Staccato — short notes (0.25 beat duration)
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 0.25, 64);
      break;

    case '1-4': // Legato Hold — long notes (full beat)
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 1.0, 64);
      break;

    case '1-5': // Dynamics Ramp — pp to ff crescendo
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var vel = Math.round(30 + (b / Math.max(1, totalBeats - 1)) * 90);
        pushNote(b, root, 0.5, vel);
      }
      break;

    case '2-1': // Alternating — two adjacent notes
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, b % 2 === 0 ? root : root + 2, 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '2-2': // Trill — rapid alternation (eighth notes)
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats * 2; b++) pushNote(b * 0.5, b % 2 === 0 ? root : root + 2, 0.25, 64);
      break;

    case '2-3': // Legato Connect — pairs of connected notes
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b += 2) {
        pushNote(b, root, 1.0, 64);
        if (b + 1 < totalBeats) pushNote(b + 1, root + 2, 1.0, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '3-1': // Five-Finger Scale — up then down
      var fiveUp = [0, 2, 4, 5, 7];
      var fivePattern = fiveUp.concat(fiveUp.slice(0, 4).reverse());
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var idx = b % fivePattern.length;
        pushNote(b, root + fivePattern[idx], 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '3-2': // Finger Independence — random within 5-note position
      var fiveNotes = [root, root+2, root+4, root+5, root+7];
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        pushNote(b, fiveNotes[Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)], 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '3-3': // Thumb Under — ascending with crossover pattern
      var thumbPattern = [0, 2, 4, 5, 7, 9, 11, 12];
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        pushNote(b, root + thumbPattern[b % thumbPattern.length], 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '4-1': // Major Scale 1 octave — up then down
      var upDown = [];
      for (var i = 0; i <= scale.length; i++) upDown.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var i = scale.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) upDown.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, upDown[b % upDown.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '4-2': // Major Scale 2 octaves
      var upDown2 = [];
      for (var i = 0; i <= scale.length * 2; i++) upDown2.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var i = scale.length * 2 - 1; i >= 0; i--) upDown2.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, upDown2[b % upDown2.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '4-3': // Minor scale — uses key's minor scale
      var minUp = [];
      for (var i = 0; i <= scale.length; i++) minUp.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var i = scale.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) minUp.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, minUp[b % minUp.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '4-4': // Arpeggio — root, 3rd, 5th, octave
      var arp = [scaleNote(0), scaleNote(2), scaleNote(4), scaleNote(7),
                 scaleNote(4), scaleNote(2)];
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, arp[b % arp.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '4-5': // Chromatic — all 12 semitones
      var chrom = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < 13; i++) chrom.push(root + i);
      for (var i = 11; i >= 0; i--) chrom.push(root + i);
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, chrom[b % chrom.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '5-1': // Block Chords — triads on each beat
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var deg = b % 4; // I, IV, V, I
        var chordRoot = [0, 3, 4, 0][deg];
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(chordRoot), 1.0, 64);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(chordRoot + 2), 1.0, 64);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(chordRoot + 4), 1.0, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '5-2': // Broken Chords — arpeggiated triads
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b += 3) {
        var deg = Math.floor(b / 3) % 4;
        var cr = [0, 3, 4, 0][deg];
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(cr), 0.5, 64);
        if (b+1 < totalBeats) pushNote(b+1, scaleNote(cr+2), 0.5, 64);
        if (b+2 < totalBeats) pushNote(b+2, scaleNote(cr+4), 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '5-3': // Chord Progressions — I-IV-V-I, one chord per measure
      for (var m = 0; m < measures; m++) {
        var deg = [0, 3, 4, 0][m % 4];
        for (var beat = 0; beat < beatsPerMeasure; beat++) {
          var b = m * beatsPerMeasure + beat;
          if (beat === 0) {
            pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg), beatsPerMeasure, 64);
            pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg+2), beatsPerMeasure, 64);
            pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg+4), beatsPerMeasure, 64);
          }
        }
      }
      break;

    case '6-1': // Octaves — root + octave above
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        pushNote(b, root, 0.5, 64);
        pushNote(b, root + 12, 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '6-2': // Repeated Notes — same note with finger substitution (triplets)
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats * 3; b++) {
        pushNote(b / 3, root, 0.17, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '6-3': // Double Thirds — parallel thirds moving stepwise
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var deg = b % (scale.length + 1);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg), 0.5, 64);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg + 2), 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '6-4': // Hand Independence — RH melody over LH steady pulse
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        // LH: root on every beat (low octave)
        pushNote(b, keyRoot - 12, 0.5, 48);
        // RH: scale melody
        if (b % 2 === 0) pushNote(b, scaleNote(b % 8), 0.5, 72);
      }
      break;

    case '7-1': // Sight Reading — random scale notes
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var deg = Math.floor(Math.random() * 8);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg), 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '7-2': // Rhythm Patterns — mixed note values
      var rhythms = [1, 0.5, 0.5, 1, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5]; // pattern in beats
      var pos = 0;
      for (var i = 0; pos < totalBeats; i++) {
        var dur = rhythms[i % rhythms.length];
        pushNote(pos, root + [0,2,4,5,7,4,2,0][i % 8], dur * 0.9, 64);
        pos += dur;
      }
      break;

    case '7-3': // Expression — phrase with dynamics
      var phrase = [0, 2, 4, 7, 4, 2, 0, -1];
      var dynCurve = [48, 56, 72, 96, 80, 64, 48, 40];
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var idx = b % phrase.length;
        pushNote(b, root + phrase[idx], 0.75, dynCurve[idx]);
      }
      break;

    default:
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 0.5, 64);
  }
  return notes;
}

function startDrill() {
  if (drillRunning) { stopDrill(); return; }
  if (!activeDrill) return;

  var drill = DRILL_CATALOG.find(function(d) { return d.id === activeDrill; });
  if (!drill) return;

  var root = parseInt(document.getElementById('drillNote').value);
  var bpm = parseInt(document.getElementById('drillBpm').value) || 80;
  var measures = parseInt(document.getElementById('drillMeasures').value) || 8;
  var timeSigParts = (document.getElementById('staffTimeSig').value || '4/4').split('/');
  var beatsPerMeasure = parseInt(timeSigParts[0]) || 4;
  var targetVel = drill.settings.indexOf('dynamic') >= 0 ? parseInt(document.getElementById('drillDynamic').value) : null;
  var key = drill.settings.indexOf('key') >= 0 ? document.getElementById('drillKey').value : 'C';

  // Sync BPM slider
  document.getElementById('bpmSlider').value = bpm;
  document.getElementById('bpmVal').textContent = bpm;

  // Generate target notes
  targetNotes.length = 0;
  var generated = generateDrillNotes(activeDrill, root, bpm, measures, beatsPerMeasure, targetVel || 64, key);
  generated.forEach(function(n) { targetNotes.push(n); });

  drillRunning = true;
  drillStartTime = Date.now();
  drillHits = [];
  drillMisses = 0;

  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').textContent = 'Stop Drill';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.borderColor = 'var(--red, #f66)';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.color = 'var(--red, #f66)';
  document.getElementById('drillResult').style.display = 'none';

  // Auto-stop when drill ends
  var drillDuration = (generated.length > 0 ? generated[generated.length - 1].arriveMs - Date.now() + 3000 : 5000);
  setTimeout(function() { if (drillRunning && activeDrill === drill.id) finishDrill(); }, drillDuration);

  // Notify Gemini
  if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    var camNote = cameraEnabled ? ' Camera is active — watch my hand technique.' : '';
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'text', content: 'Starting drill ' + drill.id + ': ' + drill.name + ' (' + drill.desc + ').' + camNote }));
  }
}

function stopDrill() {
  drillRunning = false;
  targetNotes.length = 0;
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').textContent = 'Start Drill';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.borderColor = '';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.color = '';
}

function finishDrill() {
  if (!drillRunning) return;
  var result = evaluateDrill();
  stopDrill();
  showDrillResult(result);

  // Send result to Gemini for coaching
  if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'text', content:
      'Drill ' + result.drillId + ' finished. Grade: ' + result.grade +
      '. Accuracy: ' + result.accuracy + '%. Timing avg error: ' + result.avgTimingError + 'ms.' +
      ' Velocity avg error: ' + result.avgVelocityError +
      '. Please give brief coaching feedback.'
    }));
  }
}

function evaluateDrill() {
  var total = targetNotes.length;
  var hits = targetNotes.filter(function(n) { return n.hit; }).length;
  var accuracy = total > 0 ? Math.round(hits / total * 100) : 0;

  // Timing errors (how far off from target time)
  var timingErrors = [];
  var velErrors = [];
  targetNotes.forEach(function(n) {
    if (n.hit && n.hitTime) {
      timingErrors.push(Math.abs(n.hitTime - n.arriveMs));
    }
    if (n.hit && n.hitVelocity !== undefined) {
      velErrors.push(Math.abs(n.hitVelocity - n.velocity));
    }
  });

  var avgTiming = timingErrors.length > 0 ? Math.round(timingErrors.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0) / timingErrors.length) : 0;
  var avgVel = velErrors.length > 0 ? Math.round(velErrors.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0) / velErrors.length) : 0;

  var grade = gradeDrill(accuracy, avgTiming, avgVel);

  return {
    drillId: activeDrill,
    accuracy: accuracy,
    hits: hits,
    total: total,
    avgTimingError: avgTiming,
    avgVelocityError: avgVel,
    grade: grade,
    medal: grade === 'gold' ? '🏆' : grade === 'silver' ? '🥈' : grade === 'bronze' ? '🥉' : '🔄'
  };
}

function gradeDrill(accuracy, avgTiming, avgVel) {
  if (accuracy >= 90 && avgTiming < 80) return 'gold';
  if (accuracy >= 75 && avgTiming < 120) return 'silver';
  if (accuracy >= 50 && avgTiming < 200) return 'bronze';
  return 'retry';
}

function showDrillResult(result) {
  var el = document.getElementById('drillResult');
  if (!el) return;
  el.style.display = '';
  el.innerHTML = '<div class="drill-result-bar">' +
    '<span class="drill-medal">' + result.medal + '</span>' +
    '<span class="drill-score">' + result.grade.toUpperCase() + '</span>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div class="drill-metrics">' +
    'Accuracy: ' + result.accuracy + '% (' + result.hits + '/' + result.total + ')<br>' +
    'Timing: ±' + result.avgTimingError + 'ms<br>' +
    'Velocity: ±' + result.avgVelocityError +
    '</div>';
}

// Build the catalog on load
setTimeout(buildDrillCatalog, 100);

// ============================================================================
// On Demand Analysis — Record a passage, then send to Gemini for deep analysis
// ============================================================================
var recordMode = false;
var recordBuffer = { midi: [], startTime: 0 };

function toggleRecordMode() {
  var btn = document.getElementById('recordBtn');
  var status = document.getElementById('recordStatus');
  if (!recordMode) {
    // Start recording
    recordMode = true;
    recordBuffer = { midi: [], startTime: Date.now() };
    btn.textContent = 'Analyze';
    btn.style.borderColor = 'var(--red, #f66)';
    btn.style.color = 'var(--red, #f66)';
    status.style.display = '';
  } else {
    // Stop and analyze
    recordMode = false;
    btn.textContent = 'Record';
    btn.style.borderColor = '';
    btn.style.color = '';
    status.style.display = 'none';
    analyzeRecordedPassage();
  }
}

function recordMidiEvent(note, velocity, timestampMs, isNoteOn) {
  if (!recordMode) return;
  recordBuffer.midi.push({
    note: note, velocity: velocity, time: timestampMs - recordBuffer.startTime,
    type: isNoteOn ? 'on' : 'off'
  });
}

function analyzeRecordedPassage() {
  var buf = recordBuffer;
  if (buf.midi.length === 0) return;

  var durationMs = buf.midi[buf.midi.length - 1].time;
  var noteOns = buf.midi.filter(function(e) { return e.type === 'on' && e.velocity > 0; });
  if (noteOns.length < 2) return;

  // Compute IOI (inter-onset intervals)
  var iois = [];
  for (var i = 1; i < noteOns.length; i++) {
    iois.push(noteOns[i].time - noteOns[i-1].time);
  }
  var avgIoi = iois.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0) / iois.length;
  var ioiVariance = iois.reduce(function(a,b){return a+(b-avgIoi)*(b-avgIoi);},0) / iois.length;
  var ioiStdDev = Math.sqrt(ioiVariance);

  // Velocity stats
  var vels = noteOns.map(function(e){return e.velocity;});
  var avgVel = vels.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0) / vels.length;
  var velMin = Math.min.apply(null, vels);
  var velMax = Math.max.apply(null, vels);
  var velStdDev = Math.sqrt(vels.reduce(function(a,b){return a+(b-avgVel)*(b-avgVel);},0)/vels.length);

  // Implied BPM
  var impliedBpm = avgIoi > 0 ? Math.round(60000 / avgIoi) : 0;

  // Build analysis summary for Gemini
  var summary = 'ON DEMAND PASSAGE ANALYSIS — ' + noteOns.length + ' notes over ' +
    Math.round(durationMs/1000) + 's.\n' +
    'TEMPO: avg IOI=' + Math.round(avgIoi) + 'ms (implied ~' + impliedBpm + ' BPM), ' +
    'IOI stddev=' + Math.round(ioiStdDev) + 'ms (' + Math.round(ioiStdDev/avgIoi*100) + '% variation).\n' +
    'DYNAMICS: avg velocity=' + Math.round(avgVel) + ', range=' + velMin + '-' + velMax +
    ', stddev=' + Math.round(velStdDev) + '.\n' +
    'RAW NOTE DATA (time_ms, note, velocity):\n';

  // Include note data (truncate if too long)
  var maxNotes = Math.min(noteOns.length, 60);
  for (var i = 0; i < maxNotes; i++) {
    var n = noteOns[i];
    summary += n.time + ',' + n.note + ',' + n.velocity + '\n';
  }
  if (noteOns.length > maxNotes) summary += '... (' + (noteOns.length - maxNotes) + ' more notes)\n';
  summary += '\nAnalyze this passage. Focus on tempo uniformity and velocity habits. Be specific with numbers.';

  if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'text', content: summary }));
  }

  // Show in chat
  var chatArea = document.getElementById('chatArea');
  if (chatArea) {
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'system-msg';
    div.style.fontSize = '10px';
    div.style.color = 'var(--text3)';
    div.textContent = 'Sent ' + noteOns.length + ' notes for analysis (' + Math.round(durationMs/1000) + 's passage)';
    chatArea.appendChild(div);
    chatArea.scrollTop = chatArea.scrollHeight;
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// Panel resize handles (grid columns: leftCol | handle | center | handle | scoreCol)
// ============================================================================
(function() {
  var main = document.querySelector('.main');
  var leftCol = document.getElementById('leftCol');
  var scoreCol = document.getElementById('scoreCol');
  var leftHandle = document.getElementById('leftResizeHandle');
  var scoreHandle = document.getElementById('scoreResizeHandle');
  if (!main) return;

  var activeHandle = null;
  var handleSide = null; // 'left' or 'right'

  function startDrag(handle, side) {
    return function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      activeHandle = handle;
      handleSide = side;
      handle.classList.add('dragging');
      document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
      document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
    };
  }

  if (leftHandle) leftHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrag(leftHandle, 'left'));
  if (scoreHandle) scoreHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrag(scoreHandle, 'right'));

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    if (!activeHandle) return;
    // Account for CSS zoom on .main
    var zoom = parseFloat(main.style.zoom) || 1;
    var mainRect = main.getBoundingClientRect();
    // getBoundingClientRect returns zoomed coords, so divide by zoom to get CSS px
    var leftW = leftCol ? leftCol.getBoundingClientRect().width / zoom : 260;
    var scoreW = scoreCol ? scoreCol.getBoundingClientRect().width / zoom : 560;
    var mainLeft = mainRect.left / zoom;
    var mainRight = mainRect.right / zoom;
    var mainWidth = mainRect.width / zoom;
    var mouseX = e.clientX / zoom;

    if (handleSide === 'left') {
      leftW = mouseX - mainLeft;
      leftW = Math.max(140, Math.min(leftW, mainWidth * 0.4));
    } else {
      scoreW = mainRight - mouseX;
      scoreW = Math.max(200, Math.min(scoreW, mainWidth * 0.5));
    }

    main.style.gridTemplateColumns = Math.round(leftW) + 'px 6px 1fr 6px ' + Math.round(scoreW) + 'px';
  });

  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function() {
    if (!activeHandle) return;
    activeHandle.classList.remove('dragging');
    activeHandle = null;
    handleSide = null;
    document.body.style.cursor = '';
    document.body.style.userSelect = '';
  });
})();

function setStatus(state) {
  var dot = document.getElementById('statusDot');
  var label = document.getElementById('statusLabel');
  dot.className = 'status-dot';
  if (state === 'connected') { dot.classList.add('connected'); label.textContent = 'Connected'; }
  else if (state === 'connecting') { label.textContent = 'Connecting...'; }
  else if (state === 'error') { dot.classList.add('error'); label.textContent = 'Error'; }
  else { label.textContent = 'Disconnected'; }
}

  var panel = document.getElementById('techniquePanel');
  var entries = document.getElementById('techniqueEntries');

  // MediaPipe status takes priority — it runs on desktop regardless of camera

function refreshCamera() {
  // Send a message to the phone to restart its camera
  if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    // Tell the phone to toggle camera off then on
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'refresh_camera' }));
  }
  // Reset stale state on desktop
  lastFrameTime = Date.now();
  var badge = document.getElementById('cameraBadge');
  if (badge) { badge.className = 'camera-badge warn'; badge.textContent = 'Refreshing...'; }
  var refreshBtn = document.getElementById('refreshCameraBtn');
  if (refreshBtn) refreshBtn.style.display = 'none';
}

// ============================================================================
// Desktop MediaPipe — runs hand detection on received camera frames
// ============================================================================
var desktopHandLandmarker = null;
var desktopLastHandCount = -1;
var HAND_CONNECTIONS = [
  [0,1],[1,2],[2,3],[3,4],
  [0,5],[5,6],[6,7],[7,8],
  [5,9],[9,10],[10,11],[11,12],
  [9,13],[13,14],[14,15],[15,16],
  [13,17],[17,18],[18,19],[19,20],
  [0,17]
];
var FINGERTIP_INDICES = [4,8,12,16,20];
var FINGER_NAMES = ['thumb', 'index', 'middle', 'ring', 'pinky'];
var FINGER_MCP = [2, 5, 9, 13, 17];

function mpBadge(text) {
  var b = document.getElementById('cameraBadge');
  if (b) b.textContent = text;
}

function initDesktopMediaPipe() {
  mpBadge('MediaPipe: loading...');
  import('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision/vision_bundle.min.js').then(function(mod) {
    window.FilesetResolver = mod.FilesetResolver;
    window.HandLandmarker = mod.HandLandmarker;
    if (!window.FilesetResolver || !window.HandLandmarker) {
      mpBadge('MediaPipe: exports missing');
      console.log('MediaPipe module keys:', Object.keys(mod).slice(0, 20));
      return;
    }
    _initMediaPipeModel();
  }).catch(function(err) {
    mpBadge('MediaPipe: LOAD FAILED');
    console.log('MediaPipe import error:', err);
  });
}

function _initMediaPipeModel() {
  mpBadge('MediaPipe: loading WASM...');
  FilesetResolver.forVisionTasks(
    'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision/wasm'
  ).then(function(fileset) {
    mpBadge('MediaPipe: loading model...');
    return HandLandmarker.createFromOptions(fileset, {
      baseOptions: {
        modelAssetPath: 'https://storage.googleapis.com/mediapipe-models/hand_landmarker/hand_landmarker/float16/1/hand_landmarker.task',
        delegate: 'GPU'
      },
      runningMode: 'IMAGE',
      numHands: 2
    });
  }).then(function(landmarker) {
    desktopHandLandmarker = landmarker;
    mediapipeActive = true;
    mpBadge('MediaPipe: ON (GPU)');
    var b = document.getElementById('cameraBadge');
    if (b) { b.className = 'camera-badge ready'; }
    console.log('Desktop HandLandmarker ready (GPU)');
  }).catch(function(err) {
    mpBadge('MediaPipe: GPU failed, trying CPU...');
    console.log('Desktop HandLandmarker GPU failed, trying CPU:', err);
    FilesetResolver.forVisionTasks(
      'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision/wasm'
    ).then(function(fileset) {
      return HandLandmarker.createFromOptions(fileset, {
        baseOptions: {
          modelAssetPath: 'https://storage.googleapis.com/mediapipe-models/hand_landmarker/hand_landmarker/float16/1/hand_landmarker.task',
          delegate: 'CPU'
        },
        runningMode: 'IMAGE',
        numHands: 2
      });
    }).then(function(landmarker) {
      desktopHandLandmarker = landmarker;
      mediapipeActive = true;
      mpBadge('MediaPipe: ON (CPU)');
      var b = document.getElementById('cameraBadge');
      if (b) { b.className = 'camera-badge ready'; }
      console.log('Desktop HandLandmarker ready (CPU)');
    }).catch(function(err2) {
      mpBadge('MediaPipe: FAILED');
      console.log('Desktop HandLandmarker failed completely:', err2);
    });
  });
}
initDesktopMediaPipe();

function analyzeFingerHeights(landmarks) {
  var fingers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    var tip = landmarks[FINGERTIP_INDICES[i]];
    var mcp = landmarks[FINGER_MCP[i]];
    var lift = mcp.y - tip.y;
    fingers.push({ name: FINGER_NAMES[i], lift: Math.round(lift * 1000) / 1000 });
  }
  return fingers;
}

var _mpDetectCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
var _mpDetectCtx = _mpDetectCanvas.getContext('2d');

function runDesktopHandDetection(imgElement) {
  if (!desktopHandLandmarker || !imgElement || !imgElement.naturalWidth) return;
  var overlay = document.getElementById('desktopHandOverlay');
  if (!overlay) return;

  // Draw img to canvas first — avoids cross-origin issues with detect()
  _mpDetectCanvas.width = imgElement.naturalWidth;
  _mpDetectCanvas.height = imgElement.naturalHeight;
  _mpDetectCtx.drawImage(imgElement, 0, 0);

  var results;
  try {
    results = desktopHandLandmarker.detect(_mpDetectCanvas);
  } catch (e) {
    console.log('MediaPipe detect error:', e);
    return;
  }

  // Draw skeleton overlay
  overlay.width = imgElement.naturalWidth;
  overlay.height = imgElement.naturalHeight;
  var ctx = overlay.getContext('2d');
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, overlay.width, overlay.height);

  if (!results.landmarks || results.landmarks.length === 0) {
    var handCount = 0;
    if (handCount !== desktopLastHandCount) {
      desktopLastHandCount = handCount;
      bothHandsDetected = false;
    }
    return;
  }

  var w = overlay.width;
  var h = overlay.height;
  for (var hi = 0; hi < results.landmarks.length; hi++) {
    var lm = results.landmarks[hi];
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    for (var ci = 0; ci < HAND_CONNECTIONS.length; ci++) {
      var a = lm[HAND_CONNECTIONS[ci][0]];
      var b = lm[HAND_CONNECTIONS[ci][1]];
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(a.x * w, a.y * h);
      ctx.lineTo(b.x * w, b.y * h);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    for (var ki = 0; ki < lm.length; ki++) {
      var isFingertip = FINGERTIP_INDICES.indexOf(ki) >= 0;
      var radius = isFingertip ? 5 : 3;
      var color = isFingertip ? '#86efac' : '#60a5fa';
      ctx.fillStyle = color;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(lm[ki].x * w, lm[ki].y * h, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }
  }

  // Update hand state
  var handCount = results.landmarks.length;
  if (handCount !== desktopLastHandCount) {
    desktopLastHandCount = handCount;
    bothHandsDetected = handCount >= 2;
    // Send hand_state to server for Gemini
    var fingerData = [];
    for (var fi = 0; fi < results.landmarks.length; fi++) {
      fingerData.push(analyzeFingerHeights(results.landmarks[fi]));
    }
    if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
      ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'hand_state', hands: handCount, bothHands: bothHandsDetected, fingerHeights: fingerData }));
    }
  }
}

function renderDeviceList() {
  var container = document.getElementById('deviceListItems');
  if (!container) return;
  container.textContent = '';
  var countEl = document.getElementById('deviceCount');
  if (countEl) countEl.textContent = String(deviceList.length);

  deviceList.forEach(function(dev) {
    var item = document.createElement('div');
    item.className = 'device-item';

    var icon = document.createElement('span');
    icon.className = 'device-icon';
    icon.textContent = dev.deviceType === 'desktop' ? '\uD83D\uDCBB' : dev.deviceType === 'tablet' ? '\uD83D\uDCF1' : dev.deviceType === 'phone' ? '\uD83D\uDCF7' : '\uD83D\uDD32';
    item.appendChild(icon);

    var nameEl = document.createElement('span');
    nameEl.className = 'device-name';
    nameEl.textContent = dev.name;
    item.appendChild(nameEl);

    var tags = document.createElement('span');
    tags.className = 'device-roles-tags';
    if (dev.roles.mic) { var t = document.createElement('span'); t.className = 'role-tag mic'; t.textContent = 'MIC'; tags.appendChild(t); }
    if (dev.roles.camera) { var t = document.createElement('span'); t.className = 'role-tag cam'; t.textContent = 'CAM'; tags.appendChild(t); }
    if (dev.roles.midi) { var t = document.createElement('span'); t.className = 'role-tag midi'; t.textContent = 'MIDI'; tags.appendChild(t); }
    item.appendChild(tags);

    container.appendChild(item);
  });
}

function copyRoomLink() {
  if (!myRoomCode) return;
  var url = location.origin + '/?room=' + myRoomCode;
  if (navigator.clipboard) {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(function() {
      var btn = document.querySelector('.room-code-bar .mini-btn');
      if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Copied!'; setTimeout(function() { btn.textContent = 'Copy Link'; }, 1500); }
    });
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// Tablet Device Mode — ?room=CODE&mode=tablet or auto-detected
// ============================================================================
(function() {
  var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  var room = params.get('room');
  if (!room) return;
  if (params.get('spectator') === '1' || params.get('camera') === '1') return;

  // Tablet detection: explicit param or iPad-sized touch screen (min dimension >= 768 excludes phones)
  var isTabletMode = params.get('mode') === 'tablet' ||
    (Math.min(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight) >= 768 && 'ontouchstart' in window);

  if (!isTabletMode) {
    buildSecondaryUI(room, params);
    return;
  }

  // === TABLET MODE ===
  isSecondaryDevice = true;
  myRoomCode = room;

  while (document.body.firstChild) document.body.removeChild(document.body.firstChild);

  var TABLET_PANELS = [
    { key: 'piano', label: 'Piano', defaultOn: true },
    { key: 'chat', label: 'Chat', defaultOn: true },
    { key: 'audio', label: 'Audio', defaultOn: true },
    { key: 'fingers', label: 'Fingers', defaultOn: false },
    { key: 'drills', label: 'Drills', defaultOn: false },
    { key: 'staff', label: 'Staff', defaultOn: false }
  ];

  var savedState = {};
  try { savedState = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('tabletPanelState') || '{}'); } catch(e) {}
  var panelVisible = {};
  TABLET_PANELS.forEach(function(p) {
    panelVisible[p.key] = savedState.hasOwnProperty(p.key) ? savedState[p.key] : p.defaultOn;
  });
  var panelSizes = {};
  try { panelSizes = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('tabletPanelSizes') || '{}'); } catch(e) {}

  function savePanelState() { localStorage.setItem('tabletPanelState', JSON.stringify(panelVisible)); }
  function savePanelSizes() { localStorage.setItem('tabletPanelSizes', JSON.stringify(panelSizes)); }

  // Helper to create panel headers
  function makePanelHeader(dotColor, labelText) {
    var h = document.createElement('div');
    h.className = 'panel-header';
    var dot = document.createElement('div');
    dot.className = 'dot';
    dot.style.background = dotColor;
    h.appendChild(dot);
    h.appendChild(document.createTextNode(labelText));
    return h;
  }

  // Build tablet DOM
  var tabletApp = document.createElement('div');
  tabletApp.className = 'tablet-app';

  // Toolbar
  var toolbar = document.createElement('div');
  toolbar.className = 'tablet-toolbar';

  var pillContainer = document.createElement('div');
  pillContainer.className = 'tablet-pills';
  var pills = {};

  TABLET_PANELS.forEach(function(p) {
    var pill = document.createElement('button');
    pill.className = 'tablet-pill' + (panelVisible[p.key] ? ' active' : '');
    pill.textContent = p.label;
    pill.setAttribute('data-panel', p.key);
    pill.onclick = function() {
      panelVisible[p.key] = !panelVisible[p.key];
      pill.className = 'tablet-pill' + (panelVisible[p.key] ? ' active' : '');
      updateTabletLayout();
      savePanelState();
    };
    pills[p.key] = pill;
    pillContainer.appendChild(pill);
  });
  toolbar.appendChild(pillContainer);

  var toolbarRight = document.createElement('div');
  toolbarRight.className = 'tablet-toolbar-right';
  var roomLabel = document.createElement('span');
  roomLabel.className = 'tablet-room';
  roomLabel.textContent = 'Room: ' + room;
  toolbarRight.appendChild(roomLabel);

  var statusSpan = document.createElement('span');
  statusSpan.className = 'tablet-status';
  statusSpan.id = 'tabletStatus';
  statusSpan.textContent = 'Connecting...';
  toolbarRight.appendChild(statusSpan);

  var speakingIndicator = document.createElement('span');
  speakingIndicator.className = 'tablet-speaking';
  speakingIndicator.id = 'tabletSpeaking';
  speakingIndicator.textContent = '';
  toolbarRight.appendChild(speakingIndicator);

  toolbar.appendChild(toolbarRight);
  tabletApp.appendChild(toolbar);

  // Panel container
  var panelContainer = document.createElement('div');
  panelContainer.className = 'tablet-panels';
  panelContainer.id = 'tabletPanelContainer';

  var panelEls = {};

  // 1. Piano panel
  (function() {
    var panel = document.createElement('div');
    panel.className = 'tablet-panel';
    panel.setAttribute('data-panel', 'piano');

    var midiStack = document.createElement('div');
    midiStack.className = 'midi-stack';
    midiStack.id = 'midiStack';
    midiStack.style.flex = '1';
    midiStack.style.minHeight = '0';

    var rollWrap = document.createElement('div');

    kbWrap.appendChild(kbCanvas);

    // Gemini meter

    gm.className = 'level-meter';
    gm.id = 'geminiSpeaking';
    var gLabel = document.createElement('span');
    gLabel.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);min-width:38px;';
    gLabel.textContent = 'Gemini';

    settings.id = 'drillSettings';
    settings.style.display = 'none';

    var settingsInner = document.createElement('div');
    settingsInner.className = 'drill-settings';

    var noteLabel = document.createElement('label'); noteLabel.textContent = 'Note ';
    var noteSelect = document.createElement('select'); noteSelect.id = 'drillNote';
    [['60','C4'],['62','D4'],['64','E4'],['65','F4'],['67','G4']].forEach(function(n) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = n[0]; opt.textContent = n[1]; noteSelect.appendChild(opt);
    });
    noteLabel.appendChild(noteSelect); settingsInner.appendChild(noteLabel);

    var bpmLabel = document.createElement('label'); bpmLabel.textContent = 'BPM ';
    var bpmInput = document.createElement('input'); bpmInput.type = 'number'; bpmInput.id = 'drillBpm'; bpmInput.value = '80'; bpmInput.min = '40'; bpmInput.max = '200';
    bpmLabel.appendChild(bpmInput); settingsInner.appendChild(bpmLabel);

    var dynLabel = document.createElement('label'); dynLabel.id = 'drillDynamicLabel'; dynLabel.style.display = 'none'; dynLabel.textContent = 'Dynamic ';
    var dynSelect = document.createElement('select'); dynSelect.id = 'drillDynamic';
    [['32','pp'],['64','mp'],['96','f']].forEach(function(d) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = d[0]; opt.textContent = d[1]; dynSelect.appendChild(opt);
    });
    dynLabel.appendChild(dynSelect); settingsInner.appendChild(dynLabel);

    var measLabel = document.createElement('label'); measLabel.textContent = 'Measures ';
    var measInput = document.createElement('input'); measInput.type = 'number'; measInput.id = 'drillMeasures'; measInput.value = '8'; measInput.min = '2'; measInput.max = '32';
    measLabel.appendChild(measInput); settingsInner.appendChild(measLabel);

    settings.appendChild(settingsInner);

    var startBtn = document.createElement('div');
    startBtn.className = 'drill-start-btn';
    startBtn.id = 'drillStartBtn';
    startBtn.textContent = 'Start Drill';
    startBtn.onclick = function() { startDrill(); };
    settings.appendChild(startBtn);

    content.appendChild(settings);
    panel.appendChild(content);
    panelEls.drills = panel;
  })();

  // 6. Grand Staff panel
  (function() {
    var panel = document.createElement('div');
    panel.className = 'tablet-panel';
    panel.setAttribute('data-panel', 'staff');

    var staffWrap = document.createElement('div');
    staffWrap.className = 'staff-wrap';
    staffWrap.id = 'staffWrap';
    staffWrap.style.cssText = 'flex:1;padding:0;background:#050508;overflow:hidden;min-height:0;';
    var staffCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    staffCanvas.id = 'grandStaffCanvas';
    staffWrap.appendChild(staffCanvas);
    panel.appendChild(staffWrap);
    panelEls.staff = panel;
  })();

  TABLET_PANELS.forEach(function(p) { panelContainer.appendChild(panelEls[p.key]); });
  tabletApp.appendChild(panelContainer);
  document.body.appendChild(tabletApp);

  // Hidden elements needed by global functions
  var hc = document.createElement('div');
  hc.style.display = 'none';
  var hiddenEls = [
    { tag: 'select', id: 'midiInputSelect' },
    { tag: 'span', id: 'pedalStatus' },
    { tag: 'span', id: 'midiStatus' },
    { tag: 'span', id: 'statusDot' },
    { tag: 'span', id: 'statusLabel' },
    { tag: 'span', id: 'bpmVal', text: '90' },
    { tag: 'div', id: 'coachingText' },
    { tag: 'div', id: 'deviceManagerPanel' },
    { tag: 'div', id: 'roomCodeDisplay' },
    { tag: 'div', id: 'deviceListItems' },
    { tag: 'span', id: 'deviceCount' }
  ];
  hiddenEls.forEach(function(spec) {
    var el = document.createElement(spec.tag);
    el.id = spec.id;
    if (spec.text) el.textContent = spec.text;
    hc.appendChild(el);
  });
  // bpmSlider needs special attributes
  var bpmSliderEl = document.createElement('input');
  bpmSliderEl.type = 'range'; bpmSliderEl.id = 'bpmSlider';
  bpmSliderEl.min = '40'; bpmSliderEl.max = '300'; bpmSliderEl.value = '90';
  hc.appendChild(bpmSliderEl);
  // staffTimeSig select
  var tsSelect = document.createElement('select'); tsSelect.id = 'staffTimeSig';
  var tsOpt = document.createElement('option'); tsOpt.value = '4/4'; tsOpt.textContent = '4/4';
  tsSelect.appendChild(tsOpt); hc.appendChild(tsSelect);
  // staffScale select
  var scSelect = document.createElement('select'); scSelect.id = 'staffScale';
  var scOpt = document.createElement('option'); scOpt.value = 'C major'; scOpt.textContent = 'C major';
  scSelect.appendChild(scOpt); hc.appendChild(scSelect);
  document.body.appendChild(hc);

  // --- Layout logic ---
  function updateTabletLayout() {
    var isLandscape = window.innerWidth > window.innerHeight;
    panelContainer.className = 'tablet-panels' + (isLandscape ? ' landscape' : '');

    var oldParts = panelContainer.querySelectorAll('.tablet-partition');
    for (var i = 0; i < oldParts.length; i++) oldParts[i].remove();

    var visibleKeys = [];
    TABLET_PANELS.forEach(function(p) {
      var el = panelEls[p.key];
      if (panelVisible[p.key]) {
        el.style.display = 'flex';
        visibleKeys.push(p.key);
        if (panelSizes[p.key]) {
          el.style.flex = '0 0 ' + panelSizes[p.key] + 'px';
        } else {
          el.style.flex = '1 1 0';
        }
      } else {
        el.style.display = 'none';
      }
    });

    for (var v = 0; v < visibleKeys.length - 1; v++) {
      var partition = document.createElement('div');
      partition.className = 'tablet-partition';
      partition.setAttribute('data-before', visibleKeys[v]);
      partition.setAttribute('data-after', visibleKeys[v + 1]);
      setupPartitionDrag(partition, visibleKeys[v], visibleKeys[v + 1]);
      var afterEl = panelEls[visibleKeys[v]];
      afterEl.parentNode.insertBefore(partition, afterEl.nextSibling);
    }

    if (panelVisible.piano) {
      setTimeout(function() { sizeMidiStack(); }, 50);
    }
  }

  function setupPartitionDrag(partition, beforeKey, afterKey) {
    var startPos = 0, startBeforeSize = 0, startAfterSize = 0;

    function getAxis() { return window.innerWidth > window.innerHeight ? 'x' : 'y'; }

    function onStart(pos) {
      var axis = getAxis();
      var beforeEl = panelEls[beforeKey];
      var afterEl = panelEls[afterKey];
      startPos = pos;
      startBeforeSize = axis === 'x' ? beforeEl.offsetWidth : beforeEl.offsetHeight;
      startAfterSize = axis === 'x' ? afterEl.offsetWidth : afterEl.offsetHeight;
      partition.classList.add('dragging');
    }

    function onMove(pos) {
      if (!startPos) return;
      var delta = pos - startPos;
      var newBefore = Math.max(100, startBeforeSize + delta);
      var newAfter = Math.max(100, startAfterSize - delta);
      panelEls[beforeKey].style.flex = '0 0 ' + newBefore + 'px';
      panelEls[afterKey].style.flex = '0 0 ' + newAfter + 'px';
      panelSizes[beforeKey] = newBefore;
      panelSizes[afterKey] = newAfter;
    }

    function onEnd() {
      startPos = 0;
      partition.classList.remove('dragging');
      savePanelSizes();
      if (panelVisible.piano) sizeMidiStack();
    }

    partition.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      var t = e.touches[0];
      onStart(getAxis() === 'x' ? t.clientX : t.clientY);
    }, { passive: false });
    partition.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      var t = e.touches[0];
      onMove(getAxis() === 'x' ? t.clientX : t.clientY);
    }, { passive: false });
    partition.addEventListener('touchend', onEnd);

    partition.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      onStart(getAxis() === 'x' ? e.clientX : e.clientY);
      function mm(ev) { onMove(getAxis() === 'x' ? ev.clientX : ev.clientY); }
      function mu() { onEnd(); document.removeEventListener('mousemove', mm); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', mu); }
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', mm);
      document.addEventListener('mouseup', mu);
    });
  }

  window.addEventListener('resize', function() { updateTabletLayout(); });
  updateTabletLayout();

  // --- WebSocket connection ---
  var tabletPlaybackCtx = null;
  var tabletNextPlayTime = 0;
  var tabletAudioCtx = null;
  var tabletProcessor = null;
  var tabletMediaStream = null;

  var proto = location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss' : 'ws';
  var wsUrl = proto + '://' + location.host + '/ws/session?room=' + encodeURIComponent(room);
  var tabletWs = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
  ws = tabletWs;
  tabletWs.binaryType = 'arraybuffer';

  tabletWs.onopen = function() {
    statusSpan.textContent = 'Connected';
    statusSpan.style.color = 'var(--green)';
    tabletWs.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'request_role', role: 'mic', enabled: true }));
    sessionActive = true;
    if (!animFrame) drawLoop();
  };

  tabletWs.onmessage = function(event) {
    if (event.data instanceof ArrayBuffer) {
      if (!tabletPlaybackCtx) tabletPlaybackCtx = new AudioContext({ sampleRate: 24000 });
      playbackCtx = tabletPlaybackCtx;
      var i16 = new Int16Array(event.data);
      var f32 = new Float32Array(i16.length);
      for (var i = 0; i < i16.length; i++) f32[i] = i16[i] / 32768;
      var buf = tabletPlaybackCtx.createBuffer(1, f32.length, 24000);
      buf.getChannelData(0).set(f32);
      var src = tabletPlaybackCtx.createBufferSource();
      src.buffer = buf;
      src.connect(tabletPlaybackCtx.destination);
      var now = tabletPlaybackCtx.currentTime;
      var startAt = Math.max(now + 0.01, tabletNextPlayTime);
      src.start(startAt);
      tabletNextPlayTime = startAt + buf.duration;

      var rms = 0;
      for (var ri = 0; ri < i16.length; ri++) { var s = i16[ri] / 32768; rms += s * s; }
      rms = Math.sqrt(rms / i16.length);
      isBotSpeaking = true;
      speakingIndicator.textContent = 'Gemini speaking';
      speakingIndicator.style.color = 'var(--green)';
      var fillEl = document.getElementById('geminiVolFill');
      if (fillEl) fillEl.style.width = Math.min(100, rms * 500) + '%';
      var labelEl = document.getElementById('geminiSpeakLabel');
      if (labelEl) labelEl.textContent = 'Speaking';

      src.onended = function() {
        if (tabletPlaybackCtx.currentTime >= startAt + buf.duration - 0.1) {
          // Visual reset only — isBotSpeaking reset by turn_complete/interrupted
          speakingIndicator.textContent = '';
          if (fillEl) fillEl.style.width = '0%';
          if (labelEl) labelEl.textContent = 'Silent';
        }
      };
      return;
    }

    var msg = JSON.parse(event.data);

    if (msg.type === 'you_are_secondary') {
      myDeviceId = msg.deviceId;
      statusSpan.textContent = 'Connected as tablet';
    } else if (msg.type === 'role_assigned') {
      myRoles = msg.roles;
      if (myRoles.mic && !tabletAudioCtx) startTabletMic();
    } else if (msg.type === 'device_list') {
      deviceList = msg.devices || [];
      for (var d = 0; d < deviceList.length; d++) {
        if (deviceList[d].id === myDeviceId) {
          myRoles = deviceList[d].roles;
          if (myRoles.mic && !tabletAudioCtx) startTabletMic();
          break;
        }
      }
    } else if (msg.type === 'input_transcript') {
      if (msg.text) addMessage(msg.text, 'input');
    } else if (msg.type === 'output_transcript') {
      if (msg.text) addMessage(msg.text, 'output');
    } else if (msg.type === 'midi_event' || msg.type === 'midi') {
      var nowMs = msg.timestampMs || Date.now();
      if (msg.event === 'noteOn' && msg.velocity > 0) {
        handleNoteOn(msg.note, msg.velocity, nowMs);
      } else if (msg.event === 'noteOff' || (msg.event === 'noteOn' && msg.velocity === 0)) {
        handleNoteOff(msg.note, nowMs);
      } else if (msg.event === 'controlChange') {
        handleControlChange(msg.controller || msg.note, msg.value || msg.velocity, nowMs);
      }
    } else if (msg.type === 'coaching_focus' || msg.type === 'technique_report' ||
               msg.type === 'story_scene' || msg.type === 'achievement') {
      handleToolEvent(msg);
    } else if (msg.type === 'video_frame') {
      var camImg = document.getElementById('remoteCameraImg');
      var camWrap = document.getElementById('remoteCameraWrap');
      if (camImg && msg.data) {
        camImg.src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' + msg.data;
        if (camWrap) camWrap.style.display = '';
      }
    } else if (msg.type === 'camera_state') {
      cameraEnabled = Boolean(msg.enabled);
      var cbadge = document.getElementById('cameraBadge');
      if (cbadge) {
        cbadge.textContent = cameraEnabled ? 'Camera On' : 'Camera Off';
        cbadge.className = 'camera-badge ' + (cameraEnabled ? 'ready' : 'off');
      }
    } else if (msg.type === 'hand_state') {
      bothHandsDetected = Boolean(msg.bothHands);
    } else if (msg.type === 'turn_complete' || msg.type === 'interrupted') {
      isBotSpeaking = false;
      speakingIndicator.textContent = '';
      var fillEl2 = document.getElementById('geminiVolFill');
      var labelEl2 = document.getElementById('geminiSpeakLabel');
      if (fillEl2) fillEl2.style.width = '0%';
      if (labelEl2) labelEl2.textContent = 'Silent';
    } else if (msg.type === 'room_closed' || msg.type === 'error') {
      statusSpan.textContent = msg.message || 'Disconnected';
      statusSpan.style.color = 'var(--rose)';
    }
  };

  tabletWs.onclose = function() {
    statusSpan.textContent = 'Disconnected';
    statusSpan.style.color = 'var(--rose)';
    sessionActive = false;
  };

  function startTabletMic() {
    navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
      audio: { echoCancellation: true, noiseSuppression: true, autoGainControl: true, channelCount: 1 }
    }).then(function(stream) {
      tabletMediaStream = stream;
      tabletAudioCtx = new AudioContext();
      var nativeRate = tabletAudioCtx.sampleRate;
      var source = tabletAudioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(stream);
      analyser = tabletAudioCtx.createAnalyser();
      analyser.fftSize = 2048;
      analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.8;
      source.connect(analyser);
      tabletProcessor = tabletAudioCtx.createScriptProcessor(4096, 1, 1);
      source.connect(tabletProcessor);
      tabletProcessor.connect(tabletAudioCtx.destination);
      var ratio = nativeRate / 16000;
      tabletProcessor.onaudioprocess = function(e) {
        if (!tabletWs || tabletWs.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN || !myRoles.mic) return;
        if (isBotSpeaking) return;
        var f32arr = e.inputBuffer.getChannelData(0);
        var sum2 = 0;
        for (var j = 0; j < f32arr.length; j++) sum2 += f32arr[j] * f32arr[j];
        if (Math.sqrt(sum2 / f32arr.length) < 0.01) return;
        var outLen = Math.floor(f32arr.length / ratio);
        var pcm16 = new Int16Array(outLen);
        for (var k = 0; k < outLen; k++) {
          var srcIdx = Math.floor(k * ratio);
          pcm16[k] = Math.max(-32768, Math.min(32767, Math.round(f32arr[srcIdx] * 32767)));
        }
        tabletWs.send(pcm16.buffer);
      };
    }).catch(function(err) {
      statusSpan.textContent = 'Mic error: ' + err.message;
    });

    // Speech recognition
    var SpeechRec = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    if (SpeechRec) {
      var sr = new SpeechRec();
      sr.lang = 'en-US'; sr.continuous = true; sr.interimResults = false;
      sr.onresult = function(e) {
        for (var i = e.resultIndex; i < e.results.length; i++) {
          if (e.results[i].isFinal) {
            var text = e.results[i][0].transcript.trim();
            if (text && tabletWs && tabletWs.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
              tabletWs.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'user_speech_transcript', text: text }));
            }
          }
        }
      };
      sr.onend = function() { if (myRoles.mic) try { sr.start(); } catch(e) {} };
      try { sr.start(); } catch(e) {}
    }
  }

  return;
})();

// ============================================================================
// Secondary Device Mode — ?room=CODE
// ============================================================================
function buildSecondaryUI(room, params) {
  isSecondaryDevice = true;
  myRoomCode = room;

  while (document.body.firstChild) document.body.removeChild(document.body.firstChild);

  var app = document.createElement('div');
  app.className = 'secondary-app';

  // No header or status text above camera — phone goes straight to camera view
  var statusEl = document.createElement('div');
  statusEl.id = 'secondaryStatus';
  statusEl.style.display = 'none';

  var rolesContainer = document.createElement('div');
  rolesContainer.className = 'secondary-roles';
  rolesContainer.id = 'secondaryRoles';
  rolesContainer.style.display = 'none'; // Hidden — camera auto-activates on connect

  var roleConfigs = [
    { key: 'mic', icon: '\uD83C\uDF99\uFE0F', name: 'MIC' },
    { key: 'camera', icon: '\uD83D\uDCF7', name: 'CAMERA' },
    { key: 'midi', icon: '\uD83C\uDFB9', name: 'MIDI' }
  ];
  roleConfigs.forEach(function(rc) {
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'secondary-role-card';
    card.id = 'secRole_' + rc.key;
    var iconEl = document.createElement('div');
    iconEl.className = 'role-icon';
    iconEl.textContent = rc.icon;
    card.appendChild(iconEl);
    var nameEl = document.createElement('div');
    nameEl.className = 'role-name';
    nameEl.textContent = rc.name;
    card.appendChild(nameEl);
    var statusLine = document.createElement('div');
    statusLine.className = 'role-status';
    statusLine.textContent = 'Tap to activate';
    statusLine.id = 'secRoleStatus_' + rc.key;
    card.appendChild(statusLine);
    card.style.cursor = 'pointer';
    (function(roleKey) {
      card.onclick = function() {
        if (secWs && secWs.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
          var enabling = !myRoles[roleKey];
          secWs.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'request_role', role: roleKey, enabled: enabling }));
        }
      };
    })(rc.key);
    rolesContainer.appendChild(card);
  });
  app.appendChild(rolesContainer);

  var cameraPreviewWrap = document.createElement('div');
  cameraPreviewWrap.className = 'camera-preview-wrap';
  cameraPreviewWrap.id = 'cameraPreviewWrap';
  cameraPreviewWrap.style.display = 'none';

  // Fullscreen toggle button — bottom-right corner of camera
  var fsBtn = document.createElement('button');
  fsBtn.className = 'cam-fs-btn';
  fsBtn.textContent = 'Fullscreen';
  fsBtn.onclick = function() {
    var isFs = app.classList.toggle('camera-fullscreen');
    fsBtn.textContent = isFs ? 'Exit' : 'Fullscreen';
  };
  cameraPreviewWrap.appendChild(fsBtn);

  app.appendChild(cameraPreviewWrap);

  // Bottom bar for camera fullscreen mode
  var camBottomBar = document.createElement('div');
  camBottomBar.className = 'camera-bottom-bar';
  camBottomBar.id = 'cameraBottomBar';
  // Spacer (pushes buttons to the right)
  var camSpacer = document.createElement('span');
  camSpacer.className = 'cam-spacer';
  camBottomBar.appendChild(camSpacer);
  // Flip button
  var camFlipBtn = document.createElement('button');
  camFlipBtn.className = 'cam-btn';
  camFlipBtn.textContent = 'Flip';
  camFlipBtn.onclick = function() { switchCamera(); };
  camBottomBar.appendChild(camFlipBtn);
  // Exit button
  var camExitBtn = document.createElement('button');
  camExitBtn.className = 'cam-btn exit-btn';
  camExitBtn.textContent = 'Exit';
  camExitBtn.onclick = function() {
    if (secWs && secWs.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
      secWs.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'request_role', role: 'camera', enabled: false }));
    }
  };
  camBottomBar.appendChild(camExitBtn);
  app.appendChild(camBottomBar);

  document.body.appendChild(app);

  // Audio playback context for secondary (to hear agent)
  var secPlaybackCtx = null;
  var secNextPlayTime = 0;

  // Hardware state
  var secMediaStream = null;
  var secAudioCtx = null;
  var secProcessor = null;
  var secMidiAccess = null;
  var secMidiInput = null;

  var proto = location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss' : 'ws';
  var roleHint = params.get('role') || '';
  var roomCode = room;
  var secWs = null;
  var secReconnectDisabled = false;

  function connectSecondary(rc) {
    var wsUrl = proto + '://' + location.host + '/ws/session?room=' + encodeURIComponent(rc);
    if (roleHint) wsUrl += '&role=' + encodeURIComponent(roleHint);
    secWs = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
    ws = secWs;
    secWs.binaryType = 'arraybuffer';

  secWs.onopen = function() {
    statusEl.textContent = 'Connected';
    statusEl.style.color = 'var(--green)';
    // Auto-activate camera immediately — skip role selection
    secWs.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'request_role', role: 'camera', enabled: true }));
  };

  secWs.onmessage = function(event) {
    if (event.data instanceof ArrayBuffer) {
      if (!secPlaybackCtx) secPlaybackCtx = new AudioContext({ sampleRate: 24000 });
      isBotSpeaking = true;
      var i16 = new Int16Array(event.data);
      var f32 = new Float32Array(i16.length);
      for (var i = 0; i < i16.length; i++) f32[i] = i16[i] / 32768;
      var buf = secPlaybackCtx.createBuffer(1, f32.length, 24000);
      buf.getChannelData(0).set(f32);
      var src = secPlaybackCtx.createBufferSource();
      src.buffer = buf;
      src.connect(secPlaybackCtx.destination);
      var now = secPlaybackCtx.currentTime;
      var startAt = Math.max(now + 0.01, secNextPlayTime);
      src.start(startAt);
      secNextPlayTime = startAt + buf.duration;
      return;
    }

    var msg = JSON.parse(event.data);

    if (msg.type === 'you_are_secondary') {
      myDeviceId = msg.deviceId;
      statusEl.textContent = 'Connected as ' + msg.deviceType;
    } else if (msg.type === 'role_assigned') {
      myRoles = msg.roles;
      updateSecondaryRoles();
    } else if (msg.type === 'device_list') {
      deviceList = msg.devices || [];
      for (var d = 0; d < deviceList.length; d++) {
        if (deviceList[d].id === myDeviceId) {
          myRoles = deviceList[d].roles;
          updateSecondaryRoles();
          break;
        }
      }
    } else if (msg.type === 'turn_complete' || msg.type === 'interrupted') {
      isBotSpeaking = false;
    } else if (msg.type === 'refresh_camera') {
      // Desktop requested camera refresh — restart camera
      if (myRoles.camera) {
        stopSecondaryCamera();
        setTimeout(startSecondaryCamera, 500);
      }
    } else if (msg.type === 'room_closed' || msg.type === 'error') {
      statusEl.textContent = msg.message || 'Room closed';
      statusEl.style.color = 'var(--rose)';
      secReconnectDisabled = true;
      stopSecondaryHardware();
    }
  };

  secWs.onclose = function(ev) {
    stopSecondaryHardware();
    // Auto-reconnect unless room was intentionally closed
    if (!secReconnectDisabled && ev.code !== 4000) {
      statusEl.textContent = 'Reconnecting...';
      statusEl.style.color = 'var(--amber, #fbbf24)';
      setTimeout(function() {
        if (document.visibilityState !== 'hidden') {
          connectSecondary(roomCode);
        }
      }, 2000);
    } else {
      statusEl.textContent = 'Disconnected';
      statusEl.style.color = 'var(--rose)';
    }
  };
  } // end connectSecondary

  connectSecondary(room);

  var prevRoles = { mic: false, camera: false, midi: false };

  function updateSecondaryRoles() {
    ['mic', 'camera', 'midi'].forEach(function(role) {
      var card = document.getElementById('secRole_' + role);
      var rstatus = document.getElementById('secRoleStatus_' + role);
      if (!card || !rstatus) return;
      if (myRoles[role]) {
        card.className = 'secondary-role-card active';
        rstatus.textContent = 'Active';
      } else {
        card.className = 'secondary-role-card';
        rstatus.textContent = 'Inactive';
      }
    });

    if (myRoles.mic && !prevRoles.mic) { startSecondaryMic(); startSecondarySpeechRec(); }
    if (!myRoles.mic && prevRoles.mic) { stopSecondaryMic(); stopSecondarySpeechRec(); }
    if (myRoles.camera && !prevRoles.camera) startSecondaryCamera();
    if (!myRoles.camera && prevRoles.camera) stopSecondaryCamera();
    if (myRoles.midi && !prevRoles.midi) startSecondaryMidi();
    if (!myRoles.midi && prevRoles.midi) stopSecondaryMidi();

    prevRoles = { mic: myRoles.mic, camera: myRoles.camera, midi: myRoles.midi };

    // No fullscreen — keep camera as inline preview with other UI elements visible

    if (myRoles.mic || myRoles.camera || myRoles.midi) {
      var active = [];
      if (myRoles.mic) active.push('Microphone');
      if (myRoles.camera) active.push('Camera');
      if (myRoles.midi) active.push('MIDI');
      statusEl.textContent = active.join(' + ') + ' active';
      var camSt = document.getElementById('camStatusText');
      if (camSt) camSt.textContent = active.join(' + ') + ' active';
    } else {
      statusEl.textContent = 'Connected \u2014 waiting for role assignment';
    }
  }

  function startSecondaryMic() {
    navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
      audio: { echoCancellation: true, noiseSuppression: true, autoGainControl: true, channelCount: 1 }
    }).then(function(stream) {
      secMediaStream = stream;
      secAudioCtx = new AudioContext();
      var nativeRate = secAudioCtx.sampleRate;
      var source = secAudioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(stream);
      secProcessor = secAudioCtx.createScriptProcessor(4096, 1, 1);
      source.connect(secProcessor);
      secProcessor.connect(secAudioCtx.destination);
      var ratio = nativeRate / 16000;
      secProcessor.onaudioprocess = function(e) {
        if (!secWs || secWs.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN || !myRoles.mic) return;
        if (isBotSpeaking) return;
        var f32arr = e.inputBuffer.getChannelData(0);
        var sum2 = 0;
        for (var j = 0; j < f32arr.length; j++) sum2 += f32arr[j] * f32arr[j];
        if (Math.sqrt(sum2 / f32arr.length) < 0.01) return;
        var outLen = Math.floor(f32arr.length / ratio);
        var pcm16 = new Int16Array(outLen);
        for (var k = 0; k < outLen; k++) {
          var srcIdx = Math.floor(k * ratio);
          pcm16[k] = Math.max(-32768, Math.min(32767, Math.round(f32arr[srcIdx] * 32767)));
        }
        secWs.send(pcm16.buffer);
      };
    }).catch(function(err) {
      statusEl.textContent = 'Mic error: ' + err.message;
    });
  }

  function stopSecondaryMic() {
    if (secProcessor) { secProcessor.disconnect(); secProcessor = null; }
    if (secAudioCtx) { secAudioCtx.close(); secAudioCtx = null; }
    if (secMediaStream) {
      secMediaStream.getAudioTracks().forEach(function(t) { t.stop(); });
      if (!myRoles.camera) { secMediaStream = null; }
    }
  }

  function startSecondaryMidi() {
    if (!navigator.requestMIDIAccess) {
      statusEl.textContent = 'Web MIDI not supported on this device';
      return;
    }
    navigator.requestMIDIAccess().then(function(access) {
      secMidiAccess = access;
      var inputs = Array.from(access.inputs.values());
      if (inputs.length > 0) {
        secMidiInput = inputs[0];
        secMidiInput.onmidimessage = function(midiEvent) {
          handleMidiMessage(midiEvent);
        };
        statusEl.textContent = 'MIDI: ' + (secMidiInput.name || 'Connected');
      }
    }).catch(function(err) {
      statusEl.textContent = 'MIDI error: ' + err.message;
    });
  }

  function stopSecondaryMidi() {
    if (secMidiInput) { secMidiInput.onmidimessage = null; secMidiInput = null; }
  }

  // Camera state for secondary
  var secCameraStream = null;
  var secCameraInterval = null;
  var secCameraFacing = 'environment';

  function startSecondaryCamera() {
    var wrap = document.getElementById('cameraPreviewWrap');
    if (!wrap) return;
    wrap.style.display = '';

    navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
      video: { facingMode: secCameraFacing, width: { ideal: 640 }, height: { ideal: 480 } }
    }).then(function(stream) {
      secCameraStream = stream;
      var video = document.createElement('video');
      video.id = 'secCameraVideo';
      video.autoplay = true;
      video.playsInline = true;
      video.muted = true;
      video.srcObject = stream;
      wrap.appendChild(video);

      // Send raw JPEG frames to server at 4fps — MediaPipe runs on desktop
      var offCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      offCanvas.width = 640;
      offCanvas.height = 480;
      var offCtx = offCanvas.getContext('2d');

      // Send frames at ~20fps for smooth hand tracking on desktop
      secCameraInterval = setInterval(function() {
        if (!secWs || secWs.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN || !myRoles.camera) return;
        if (video.videoWidth === 0) return;
        offCanvas.width = video.videoWidth;
        offCanvas.height = video.videoHeight;
        offCtx.drawImage(video, 0, 0);
        var dataUrl = offCanvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.6);
        var base64 = dataUrl.split(',')[1];
        secWs.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'video_frame', data: base64 }));
      }, 50);

      secWs.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'camera_state', enabled: true }));
    }).catch(function(err) {
      statusEl.textContent = 'Camera error: ' + err.message;
    });
  }

  function stopSecondaryCamera() {
    if (secCameraInterval) { clearInterval(secCameraInterval); secCameraInterval = null; }
    if (secCameraStream) {
      secCameraStream.getTracks().forEach(function(t) { t.stop(); });
      secCameraStream = null;
    }
    var wrap = document.getElementById('cameraPreviewWrap');
    if (wrap) { wrap.textContent = ''; wrap.style.display = 'none'; }
    if (secWs && secWs.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
      secWs.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'camera_state', enabled: false }));
    }
  }

  function switchCamera() {
    secCameraFacing = secCameraFacing === 'environment' ? 'user' : 'environment';
    if (secCameraInterval) { clearInterval(secCameraInterval); secCameraInterval = null; }
    if (secCameraStream) {
      secCameraStream.getTracks().forEach(function(t) { t.stop(); });
      secCameraStream = null;
    }
    var wrap = document.getElementById('cameraPreviewWrap');
    if (wrap) wrap.textContent = '';
    startSecondaryCamera();
  }

  // Phone no longer runs MediaPipe — desktop handles hand detection

  var secSpeechRec = null;

  function startSecondarySpeechRec() {
    var SpeechRec = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    if (!SpeechRec) return;
    secSpeechRec = new SpeechRec();
    secSpeechRec.lang = 'en-US';
    secSpeechRec.continuous = true;
    secSpeechRec.interimResults = false;
    secSpeechRec.onresult = function(e) {
      for (var i = e.resultIndex; i < e.results.length; i++) {
        if (e.results[i].isFinal) {
          var text = e.results[i][0].transcript.trim();
          if (text && secWs && secWs.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
            secWs.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'user_speech_transcript', text: text }));
          }
        }
      }
    };
    secSpeechRec.onend = function() {
      if (myRoles.mic && secSpeechRec) {
        try { secSpeechRec.start(); } catch(e) {}
      }
    };
    secSpeechRec.onerror = function(e) {
      console.log('Secondary SpeechRecognition error:', e.error);
    };
    try { secSpeechRec.start(); } catch(e) {}
  }

  function stopSecondarySpeechRec() {
    if (secSpeechRec) {
      var sr = secSpeechRec;
      secSpeechRec = null;
      try { sr.stop(); } catch(e) {}
    }
  }

  function stopSecondaryHardware() {
    stopSecondaryMic();
    stopSecondaryCamera();
    stopSecondaryMidi();
    stopSecondarySpeechRec();
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// Spectator Mode — ?spectator=1
// ============================================================================
(function() {
  var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  if (params.get('spectator') !== '1') return;

  // Hide controls that spectators don't need
  var controls = document.querySelector('.controls');
  if (controls) controls.style.display = 'none';

  // Update header to show spectator mode
  var headerSub = document.querySelector('.header-sub');
  if (headerSub) headerSub.textContent = 'SPECTATOR MODE';

  // Auto-connect to /ws/spectator
  setStatus('connecting');
  var proto = location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss' : 'ws';
  var wsUrl = proto + '://' + location.host + '/ws/spectator';
  var specWs = new WebSocket(wsUrl);

  // Audio playback context for spectator
  var specPlaybackCtx = new AudioContext({ sampleRate: 24000 });
  var specNextPlayTime = 0;

  specWs.binaryType = 'arraybuffer';

  specWs.onopen = function() {
    setStatus('connected');
  };

  specWs.onmessage = function(event) {
    if (event.data instanceof ArrayBuffer) {
      // Audio playback
      var i16 = new Int16Array(event.data);
      var f32 = new Float32Array(i16.length);
      for (var i = 0; i < i16.length; i++) f32[i] = i16[i] / 32768;
      var buf = specPlaybackCtx.createBuffer(1, f32.length, 24000);
      buf.getChannelData(0).set(f32);
      var src = specPlaybackCtx.createBufferSource();
      src.buffer = buf;
      src.connect(specPlaybackCtx.destination);
      var now = specPlaybackCtx.currentTime;
      var startAt = Math.max(now + 0.05, specNextPlayTime);
      src.start(startAt);
      specNextPlayTime = startAt + buf.duration;
    } else {
      var msg = JSON.parse(event.data);
      if (msg.type === 'story_scene' || msg.type === 'achievement' ||
          msg.type === 'coaching_focus' || msg.type === 'quest_advance' ||
          msg.type === 'technique_report') {
        handleToolEvent(msg);
      }
    }
  };

  specWs.onclose = function() {
    setStatus('disconnected');
  };
})();

</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>PianoQuest Live</title>
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #000000;
    --bg2: #0a0a0a;
    --bg3: #111111;
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --text: #ffffff;
    --text1: #ffffff;
    --text2: rgba(255,255,255,0.60);
    --text3: rgba(255,255,255,0.40);
    --accent: #ffffff;
    --accent-subtle: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    --accent-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    --purple: #a0a0a0;
    --rose: #fb7185;
    --blue: #93c5fd;
    --green: #86efac;
    --gemini: #60a5fa;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html, body { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; }
  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    height: 100%;
  }
  .app {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 8px 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
    height: 100vh;
  }

  /* Header */
  .header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 8px 12px;
  }
  .header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; }
  .header h1 { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
  .header h1 span { color: var(--accent); }
  .header-sub { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

  .controls { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }
  .status-dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #444;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .status-dot.connected { background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--green); }
  .status-dot.error { background: var(--rose); }
  .status-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text3); }
  .gemini-speaking {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2);
  }
  .gemini-speaking .vol-bar {
    width: 40px; height: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .gemini-speaking .vol-fill {
    height: 100%; width: 0%; background: var(--green); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.05s;
  }
  .gemini-speaking.active { color: var(--text1); }
  .gemini-speaking.active .vol-fill { background: var(--green); }
  button {
    padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg2); color: var(--text); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  button:hover { background: var(--bg3); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); }
  button.primary {
    background: #ffffff; border-color: #ffffff; color: #000000; font-weight: 600;
  }
  button.primary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }
  button.secondary {
    background: rgba(96,165,250,0.12); border-color: rgba(96,165,250,0.25); color: var(--blue);
  }
  button.secondary:hover { background: rgba(96,165,250,0.2); }
  button.danger {
    background: rgba(251,113,133,0.1); border-color: rgba(251,113,133,0.25); color: var(--rose);
  }
  button:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

  /* Main grid: left-col | handle | center | handle | score-col */
  .main {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 520px 6px 1fr 6px 560px;
    gap: 0;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    column-gap: 6px;
  }

  /* Resize handles as grid columns */
  .grid-resize-handle {
    cursor: col-resize; z-index: 10;
    background: transparent;
    transition: background 0.15s;
  }
  .grid-resize-handle:hover, .grid-resize-handle.dragging {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 3px;
  }

  /* Left column */
  .left-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden; }

  .panel {
    border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg2); overflow: hidden;
  }
  .panel-header {
    padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--text2);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  }
  .panel-header .dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; }

  /* Camera */
  .level-meter {
    padding: 6px 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  }
  .level-bar-bg {
    flex: 1; height: 3px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .level-bar {
    height: 100%; width: 0%; background: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.05s;
  }
  .level-label { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text3); min-width: 20px; text-align: right; }

  /* Coaching Focus Card */
  .coaching-card { padding: 12px; }
  .coaching-focus {
    font-size: 12px; color: var(--text2); line-height: 1.5;
    min-height: 36px;
  }
  .coaching-focus .focus-label {
    font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    color: var(--gemini); margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  /* Right column */
  .right-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; min-height: 0; }

  /* Piano MIDI stack */
  .midi-stack { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; flex: 1; min-height: 0; }
  .midi-header-tools {
    margin-left: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .midi-status {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text3);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .pedal-pill {
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text3);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .pedal-pill.active {
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    color: var(--accent);
  }
  .midi-select {
    min-width: 180px;
    padding: 6px 10px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg3);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  .midi-select:focus { outline: 1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.35); }
  .mini-btn {
    padding: 6px 10px;
    font-size: 11px;
    background: var(--bg3);
  }
  .roll-wrap {
    padding: 0;
    background: #0a0a0a;
  }
  .keyboard-wrap {
    padding: 0;
    background: #0a0a0a;
  }
  .staff-wrap canvas,
  .roll-wrap canvas,
  .keyboard-wrap canvas {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    display: block;
  }
  .keyboard-hint {
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text3);
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }
  .bpm-control { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
  .bpm-control label { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text3); }
  .bpm-control input[type=range] { width: 74px; accent-color: var(--green); }
  .bpm-control .bpm-val { font-size: 10px; color: var(--green); min-width: 20px; }


  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .main { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
    .grid-resize-handle { display: none; }
    .score-col { display: none; }
    .quest-map { overflow-x: auto; }
    .midi-header-tools {
      width: 100%;
      margin-left: 0;
      justify-content: flex-start;
    }
  }

  /* Devices panel */
  .devices-content { padding: 8px 10px; }
  .device-list-items { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
  .device-item {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    padding: 4px 6px; border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2);
  }
  .device-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }
  .device-name { flex: 1; }
  .device-roles-tags { display: flex; gap: 3px; }
  .role-tag {
    padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .role-tag.mic { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: var(--accent); }
  .role-tag.cam { background: rgba(251,113,133,0.15); color: var(--rose); }
