  ctx.font = 'bold ' + tsFontSize + 'px DM Sans, sans-serif';
  ctx.fillStyle = '#999999';
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
  // Treble staff: top number centered between lines 3(B4) and 5(F5), bottom between 1(E4) and 3(B4)
  var trebleLine3Y = midiToY(TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS[2]); // B4
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[0], tsX + 10, (trebleTop + trebleLine3Y) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[1], tsX + 10, (trebleLine3Y + trebleBottom) / 2);
  // Bass staff: top between lines 3(D3) and 5(A3), bottom between 1(G2) and 3(D3)
  var bassLine3Y = midiToY(BASS_LINE_MIDIS[2]); // D3
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[0], tsX + 10, (bassTop + bassLine3Y) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[1], tsX + 10, (bassLine3Y + bassBottom) / 2);
  ctx.textAlign = 'left';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';

  // Key signature accidentals — to the right of time signature
  var ksX = actualClefW + timeSigW + 20;
  var absKeySig = Math.abs(keySigNum);
  if (absKeySig > 0) {
    var symbol = useFlats ? '\u266D' : '\u266F';
    var treblePos = useFlats ? TREBLE_FLAT_POS : TREBLE_SHARP_POS;
    var bassPos = useFlats ? BASS_FLAT_POS : BASS_SHARP_POS;
    ctx.font = 'bold 33px serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    for (var i = 0; i < absKeySig; i++) {
      var x = ksX + i * 22;
      ctx.fillText(symbol, x, midiToY(treblePos[i]));
      ctx.fillText(symbol, x, midiToY(bassPos[i]));
    }
    ctx.textAlign = 'left';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';
  }

  // Play line (where notes arrive)
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 200, 100, 0.3)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(playLineX, trebleTop - 10);
  ctx.lineTo(playLineX, bassBottom + 10);
  ctx.stroke();

  // Flowing measure bar lines — scroll from right to left
  // Fixed measure width: always show ~4 measures; BPM controls scroll speed
  var scrollableW = W - playLineX;
  var measuresVisible = 2;
  var measureDurationMs = msPerMeasure;
  var measureWidthPx = scrollableW / measuresVisible;
  var pxPerMs = measureWidthPx / measureDurationMs;
  var scrollWindow = scrollableW / pxPerMs;
  var firstMeasureOffset = nowMs % measureDurationMs;
  var totalMeasures = Math.ceil(scrollWindow / measureDurationMs) + 2;

  for (var m = -1; m < totalMeasures; m++) {
    var measureAge = firstMeasureOffset + m * measureDurationMs;
    var barX = playLineX + (scrollWindow - measureAge) * pxPerMs;
    if (barX < marginLeft || barX > W) continue;

    // Measure bar line across both staves
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.35)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(barX, trebleTop);
    ctx.lineTo(barX, trebleBottom);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(barX, bassTop);
    ctx.lineTo(barX, bassBottom);
    ctx.stroke();

    // Beat subdivisions within measure
    for (var beat = 1; beat < beatsPerMeasure; beat++) {
      var beatX = barX - beat * (measureDurationMs / beatsPerMeasure) * pxPerMs;
      if (beatX < marginLeft || beatX > W) continue;
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(beatX, trebleTop);
      ctx.lineTo(beatX, trebleBottom);
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(beatX, bassTop);
      ctx.lineTo(beatX, bassBottom);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
  }

  // Middle C ledger line reference (faint dashed)
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
  ctx.setLineDash([4, 4]);
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(marginLeft, middleCY);
  ctx.lineTo(W, middleCY);
  ctx.stroke();
  ctx.setLineDash([]);

  // Helpers
  var noteRadius = Math.max(3, lineSpacing * 0.4);

  function drawLedgerLines(noteX, noteY) {
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#555555';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    var ledgerHalf = 10;
    if (Math.abs(noteY - middleCY) < halfStep) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(noteX - ledgerHalf, middleCY);
      ctx.lineTo(noteX + ledgerHalf, middleCY);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    if (noteY < trebleTop - halfStep * 0.5) {
      var ly = trebleTop - lineSpacing;
      while (ly >= noteY - halfStep * 0.5) {
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(noteX - ledgerHalf, ly); ctx.lineTo(noteX + ledgerHalf, ly); ctx.stroke();
        ly -= lineSpacing;
      }
    }
    if (noteY > bassBottom + halfStep * 0.5) {
      var ly = bassBottom + lineSpacing;
      while (ly <= noteY + halfStep * 0.5) {
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(noteX - ledgerHalf, ly); ctx.lineTo(noteX + ledgerHalf, ly); ctx.stroke();
        ly += lineSpacing;
      }
    }
  }

  function drawNoteHead(noteX, noteY, color, radius) {
    // Thin vertical rectangle indicating timing
    var headW = 3;
    var headH = radius * 2.4;
    ctx.fillStyle = color;
    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.95;
    ctx.fillRect(noteX - headW / 2, noteY - headH / 2, headW, headH);
    ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
  }

  function drawStem(noteX, noteY, color, radius) {
    var stemUp = noteY > middleCY;
    var stemLen = lineSpacing * 3.5;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    if (stemUp) {
      ctx.moveTo(noteX + radius - 1, noteY);
      ctx.lineTo(noteX + radius - 1, noteY - stemLen);
    } else {
      ctx.moveTo(noteX - radius + 1, noteY);
      ctx.lineTo(noteX - radius + 1, noteY + stemLen);
    }
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  function drawAccidental(noteX, noteY, midi, color) {
    var semitone = midi % 12;
    // Diatonic notes in the scale need no accidental
    if (scaleSemitones.has(semitone)) return;
    // Black keys not in key signature get sharp/flat
    // White keys not in scale get natural sign (e.g. F natural in G major)
    var symbol;
    if (isBlackKey(midi)) {
      if (keySigSemitones.has(semitone)) return; // already in key sig
      symbol = useFlats ? '\u266D' : '\u266F';
    } else {
      // White key that's non-diatonic — needs natural sign
      symbol = '\u266E';
    }
    ctx.font = 'bold 22px serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    ctx.fillText(symbol, noteX - 14, noteY);
    ctx.textAlign = 'left';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';
  }

  // --- TARGET NOTES flowing from right ---
  for (var ti = 0; ti < targetNotes.length; ti++) {
    var tn = targetNotes[ti];
    var timeUntilArrive = tn.arriveMs - nowMs;
    if (timeUntilArrive < -2000) continue; // past and gone
    if (timeUntilArrive > scrollWindow) continue; // not visible yet

    var tnX = playLineX + timeUntilArrive * pxPerMs;
    if (tnX < marginLeft || tnX > W) continue;

    var tnY = midiToY(tn.midi);
    var tnAlpha = tn.hit ? 0.15 : (timeUntilArrive < 0 ? Math.max(0.2, 1 + timeUntilArrive / 2000) : 0.6);
    var tnColor = tn.hit ? 'rgba(0,200,100,' + tnAlpha + ')' : 'rgba(100,150,255,' + tnAlpha + ')';

    drawLedgerLines(tnX, tnY);
    drawAccidental(tnX, tnY, tn.midi, tnColor);
    // Hollow note head for targets
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(tnX, tnY, noteRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.strokeStyle = tnColor;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  // --- PLAYED NOTES (active) — head scrolls left from play line, tail extends to play line ---
  activeNotes.forEach(function(noteData, midi) {
    if (midi < FIRST_MIDI || midi > FIRST_MIDI + TOTAL_KEYS - 1) return;
    var noteY = midiToY(midi);
    var color = dynamicsColor(noteData.velocity);
    var holdMs = nowMs - noteData.timestamp;
    var headPx = holdMs * pxPerMs;
    var headX = Math.max(marginLeft, playLineX - headPx);
    var tailLen = playLineX - headX;

    if (tailLen > 2) {
      // Check if finger released but pedal sustaining — split bright/dim segments
      var histEntry = null;
      for (var hi = noteHistory.length - 1; hi >= 0; hi--) {
        if (noteHistory[hi].note === midi && noteHistory[hi].endMs === 0) {
          histEntry = noteHistory[hi]; break;
        }
      }
      var barH = noteRadius * 1.4;
      var barY = noteY - noteRadius * 0.7;
      var c = dynamicsRgb(noteData.velocity);
      var breathe = 0.8 + 0.2 * Math.sin(nowMs / 400 + midi * 0.5);
      if (histEntry && histEntry.fingerDurationMs > 0) {
        // Finger released, pedal sustaining — draw two segments
        var fingerMs = histEntry.fingerDurationMs;
        var fingerEndX = Math.max(headX, playLineX - (holdMs - fingerMs) * pxPerMs);
        // Finger-held segment: inner gradient matching waterfall style
        if (fingerEndX > headX) {
          var fW = fingerEndX - headX;
          var fGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, barY, 0, barY + barH);
          fGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
          ctx.fillStyle = fGrad;
          ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, fW, barH);
          // Bright edge highlights (top/bottom)
          ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.6)';
          ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, fW, 1);
          ctx.fillRect(headX, barY + barH - 1, fW, 1);
          // Thin start bar
          ctx.fillStyle = color;
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.95;
          ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, 3, barH);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
        }
        // Pedal-sustained segment: filled bar with glowing rim
        if (playLineX > fingerEndX) {
          var pedalW = playLineX - fingerEndX;
          // Interior fill — visible but dimmer than finger-held
          ctx.fillStyle = darkenedColor(noteData.velocity, 0.4);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.4;
          ctx.fillRect(fingerEndX, barY, pedalW, barH);
          // Thick glowing rim synced with finger breathing
          ctx.strokeStyle = color;
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7 * breathe;
          ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
          ctx.shadowColor = color;
          ctx.shadowBlur = 8 * breathe;
          ctx.strokeRect(fingerEndX, barY, pedalW, barH);
          ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        }
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      } else {
        // Finger still held — inner gradient fill matching waterfall style
        var fGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, barY, 0, barY + barH);
        fGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
        ctx.fillStyle = fGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, tailLen, barH);
        // Bright edge highlights (top/bottom of bar)
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.6)';
        ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, tailLen, 1);
        ctx.fillRect(headX, barY + barH - 1, tailLen, 1);
        // Thin start bar
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.95;
        ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, 3, barH);
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      }
    }

    drawLedgerLines(headX, noteY);
    drawAccidental(headX, noteY, midi, color);
    drawNoteHead(headX, noteY, color, noteRadius);

    // Sustained glow effect at play line (t=0) — active while finger is held down
    if (fingerDownNotes.has(midi)) {
      var c = dynamicsRgb(noteData.velocity);
      var pulse = 0.6 + 0.4 * Math.sin(nowMs / 200 + midi * 0.7);
      var glowR = noteRadius * (3 + pulse * 2);
      // Outer glow at play line
      var grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(playLineX, noteY, noteRadius * 0.5, playLineX, noteY, glowR);
      grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',' + (0.5 * pulse).toFixed(2) + ')');
      grad.addColorStop(0.4, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',' + (0.25 * pulse).toFixed(2) + ')');
      grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0)');
      ctx.fillStyle = grad;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(playLineX, noteY, glowR, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
      // Tiny shimmer particles radiating outward
      var shimmerCount = 3;
      for (var si = 0; si < shimmerCount; si++) {
        var angle = (nowMs / 600 + si * (Math.PI * 2 / shimmerCount) + midi * 0.3) % (Math.PI * 2);
        var dist = noteRadius * (1.5 + pulse * 1.5);
        var sx = playLineX + Math.cos(angle) * dist;
        var sy = noteY + Math.sin(angle) * dist;
        var sAlpha = 0.6 * pulse;
        ctx.globalAlpha = sAlpha;
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgb(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ')';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(sx, sy, 1.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
      }
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
    }
  });

  // --- NOTE HISTORY scrolling left from play line at tempo speed ---
  var maxLeftPx = playLineX - marginLeft;
  for (var i = noteHistory.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    var entry = noteHistory[i];
    var age = nowMs - entry.startMs;
    var offsetPx = age * pxPerMs; // same speed as measure bar flow
    if (offsetPx > maxLeftPx) break;
    if (entry.endMs === 0) continue; // skip currently-active note (drawn at play line)

    var noteY = midiToY(entry.note);
    var noteX = playLineX - offsetPx;
    if (noteX < marginLeft) continue;

    // Draw duration tail for history notes — match waterfall brightness rules
    var duration = (entry.endMs || nowMs) - entry.startMs;
    var durationPx = duration * pxPerMs;
    var tailEndX = Math.min(playLineX, noteX + durationPx);

    var t = offsetPx / maxLeftPx;
    var alpha = Math.max(0.1, 1 - t);
    var headColor = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity, alpha);
    var pedalAlpha = alpha * 0.5;

    var histBarH = noteRadius * 1.4;
    var histBarY = noteY - noteRadius * 0.7;
    var hc = dynamicsRgb(entry.velocity);
    if (durationPx > 2) {
      var fingerEndMs = (entry.fingerDurationMs > 0) ? entry.startMs + entry.fingerDurationMs : null;
      if (fingerEndMs && fingerEndMs < entry.endMs) {
        // Finger-held segment: inner gradient matching waterfall style
        var fingerEndAge = nowMs - fingerEndMs;
        var fingerEndX = Math.min(playLineX, playLineX - fingerEndAge * pxPerMs);
        if (fingerEndX > noteX) {
          var fSegW = fingerEndX - noteX;
          var fGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, histBarY, 0, histBarY + histBarH);
          fGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.9)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(' + Math.round(hc.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(' + Math.round(hc.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.9)');
          ctx.fillStyle = fGrad;
          ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, fSegW, histBarH);
          // Bright edge highlights (top/bottom)
          ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.6)';
          ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, fSegW, 1);
          ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY + histBarH - 1, fSegW, 1);
          // Thin start bar
          ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.9;
          ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, 2, histBarH);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
        }
        // Pedal-sustained segment: filled bar with glowing rim, square edges
        if (tailEndX > fingerEndX) {
          var pedalW = tailEndX - fingerEndX;
          var histColor = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity);
          var pulse = 0.8 + 0.2 * Math.sin(nowMs / 400 + entry.note * 0.5);
          // Interior fill
          ctx.fillStyle = darkenedColor(entry.velocity, 0.4);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.4 * alpha;
          ctx.fillRect(fingerEndX, histBarY, pedalW, histBarH);
          // Thick glowing rim
          ctx.strokeStyle = histColor;
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7 * pulse * alpha;
          ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
          ctx.shadowColor = histColor;
          ctx.shadowBlur = 8 * pulse * alpha;
          ctx.strokeRect(fingerEndX, histBarY, pedalW, histBarH);
          ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        }
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      } else {
        // No pedal sustain — inner gradient fill matching waterfall style
        var nopedalW = tailEndX - noteX;
        var fGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, histBarY, 0, histBarY + histBarH);
        fGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.9)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(' + Math.round(hc.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(' + Math.round(hc.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.9)');
        ctx.fillStyle = fGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, nopedalW, histBarH);
        // Bright edge highlights (top/bottom)
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.6)';
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, nopedalW, 1);
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY + histBarH - 1, nopedalW, 1);
        // Thin start bar
        ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity);
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.9;
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, 2, histBarH);
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      }
    }

    if (alpha > 0.3) drawLedgerLines(noteX, noteY);
    if (alpha > 0.3) drawAccidental(noteX, noteY, entry.note, dynamicsColor(entry.velocity, alpha * 0.8));
    drawNoteHead(noteX, noteY, headColor, noteRadius * (0.6 + 0.4 * (1 - t)));
  }

  // Left margin overlay to clean up clef area
  ctx.fillStyle = '#050508';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, marginLeft - 2, H);

  // Redraw clefs and key sig on top (same as initial draw)
  ctx.fillStyle = '#AAAAAA';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
  ctx.font = trebleClefSize + 'px serif';
  ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD1E', trebleClefX, trebleG4Y - trebleLineSpacing * 0.85);
  ctx.font = bassClefSize + 'px serif';
  ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD22', bassClefX, bassClefY);
  ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';

  // Redraw time sig
  ctx.font = 'bold ' + tsFontSize + 'px DM Sans, sans-serif';
  ctx.fillStyle = '#999999';
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[0], tsX + 10, (trebleTop + trebleLine3Y) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[1], tsX + 10, (trebleLine3Y + trebleBottom) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[0], tsX + 10, (bassTop + bassLine3Y) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[1], tsX + 10, (bassLine3Y + bassBottom) / 2);
  ctx.textAlign = 'left';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';

  // Redraw key sig
  if (absKeySig > 0) {
    var symbol = useFlats ? '\u266D' : '\u266F';
    var treblePos = useFlats ? TREBLE_FLAT_POS : TREBLE_SHARP_POS;
    var bassPos = useFlats ? BASS_FLAT_POS : BASS_SHARP_POS;
    ctx.font = 'bold 33px serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    for (var i = 0; i < absKeySig; i++) {
      var x = ksX + i * 22;
      ctx.fillText(symbol, x, midiToY(treblePos[i]));
      ctx.fillText(symbol, x, midiToY(bassPos[i]));
    }
    ctx.textAlign = 'left';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';
  }

  // Redraw staff lines in clef area (full width from left edge)
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#555555';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (var t = 0; t < TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS.length; t++) {
    var y = midiToY(TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS[t]);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, y); ctx.lineTo(marginLeft - 2, y); ctx.stroke();
  }
  for (var b = 0; b < BASS_LINE_MIDIS.length; b++) {
    var y = midiToY(BASS_LINE_MIDIS[b]);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, y); ctx.lineTo(marginLeft - 2, y); ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function drawKeyboard() {
  var canvas = document.getElementById('keyboardCanvas');
  var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  var dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  if (!rect.width) return;
  canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;
  canvas.height = rect.height * dpr;
  ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
  var W = rect.width;
  var totalH = rect.height;
  if (totalH < 50) return;
  var dynamicsH = Math.round(totalH * 0.5); // top 50% for dynamic bars (same height as keyboard)
  var keyboardH = totalH - dynamicsH; // bottom 50% for keys
  var keyTop = dynamicsH; // keys start below dynamics zone
  var whiteKeyW = W / WHITE_KEYS_COUNT;
  var blackKeyW = whiteKeyW * 0.6;
  var blackKeyH = keyboardH * 0.62;

  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, totalH);

  // --- Dynamic bars zone (above keyboard) ---
  ctx.fillStyle = '#050508';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, dynamicsH);

  // Dynamics guide lines
  ctx.font = 'bold 18px DM Sans, sans-serif';
  DYNAMICS_LABELS.forEach(function(dl) {
    var y = keyTop - (dl.vel / 127) * dynamicsH;
    ctx.strokeStyle = dynamicsColor(dl.vel, 0.5);
    ctx.lineWidth = 0.8;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, y);
    ctx.lineTo(W, y);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(dl.vel, 0.7);
    ctx.fillText(dl.label, 3, y - 3);
  });

  // Dynamic bars — grow upward from keyboard top
  var nowMsDyn = Date.now();
  function drawDynBars(blackOnly) {
    activeNotes.forEach(function(note, midi) {
      var keyInfo = KEY_BY_MIDI.get(midi);
      if (!keyInfo || keyInfo.isBlack !== blackOnly) return;
      var barH = (note.velocity / 127) * (dynamicsH - 2);
      var barX = keyInfo.isBlack
        ? (keyInfo.whiteIndex + 1) * whiteKeyW - blackKeyW / 2
        : keyInfo.whiteIndex * whiteKeyW + 1;
      var barW = keyInfo.isBlack ? blackKeyW : whiteKeyW - 2;
      var barTop = keyTop - barH;
      var isFingerDown = fingerDownNotes.has(midi);
      var color = isFingerDown ? dynamicsColor(note.velocity) : darkenedColor(note.velocity, 0.5);
      var dc = dynamicsRgb(note.velocity);
      if (keyInfo.isBlack) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#050508';
        ctx.fillRect(barX, 0, barW, dynamicsH);
      }
      if (isFingerDown) {
        // Finger held: inner gradient (bright edges, darker center) + glow
        var dGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(barX, 0, barX + barW, 0);
        dGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + dc.r + ',' + dc.g + ',' + dc.b + ',0.9)');
        dGrad.addColorStop(0.35, 'rgba(' + Math.round(dc.r * 0.6) + ',' + Math.round(dc.g * 0.6) + ',' + Math.round(dc.b * 0.6) + ',0.6)');
        dGrad.addColorStop(0.65, 'rgba(' + Math.round(dc.r * 0.6) + ',' + Math.round(dc.g * 0.6) + ',' + Math.round(dc.b * 0.6) + ',0.6)');
        dGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + dc.r + ',' + dc.g + ',' + dc.b + ',0.9)');
        ctx.fillStyle = dGrad;
        ctx.shadowColor = color;
        ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop, barW, barH);
        ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        // Bright top cap
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + dc.r + ',' + dc.g + ',' + dc.b + ',0.95)';
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop, barW, 2);
      } else {
        // Pedal sustained: filled bar with glowing rim
        var pulse = 0.8 + 0.2 * Math.sin(nowMsDyn / 400 + midi * 0.5);
        ctx.fillStyle = darkenedColor(note.velocity, 0.4);
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.4;
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop, barW, barH);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7 * pulse;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.shadowColor = color;
        ctx.shadowBlur = 8 * pulse;
        ctx.strokeRect(barX, barTop, barW, barH);
        ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      }
    });
  }
  drawDynBars(false);
  drawDynBars(true);

  // Target note dynamic bars — ghost indicators showing expected velocity
  var nowMsKb = Date.now();
  for (var ti = 0; ti < targetNotes.length; ti++) {
    var tn = targetNotes[ti];
    var timeUntil = tn.arriveMs - nowMsKb;
    if (timeUntil < -500 || timeUntil > 3000) continue;
    if (tn.hit) continue;
    var keyInfo = KEY_BY_MIDI.get(tn.midi);
    if (!keyInfo) continue;
    var vel = tn.velocity || 64;
    var barH = (vel / 127) * (dynamicsH - 2);
    var barX = keyInfo.isBlack
      ? (keyInfo.whiteIndex + 1) * whiteKeyW - blackKeyW / 2
      : keyInfo.whiteIndex * whiteKeyW + 1;
    var barW = keyInfo.isBlack ? blackKeyW : whiteKeyW - 2;
    // Fade in as note approaches (3s → 0s = 0.15 → 0.5 alpha)

        var bass = new VF.Stave(x, y + trebleToBassGap, staveWidth);
        if (isFirst) { var dts2 = (data.timeSig === '4/4') ? 'C' : (data.timeSig || '4/4'); bass.addClef('bass').addKeySignature(staveKey).addTimeSignature(dts2); }
        else if (isFirstInLine) { bass.addClef('bass').addKeySignature(staveKey); }
        bass.setContext(context).draw();
        if (isFirstInLine) { new VF.StaveConnector(treble, bass).setType('brace').setContext(context).draw(); new VF.StaveConnector(treble, bass).setType('singleLeft').setContext(context).draw(); }
        new VF.StaveConnector(treble, bass).setType('singleRight').setContext(context).draw();
        smrMeasurePositionMap.push({ measureIdx: i, x: x, width: staveWidth, y: y, startBeat: globalBeatCursor, beatsPerMeasure: totalBeats, systemIdx: sys });
        globalBeatCursor += totalBeats;
        var measure = measures[i];
        if (!measure) continue;
        var trebleNotes = measure.notes.filter(function(n) { return n.clef === 'treble'; });
        var bassNotes = measure.notes.filter(function(n) { return n.clef === 'bass'; });
        var isPickup = !!measure.pickup;
        var trebleEmpty = trebleNotes.length === 0 && bassNotes.length > 0;
        var bassEmpty = bassNotes.length === 0 && trebleNotes.length > 0;
        var measureKey = smrGetActiveKey(i, data.key);
        var tVN = trebleEmpty ? [] : (isPickup ? smrBuildVoiceNotes(trebleNotes, measureKey, 'treble', i) : smrBuildVoiceWithRests(trebleNotes, measureKey, 'treble', totalBeats, i));
        var bVN = bassEmpty ? [] : (isPickup ? smrBuildVoiceNotes(bassNotes, measureKey, 'bass', i) : smrBuildVoiceWithRests(bassNotes, measureKey, 'bass', totalBeats, i));
        try {
          var tp = (data.timeSig || '4/4').split('/'), bd = parseInt(tp[1]) || 4;
          var tBG = [new VF.Fraction(1, bd)], hasSext = bassNotes.length >= 6 && bassNotes.some(function(n) { return Math.abs(n.dur - 0.33) < 0.05; });
          var bBG = [new VF.Fraction(2, 4)];
          if (tVN.length > 0) {
            var tB = VF.Beam.generateBeams(tVN, { groups: tBG });
            var v1 = new VF.Voice({ num_beats: quarterBeatsPerMeasure, beat_value: 4 }).setStrict(false);
            v1.addTickables(tVN);
            new VF.Formatter().joinVoices([v1]).format([v1], (x + staveWidth) - treble.getNoteStartX() - 15);
            v1.draw(context, treble);
            for (var bi = 0; bi < tB.length; bi++) tB[bi].setContext(context).draw();
          }
          if (bVN.length > 0) {
            var manBeams = [];
            if (hasSext && bassNotes.length >= 6) {
              var singles = [];
              for (var tn = 0; tn < bVN.length; tn++) { var bvn = bVN[tn]; if (bvn.noteType === 'n' && bvn.getKeys().length === 1) singles.push(bvn); }
              for (var rn = 0; rn < singles.length; rn++) singles[rn].setStemDirection(VF.Stem.DOWN);
              var rem = singles.slice(), fg = rem.length % 6;
              if (fg > 0 && fg < rem.length) { var pg = rem.splice(0, fg); try { manBeams.push(new VF.Beam(pg)); } catch(e) {} }
              while (rem.length >= 6) { var grp = rem.splice(0, 6); try { new VF.Tuplet(grp, {num_notes:6,notes_occupied:4,bracketed:false,ratioed:false}); manBeams.push(new VF.Beam(grp)); } catch(e) {} }
            }
            var bB = manBeams.length > 0 ? manBeams : VF.Beam.generateBeams(bVN, { groups: bBG });
            var v2 = new VF.Voice({ num_beats: quarterBeatsPerMeasure, beat_value: 4 }).setStrict(false);
            v2.addTickables(bVN);
            new VF.Formatter().joinVoices([v2]).format([v2], (x + staveWidth) - bass.getNoteStartX() - 15);
            v2.draw(context, bass);
            for (var bi2 = 0; bi2 < bB.length; bi2++) bB[bi2].setContext(context).draw();
          }
        } catch (e) { console.warn('VexFlow error m' + (i+1) + ':', e.message); }
      }
    }
    // Text annotations
    var svgEl = pageContainer.querySelector('svg');
    if (svgEl && smrCurrentTextData) {
      var ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
      if (pageIdx === 0 && smrCurrentTextData.pageAnnotations) {
        for (var pa = 0; pa < smrCurrentTextData.pageAnnotations.length; pa++) {
          var ann = smrCurrentTextData.pageAnnotations[pa];
          var te = document.createElementNS(ns, 'text');
          te.setAttribute('x', Math.round(ann.x)); te.setAttribute('y', Math.round(ann.y));
          te.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'hanging');
          te.setAttribute('fill', (ann.style && ann.style.color) || 'currentColor');
          te.setAttribute('text-anchor', ann.anchor === 'center' ? 'middle' : ann.anchor === 'right' ? 'end' : 'start');
          te.setAttribute('font-size', Math.round(((ann.style && ann.style.fontSize) || 14) * 2));
          te.setAttribute('font-weight', (ann.style && ann.style.fontWeight) || 'normal');
          te.setAttribute('font-style', (ann.style && ann.style.fontStyle) || 'normal');
          te.setAttribute('font-family', (ann.style && ann.style.fontFamily) || 'serif');
          te.textContent = ann.text;
          svgEl.appendChild(te);
        }
      }
      var pFM = pageSystems[0].startIdx, pLM = pageSystems[pageSystems.length-1].startIdx + pageSystems[pageSystems.length-1].count - 1;
      if (smrCurrentTextData.measureAnnotations) {
        for (var ma = 0; ma < smrCurrentTextData.measureAnnotations.length; ma++) {
          var mann = smrCurrentTextData.measureAnnotations[ma];
          if (mann.measure < pFM || mann.measure > pLM || mann.type === 'tuplet') continue;
          var te2 = document.createElementNS(ns, 'text');
          te2.setAttribute('x', Math.round(mann.x)); te2.setAttribute('y', Math.round(mann.y));
          te2.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'hanging'); te2.setAttribute('fill', 'currentColor');
          var mfs = (mann.style && mann.style.fontSize) || 12;
          if (mann.type === 'dynamics') mfs *= 1.6; if (mann.type === 'technique') mfs *= 2;
          te2.setAttribute('font-size', Math.round(mfs));
          te2.setAttribute('font-weight', mann.type === 'dynamics' ? 'normal' : ((mann.style && mann.style.fontWeight) || 'normal'));
          te2.setAttribute('font-style', mann.type === 'dynamics' ? 'italic' : ((mann.style && mann.style.fontStyle) || 'normal'));
          if (mann.type === 'dynamics') te2.setAttribute('font-family', "'Times New Roman','Georgia',serif");
          te2.textContent = mann.text;
          svgEl.appendChild(te2);
        }
      }
      if (smrCurrentTextData.octaveShifts && smrCurrentTextData.measureAnnotations) {
        for (var osi = 0; osi < smrCurrentTextData.octaveShifts.length; osi++) {
          var osR = smrCurrentTextData.octaveShifts[osi].measureRange;
          if (!osR) continue;
          var eAnn = null;
          for (var oai = 0; oai < smrCurrentTextData.measureAnnotations.length; oai++) { var oa = smrCurrentTextData.measureAnnotations[oai]; if (oa.text === '8va' && oa.measure === osR[0]) { eAnn = oa; break; } }
          if (!eAnn || eAnn.measure < pFM || eAnn.measure > pLM) continue;
          // find end measure position
          var eMP = null;
          for (var esi = 0; esi < pageSystems.length; esi++) { var esl = pageSystems[esi]; if (osR[1] >= esl.startIdx && osR[1] < esl.startIdx + esl.count) { var eri = osR[1] - esl.startIdx; var egS = globalSysIdx + esi; var erow = (w_clause[egS] || null); var eX = ((egS === 0) ? leftMargin + firstSystemIndent : leftMargin); var eW = 0; if (erow && erow.length === esl.count) { for (var ewi = 0; ewi < eri; ewi++) eX += erow[ewi]; eW = erow[eri]; } else { eX += eri * (svgWidth - eX - rightMargin) / esl.count; eW = (svgWidth - eX - rightMargin) / esl.count; } eMP = { x: eX, width: eW }; break; } }
          if (!eMP) continue;
          var dl = document.createElementNS(ns, 'line');
          dl.setAttribute('x1', Math.round(eAnn.x + 50)); dl.setAttribute('y1', Math.round(eAnn.y + 5));
          dl.setAttribute('x2', Math.round(eMP.x + eMP.width - 10)); dl.setAttribute('y2', Math.round(eAnn.y + 5));
          dl.setAttribute('stroke', 'currentColor'); dl.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2'); dl.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray', '6,4');
          svgEl.appendChild(dl);
        }
      }
      if (smrCurrentTextData.pedalMarkings) {
        for (var pm = 0; pm < smrCurrentTextData.pedalMarkings.length; pm++) {
          var ped = smrCurrentTextData.pedalMarkings[pm];
          if (ped.page !== pageIdx + 1) continue;
          var pe = document.createElementNS(ns, 'text');
          pe.setAttribute('x', Math.round(ped.x)); pe.setAttribute('y', Math.round(ped.y + 30));
          pe.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'hanging'); pe.setAttribute('fill', 'currentColor');
          if (ped.type === 'ped') { pe.setAttribute('font-size', 21); pe.setAttribute('font-style', 'italic'); pe.setAttribute('font-family', 'serif'); pe.textContent = 'Ped.'; }
          else { pe.setAttribute('font-size', 24); pe.textContent = '\u273B'; }
          svgEl.appendChild(pe);
        }
      }
    }
    // viewBox + dark theme
    var fSvg = pageContainer.querySelector('svg');
    if (fSvg) {
      fSvg.setAttribute('viewBox', '0 0 ' + svgWidth + ' ' + h_pdf);
      fSvg.removeAttribute('width'); fSvg.removeAttribute('height');
      fSvg.style.width = '100%'; fSvg.style.height = 'auto'; fSvg.style.display = 'block'; fSvg.style.background = 'transparent';
      var els = fSvg.querySelectorAll('path, text, line, rect');
      for (var ei = 0; ei < els.length; ei++) {
        var el = els[ei], stroke = el.getAttribute('stroke'), fill = el.getAttribute('fill');
        if (stroke && stroke !== 'none' && stroke !== 'transparent') el.setAttribute('stroke', '#ffffff');
        if (fill && fill !== 'none' && fill !== 'transparent') el.setAttribute('fill', '#ffffff');
      }
      fSvg.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(function(el) { var cs = getComputedStyle(el); if (cs.fill === 'rgb(0, 0, 0)') el.style.fill = '#ffffff'; if (cs.stroke === 'rgb(0, 0, 0)') el.style.stroke = '#ffffff'; });
    }
    globalSysIdx += pageRows;
  }
}

// Playback
function smrStartPlayback() {
  if (!smrCurrentJson || smrMeasurePositionMap.length === 0 || typeof Tone === 'undefined') return;
  Tone.start();
  var data = smrCurrentJson, bpm = data.tempo || 120;
  smrPlaybackState.bpm = bpm; Tone.Transport.bpm.value = bpm;
  if (smrPlaybackState.playing) return;
  if (!smrPlaybackState.synth) {
    smrPlaybackState.synth = new Tone.PolySynth(Tone.Synth, { maxPolyphony: 32, voice: Tone.Synth, options: { oscillator: { type: 'triangle8' }, envelope: { attack: 0.005, decay: 0.3, sustain: 0.4, release: 0.8 } } }).toDestination();
    smrPlaybackState.synth.volume.value = -6;
  }
  var lastMap = smrMeasurePositionMap[smrMeasurePositionMap.length - 1];
  smrPlaybackState.totalBeats = lastMap.startBeat + lastMap.beatsPerMeasure;
  var spb = 60 / bpm; smrPlaybackState.scheduledIds = [];
  for (var mi = 0; mi < data.measures.length; mi++) {
    var m = data.measures[mi]; if (!m || !m.notes) continue;
    var pe = null; for (var pi = 0; pi < smrMeasurePositionMap.length; pi++) { if (smrMeasurePositionMap[pi].measureIdx === mi) { pe = smrMeasurePositionMap[pi]; break; } }
    if (!pe) continue;
    for (var ni = 0; ni < m.notes.length; ni++) {
      var note = m.notes[ni], at = (pe.startBeat + note.beat) * spb, ds = note.dur * spb;
      var freq = Tone.Frequency(note.midi, 'midi').toFrequency(), vel = note.vel != null ? Math.max(0.05, note.vel / 127) : 0.7;
      smrPlaybackState.scheduledIds.push(Tone.Transport.schedule((function(f,d,v) { return function(t) { if (smrPlaybackState.synth) smrPlaybackState.synth.triggerAttackRelease(f,d,t,v); }; })(freq, Math.min(ds,4), vel), at));
    }
  }
  if (smrPlaybackState.pauseTime > 0) Tone.Transport.start('+0', smrPlaybackState.pauseTime);
  else Tone.Transport.start('+0', 0);
  smrPlaybackState.playing = true;
  smrPlaybackState.startTime = Tone.now() - (smrPlaybackState.pauseTime || 0);
  document.getElementById('smrBtnPlay').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('smrBtnPause').style.display = '';
  document.getElementById('smrBtnStop').disabled = false;
  smrAnimateCursor();
  Tone.Transport.schedule(function() { smrStopPlayback(); }, smrPlaybackState.totalBeats * spb + 0.1);
}
function smrPausePlayback() {
  if (!smrPlaybackState.playing) return;
  smrPlaybackState.pauseTime = Tone.Transport.seconds; Tone.Transport.pause();
  smrPlaybackState.playing = false;
  document.getElementById('smrBtnPlay').style.display = ''; document.getElementById('smrBtnPause').style.display = 'none';
  if (smrPlaybackState.animFrame) cancelAnimationFrame(smrPlaybackState.animFrame);
}
function smrStopPlayback() {
  if (typeof Tone !== 'undefined') { Tone.Transport.stop(); Tone.Transport.cancel(); }
  smrPlaybackState.playing = false; smrPlaybackState.pauseTime = 0; smrPlaybackState.scheduledIds = [];
  document.getElementById('smrBtnPlay').style.display = ''; document.getElementById('smrBtnPause').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('smrBtnStop').disabled = true;
  if (smrPlaybackState.animFrame) cancelAnimationFrame(smrPlaybackState.animFrame);
  smrRemoveCursor(); smrUpdateTimeDisplay(0);
}
function smrAnimateCursor() {
  if (!smrPlaybackState.playing) return;
  var elapsed = Tone.Transport.seconds, spb = 60 / smrPlaybackState.bpm, cb = elapsed / spb;
  smrUpdateTimeDisplay(elapsed); smrUpdateCursorPosition(cb);
  if (cb < smrPlaybackState.totalBeats) smrPlaybackState.animFrame = requestAnimationFrame(smrAnimateCursor);
  else smrStopPlayback();
}
function smrUpdateTimeDisplay(elapsed) {
  var spb = 60 / smrPlaybackState.bpm, ts = smrPlaybackState.totalBeats * spb;
  var el = document.getElementById('smrTime');
  if (el) el.textContent = Math.floor(elapsed/60) + ':' + (Math.floor(elapsed%60)<10?'0':'') + Math.floor(elapsed%60) + ' / ' + Math.floor(ts/60) + ':' + (Math.floor(ts%60)<10?'0':'') + Math.floor(ts%60);
}
function smrUpdateCursorPosition(currentBeat) {
  var entry = null;
  for (var i = smrMeasurePositionMap.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (currentBeat >= smrMeasurePositionMap[i].startBeat - 0.01) { entry = smrMeasurePositionMap[i]; break; } }
  if (!entry) return;
  var frac = Math.min(1, (currentBeat - entry.startBeat) / entry.beatsPerMeasure);
  var cX = entry.x + frac * entry.width, cY = entry.y;
  var sc = document.getElementById('smrVexflowContainer'); if (!sc) return;
  var svg = sc.querySelector('svg'); if (!svg) return;
  var ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
  var cur = svg.querySelector('#smr-playback-cursor');
  if (!cur) { cur = document.createElementNS(ns, 'line'); cur.setAttribute('id', 'smr-playback-cursor'); cur.setAttribute('stroke', '#ef4444'); cur.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2'); cur.setAttribute('stroke-opacity', '0.8'); svg.appendChild(cur); }
  cur.setAttribute('x1', Math.round(cX)); cur.setAttribute('x2', Math.round(cX));
  cur.setAttribute('y1', Math.round(cY - 5)); cur.setAttribute('y2', Math.round(cY + 210));
  var viewer = document.getElementById('smrViewer');
  if (viewer && viewer.scrollHeight > viewer.clientHeight) {
    var sr = svg.getBoundingClientRect(), vb = svg.viewBox.baseVal, scale = sr.height / vb.height;
    var csY = (cY * scale) + sr.top - viewer.getBoundingClientRect().top + viewer.scrollTop;
    if (csY > viewer.scrollTop + viewer.clientHeight - 60 || csY < viewer.scrollTop + 30) viewer.scrollTop = csY - 80;
  }
}
function smrRemoveCursor() {
  var sc = document.getElementById('smrVexflowContainer'); if (!sc) return;
  var cur = sc.querySelector('#smr-playback-cursor'); if (cur) cur.remove();
}

// Library browser
function loadSMRLibrary() {
  fetch('/api/smr/library').then(function(r) { return r.json(); }).then(function(data) {
    var el = document.getElementById('smrTree');
    while (el.firstChild) el.removeChild(el.firstChild);
    smrRenderTree(data, el);
  }).catch(function() {
    document.getElementById('smrTree').textContent = 'No sheets found \u2014 is SheetMusicReader running?';
  });
}
function smrRenderTree(items, container) {
  for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
    var item = items[i];
    if (item.type === 'directory') {
      var dir = document.createElement('div'); dir.className = 'smr-tree-dir';
      var label = document.createElement('div'); label.className = 'smr-tree-dir-label';
      var arrow = document.createElement('span'); arrow.className = 'arrow'; arrow.textContent = '\u25BC';
      label.appendChild(arrow);
      var ns2 = document.createElement('span'); ns2.textContent = ' ' + item.name; label.appendChild(ns2);
      label.addEventListener('click', (function(d) { return function() { d.classList.toggle('collapsed'); }; })(dir));
      dir.appendChild(label);
      var ch = document.createElement('div'); ch.className = 'smr-tree-children';
      if (item.children) smrRenderTree(item.children, ch);
      dir.appendChild(ch); container.appendChild(dir);
    } else {
      var file = document.createElement('div'); file.className = 'smr-tree-file';
      file.setAttribute('data-path', item.path);
      var dots = document.createElement('span'); dots.className = 'status-dots';
      var dotC = document.createElement('span'); dotC.className = 'status-dot ' + (item.hasClaude ? 'claude' : 'pending'); dotC.title = item.hasClaude ? 'Claude: done' : 'pending';
      var dotG = document.createElement('span'); dotG.className = 'status-dot ' + (item.hasGemini ? 'gemini' : 'pending'); dotG.title = item.hasGemini ? 'Gemini: done' : 'pending';
      dots.appendChild(dotC); dots.appendChild(dotG); file.appendChild(dots);
      var fn = document.createElement('span'); fn.textContent = item.name; file.appendChild(fn);
      file.addEventListener('click', (function(p, hc) { return function() { selectSMRFile(p, hc); }; })(item.path, item.hasClaude));
      container.appendChild(file);
    }
  }
}
function selectSMRFile(filePath, hasJson) {
  smrCurrentFile = filePath; smrCurrentJson = null; smrCurrentLayout = null; smrCurrentTextData = null;
  smrStopPlayback();
  document.querySelectorAll('.smr-tree-file').forEach(function(f) { f.classList.remove('active'); });
  var active = document.querySelector('.smr-tree-file[data-path="' + CSS.escape(filePath) + '"]');
  if (active) active.classList.add('active');
  if (hasJson) {
    var jp = filePath.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '.json'), lp = filePath.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '.layout.json'), tp = filePath.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '.text.json');
    Promise.all([
      fetch('/api/smr/output/claude/' + jp).then(function(r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : null; }).catch(function() { return null; }),
      fetch('/api/smr/output/claude/' + lp).then(function(r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : null; }).catch(function() { return null; }),
      fetch('/api/smr/output/claude/' + tp).then(function(r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : null; }).catch(function() { return null; })
    ]).then(function(results) {
      smrCurrentJson = results[0]; smrCurrentLayout = results[1]; smrCurrentTextData = results[2];
      if (smrCurrentJson) {
        smrRenderVexFlowInto(document.getElementById('smrVexflowContainer'));
        var info = document.getElementById('smrInfoBar');
        info.textContent = (smrCurrentJson.title || filePath) + (smrCurrentJson.key ? ' \u00B7 ' + smrCurrentJson.key : '') + (smrCurrentJson.tempo ? ' \u00B7 \u266A=' + smrCurrentJson.tempo : '') + (smrCurrentJson.timeSig ? ' \u00B7 ' + smrCurrentJson.timeSig : '');
        smrToggleView('svg');
      }
    });
  } else {
    document.getElementById('smrVexflowContainer').textContent = 'No VexFlow data \u2014 select a converted file';
    document.getElementById('smrInfoBar').textContent = filePath;
  }
}
function smrToggleView(mode) {
  smrViewMode = mode;
  var vf = document.getElementById('smrVexflowContainer'), pdf = document.getElementById('smrPdfContainer');
  var bs = document.getElementById('smrBtnSvg'), bp = document.getElementById('smrBtnPdf');
  if (mode === 'svg') { vf.style.display = ''; pdf.style.display = 'none'; bs.classList.add('active'); bp.classList.remove('active'); }
  else { vf.style.display = 'none'; pdf.style.display = ''; bs.classList.remove('active'); bp.classList.add('active'); if (pdf.children.length === 0 && smrCurrentFile && typeof pdfjsLib !== 'undefined') smrRenderPdf(smrCurrentFile); }
}
function smrRenderPdf(filePath) {
  var container = document.getElementById('smrPdfContainer');
  container.textContent = 'Loading PDF...';
  pdfjsLib.getDocument('/api/smr/library-file/' + filePath).promise.then(function(pdf) {
    while (container.firstChild) container.removeChild(container.firstChild);
    for (var p = 1; p <= pdf.numPages; p++) {
      (function(pn) { pdf.getPage(pn).then(function(page) { var vp = page.getViewport({ scale: 1.5 }); var c = document.createElement('canvas'); c.width = vp.width; c.height = vp.height; container.appendChild(c); page.render({ canvasContext: c.getContext('2d'), viewport: vp }); }); })(p);
    }
  }).catch(function() { container.textContent = 'Failed to load PDF'; });
}
function smrToggleTree() {
  document.getElementById('smrTree').classList.toggle('collapsed');
  document.getElementById('smrBtnTree').classList.toggle('active');
}

// Keep old currentScore var for backward compat with loadScoreToTargets
var currentScore = null;

function renderTree(parent, items) {
  items.forEach(function(item) {
    if (item.type === 'folder') {
      var folder = document.createElement('div');
      folder.className = 'score-tree-folder';
      var name = document.createElement('div');
      name.className = 'score-tree-folder-name';
      name.innerHTML = '<span style="font-size:10px;">📁</span> ' + item.name;
      var children = document.createElement('div');
      children.className = 'score-tree-children';
      name.onclick = function() { children.style.display = children.style.display === 'none' ? '' : 'none'; };
      folder.appendChild(name);
      folder.appendChild(children);
      renderTree(children, item.children);
      parent.appendChild(folder);
    } else {
      var file = document.createElement('div');
      file.className = 'score-tree-file';
      file.innerHTML = '<span style="font-size:10px;">♫</span> ' + item.name;
      file.onclick = function() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.score-tree-file.active').forEach(function(f) { f.classList.remove('active'); });
        file.classList.add('active');
        loadScore(item.path);
      };
      parent.appendChild(file);
    }
  });
}

function loadScore(filePath) {
  fetch('/sheets/' + filePath).then(function(r) { return r.json(); }).then(function(score) {
    currentScore = score;
    var preview = document.getElementById('scorePreview');
    preview.style.display = '';
    var info = document.getElementById('scoreInfo');
    info.innerHTML = '<div class="title">' + score.title + '</div>' +
      '<div class="composer">' + score.composer + '</div>' +
      '<div class="meta">' + score.key + ' · ' + score.timeSig + ' · ♩ = ' + score.tempo + '</div>';
    drawScorePreview(score);
  });
}

function drawScorePreview(score) {
  var canvas = document.getElementById('scoreCanvas');
  var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  var dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  if (!rect.width) return;
  var measuresPerLine = 2;
  var lineH = 90;
  var lines = Math.ceil(score.measures.length / measuresPerLine);
  var totalH = lines * lineH + 20;
  canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;
  canvas.height = totalH * dpr;
  ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
  var W = rect.width;

  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, totalH);
  ctx.fillStyle = '#050508';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, totalH);

  var staffSpacing = 6;
  var measureW = (W - 20) / measuresPerLine;

  for (var line = 0; line < lines; line++) {
    var baseY = line * lineH + 20;

    // Draw treble staff lines
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#444';
    ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
    for (var s = 0; s < 5; s++) {
      var y = baseY + s * staffSpacing;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(10, y); ctx.lineTo(W - 10, y); ctx.stroke();
    }
    // Bass staff
    var bassBaseY = baseY + 5 * staffSpacing + 10;
    for (var s = 0; s < 5; s++) {
      var y = bassBaseY + s * staffSpacing;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(10, y); ctx.lineTo(W - 10, y); ctx.stroke();
    }

    // Clef symbols
    ctx.fillStyle = '#888';
    ctx.font = '18px serif';
    ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD1E', 2, baseY + 3 * staffSpacing + 2); // treble clef
    ctx.font = '14px serif';
    ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD22', 2, bassBaseY + 2 * staffSpacing + 2); // bass clef

    // Draw notes for each measure in this line
    for (var m = 0; m < measuresPerLine; m++) {
      var mIdx = line * measuresPerLine + m;
      if (mIdx >= score.measures.length) break;
      var measure = score.measures[mIdx];
      var mX = 10 + m * measureW;

      // Measure bar line
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#555';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(mX + measureW, baseY);
      ctx.lineTo(mX + measureW, bassBaseY + 4 * staffSpacing);
      ctx.stroke();

      // Draw notes
      var beatsInMeasure = score.beatsPerMeasure || parseInt(score.timeSig.split('/')[0]);
      measure.notes.forEach(function(note) {
        var noteX = mX + 16 + (note.beat / beatsInMeasure) * (measureW - 24);
        // Use clef field to force staff, else auto by MIDI
        var forceBass = note.clef === 'bass';
        var noteY = forceBass
          ? scoreNoteY(note.midi, bassBaseY - 100, bassBaseY, staffSpacing) // force bass rendering
          : scoreNoteY(note.midi, baseY, bassBaseY, staffSpacing);

        // Color mode: velocity-based coloring
        if (scoreColorMode) {
          var vel = note.vel || 80;
          ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(vel);
        } else {
          ctx.fillStyle = note.clef === 'bass' ? '#999999' : '#DDDDDD';
        }

        // Accidental symbol
        if (note.acc) {
          ctx.font = '10px serif';
          ctx.fillText(note.acc === '#' ? '\u266F' : '\u266D', noteX - 10, noteY + 3);
        }

        // Note head — filled for short, hollow for long
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.ellipse(noteX, noteY, 4, 3, -0.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        if (note.dur >= 2) {
          ctx.strokeStyle = ctx.fillStyle;
          ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
          ctx.stroke();
        } else {
          ctx.fill();
        }

        // Stem
        ctx.strokeStyle = ctx.fillStyle;
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.beginPath();
        if (noteY > baseY + 2 * staffSpacing) {
          ctx.moveTo(noteX + 3.5, noteY);
          ctx.lineTo(noteX + 3.5, noteY - 20);
        } else {
          ctx.moveTo(noteX - 3.5, noteY);
          ctx.lineTo(noteX - 3.5, noteY + 20);
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        // Ledger lines if needed
        drawScoreLedgerLines(ctx, noteX, noteY, baseY, bassBaseY, staffSpacing);
      });
    }
  }
}

function scoreNoteY(midi, trebleBaseY, bassBaseY, sp) {
  // Map MIDI to staff Y using diatonic coordinate system
  // Treble lines: E4(64)=bottom, F5(77)=top
  // Bass lines: G2(43)=bottom, A3(57)=top
  var NOTE_OFFSETS = { 0:0, 2:1, 4:2, 5:3, 7:4, 9:5, 11:6 }; // C,D,E,F,G,A,B
  var pc = midi % 12;
  var octave = Math.floor(midi / 12) - 1;
  // Black keys map to the lower natural's diatonic position
  var diatonic = NOTE_OFFSETS[pc] !== undefined ? NOTE_OFFSETS[pc] : NOTE_OFFSETS[pc - 1];
  var stepsFromC4 = (octave - 4) * 7 + diatonic;

  // Treble: E4 = step 2, bottom line (trebleBaseY + 4*sp)
  if (trebleBaseY < bassBaseY && midi >= 60) {
    return trebleBaseY + 4 * sp - (stepsFromC4 - 2) * (sp / 2);
  }
  // Bass: D3 = step -5, middle line (bassBaseY + 2*sp)
  return bassBaseY + 2 * sp - (stepsFromC4 + 5) * (sp / 2);
}

function drawScoreLedgerLines(ctx, x, y, trebleBase, bassBase, sp) {
  var trebleBottom = trebleBase + 4 * sp;
  var bassTop = bassBase;
  var bassBottom = bassBase + 4 * sp;
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#666';
  ctx.lineWidth = 0.8;

  // Above treble
  for (var ly = trebleBase - sp; ly >= y - 1; ly -= sp) {
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x - 6, ly); ctx.lineTo(x + 6, ly); ctx.stroke();
  }
  // Below treble / above bass (middle C area)
  for (var ly = trebleBottom + sp; ly <= y + 1; ly += sp) {
    if (ly < bassTop) {
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x - 6, ly); ctx.lineTo(x + 6, ly); ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
  // Below bass
  for (var ly = bassBottom + sp; ly <= y + 1; ly += sp) {
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x - 6, ly); ctx.lineTo(x + 6, ly); ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function loadScoreToTargets() {
  if (!currentScore) return;
  // Clear existing targets
  targetNotes.length = 0;

  var tempo = currentScore.tempo;
  var msPerBeat = 60000 / tempo;
  var timeSigParts = currentScore.timeSig.split('/');
  var beatsPerMeasure = parseInt(timeSigParts[0]);
  var startMs = Date.now() + 2000; // 2 second lead-in

  // Set staff tempo/time sig/scale to match score
  document.getElementById('bpmSlider').value = tempo;
  document.getElementById('bpmVal').textContent = tempo;
  var timeSigSelect = document.getElementById('staffTimeSig');
  for (var i = 0; i < timeSigSelect.options.length; i++) {
    if (timeSigSelect.options[i].value === currentScore.timeSig) {
      timeSigSelect.selectedIndex = i; break;
    }
  }
  var scaleSelect = document.getElementById('staffScale');
  for (var i = 0; i < scaleSelect.options.length; i++) {
    if (scaleSelect.options[i].value === currentScore.key) {
      scaleSelect.selectedIndex = i; break;
    }
  }

  // Map dynamics markings to MIDI velocity
  var dynamicsToVelocity = { 'ppp': 16, 'pp': 32, 'p': 48, 'mp': 64, 'mf': 80, 'f': 96, 'ff': 112, 'fff': 127 };
  var currentVelocity = dynamicsToVelocity[currentScore.dynamics] || 64;

  currentScore.measures.forEach(function(measure, mIdx) {
    if (measure.dynamics && dynamicsToVelocity[measure.dynamics]) {
      currentVelocity = dynamicsToVelocity[measure.dynamics];
    }
    var measureStartMs = startMs + mIdx * beatsPerMeasure * msPerBeat;
    measure.notes.forEach(function(note) {
      targetNotes.push({
        midi: note.midi,
        arriveMs: measureStartMs + note.beat * msPerBeat,
        durationBeats: note.dur,
        velocity: note.velocity || currentVelocity,
        hit: false
      });
    });
  });

  // Update button
  document.getElementById('scoreLoadBtn').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('scoreLoadBtn').textContent = 'Loaded (' + targetNotes.length + ' notes)';
  setTimeout(function() {
    document.getElementById('scoreLoadBtn').classList.remove('active');
    document.getElementById('scoreLoadBtn').textContent = 'Load as Target Notes';
  }, 3000);
}

var drillStartTime = 0;

var STAGE_NAMES = {
  1: 'STAGE 1: SINGLE FINGER',
  2: 'STAGE 2: TWO FINGERS',
  3: 'STAGE 3: FIVE-FINGER PATTERNS',
  4: 'STAGE 4: SCALES & ARPEGGIOS',
  5: 'STAGE 5: CHORDS & VOICING',
  6: 'STAGE 6: ADVANCED TECHNIQUE',
  7: 'STAGE 7: MUSICAL APPLICATION'
};

var selectedStage = 1;

// Build drill catalog UI — filtered by selected stage
function buildDrillCatalog() {
  var container = document.getElementById('drillCatalogList');
  if (!container) return;
  container.innerHTML = '';
  DRILL_CATALOG.forEach(function(d) {
    if (d.stage !== selectedStage) return;
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'drill-card';
    card.id = 'drill-' + d.id;
    card.onclick = function() { selectDrill(d.id); };
    card.innerHTML = '<div class="drill-id">' + d.id + '</div>' +
      '<div class="drill-name">' + d.name + '</div>' +
      '<div class="drill-desc">' + d.desc + '</div>';
    container.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function selectStage(stageNum) {
  selectedStage = stageNum;
  var tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.stage-tab');
  tabs.forEach(function(t, i) {
    if (i + 1 === stageNum) t.classList.add('active');
    else t.classList.remove('active');
  });
  // Hide settings when switching stages
  document.getElementById('drillSettings').style.display = 'none';
  buildDrillCatalog();
}

function switchRightTab(tab) {
  var tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.right-tab');
  var contents = document.querySelectorAll('.right-tab-content');
  tabs.forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
  contents.forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('active'); });
  var stageTabs = document.getElementById('stageTabs');
  if (tab === 'drills') {
    tabs[0].classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('drillsTab').classList.add('active');
    if (stageTabs) stageTabs.style.display = '';
  } else {
    tabs[1].classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('scoresTab').classList.add('active');
    if (stageTabs) stageTabs.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

function selectDrill(drillId) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.drill-card').forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('active'); });
  var card = document.getElementById('drill-' + drillId);
  if (card) card.classList.add('active');
  activeDrill = drillId;

  var drill = DRILL_CATALOG.find(function(d) { return d.id === drillId; });
  if (!drill) return;

  var settings = document.getElementById('drillSettings');
  settings.style.display = '';

  // Show/hide controls based on drill settings
  var dynLabel = document.getElementById('drillDynamicLabel');
  dynLabel.style.display = drill.settings.indexOf('dynamic') >= 0 ? '' : 'none';
  var keyLabel = document.getElementById('drillKeyLabel');
  keyLabel.style.display = drill.settings.indexOf('key') >= 0 ? '' : 'none';
  var noteLabel = document.getElementById('drillNote').parentElement;
  noteLabel.style.display = drill.settings.indexOf('note') >= 0 ? '' : 'none';

  document.getElementById('drillResult').style.display = 'none';
  var btn = document.getElementById('drillStartBtn');
  btn.textContent = drillRunning ? 'Stop Drill' : 'Start Drill';
}

// ---- Note generators for each drill type ----

function generateDrillNotes(drillId, root, bpm, measures, beatsPerMeasure, targetVel, key) {
  var notes = [];
  var msPerBeat = 60000 / bpm;
  var startMs = Date.now() + 2000;
  var totalBeats = measures * beatsPerMeasure;
  var keyRoot = KEY_ROOTS[key] || 60;
  var scale = SCALES[key] || SCALES.C;

  function scaleNote(degree) {
    var octave = Math.floor(degree / scale.length);
    var idx = ((degree % scale.length) + scale.length) % scale.length;
    return keyRoot + octave * 12 + scale[idx];
  }

  function pushNote(beat, midi, dur, vel) {
    notes.push({ midi: midi, arriveMs: startMs + beat * msPerBeat, durationBeats: dur, velocity: vel || 64, hit: false });
  }

  switch (drillId) {
    case '1-1': // Tempo — single note on every beat
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '1-2': // Strength — single note at target velocity
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 0.5, targetVel);
      break;

    case '1-3': // Staccato — short notes (0.25 beat duration)
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 0.25, 64);
      break;

    case '1-4': // Legato Hold — long notes (full beat)
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 1.0, 64);
      break;

    case '1-5': // Dynamics Ramp — pp to ff crescendo
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var vel = Math.round(30 + (b / Math.max(1, totalBeats - 1)) * 90);
        pushNote(b, root, 0.5, vel);
      }
      break;

    case '2-1': // Alternating — two adjacent notes
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, b % 2 === 0 ? root : root + 2, 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '2-2': // Trill — rapid alternation (eighth notes)
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats * 2; b++) pushNote(b * 0.5, b % 2 === 0 ? root : root + 2, 0.25, 64);
      break;

    case '2-3': // Legato Connect — pairs of connected notes
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b += 2) {
        pushNote(b, root, 1.0, 64);
        if (b + 1 < totalBeats) pushNote(b + 1, root + 2, 1.0, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '3-1': // Five-Finger Scale — up then down
      var fiveUp = [0, 2, 4, 5, 7];
      var fivePattern = fiveUp.concat(fiveUp.slice(0, 4).reverse());
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var idx = b % fivePattern.length;
        pushNote(b, root + fivePattern[idx], 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '3-2': // Finger Independence — random within 5-note position
      var fiveNotes = [root, root+2, root+4, root+5, root+7];
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        pushNote(b, fiveNotes[Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)], 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '3-3': // Thumb Under — ascending with crossover pattern
      var thumbPattern = [0, 2, 4, 5, 7, 9, 11, 12];
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        pushNote(b, root + thumbPattern[b % thumbPattern.length], 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '4-1': // Major Scale 1 octave — up then down
      var upDown = [];
      for (var i = 0; i <= scale.length; i++) upDown.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var i = scale.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) upDown.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, upDown[b % upDown.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '4-2': // Major Scale 2 octaves
      var upDown2 = [];
      for (var i = 0; i <= scale.length * 2; i++) upDown2.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var i = scale.length * 2 - 1; i >= 0; i--) upDown2.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, upDown2[b % upDown2.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '4-3': // Minor scale — uses key's minor scale
      var minUp = [];
      for (var i = 0; i <= scale.length; i++) minUp.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var i = scale.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) minUp.push(scaleNote(i));
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, minUp[b % minUp.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '4-4': // Arpeggio — root, 3rd, 5th, octave
      var arp = [scaleNote(0), scaleNote(2), scaleNote(4), scaleNote(7),
                 scaleNote(4), scaleNote(2)];
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, arp[b % arp.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '4-5': // Chromatic — all 12 semitones
      var chrom = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < 13; i++) chrom.push(root + i);
      for (var i = 11; i >= 0; i--) chrom.push(root + i);
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, chrom[b % chrom.length], 0.5, 64);
      break;

    case '5-1': // Block Chords — triads on each beat
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var deg = b % 4; // I, IV, V, I
        var chordRoot = [0, 3, 4, 0][deg];
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(chordRoot), 1.0, 64);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(chordRoot + 2), 1.0, 64);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(chordRoot + 4), 1.0, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '5-2': // Broken Chords — arpeggiated triads
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b += 3) {
        var deg = Math.floor(b / 3) % 4;
        var cr = [0, 3, 4, 0][deg];
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(cr), 0.5, 64);
        if (b+1 < totalBeats) pushNote(b+1, scaleNote(cr+2), 0.5, 64);
        if (b+2 < totalBeats) pushNote(b+2, scaleNote(cr+4), 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '5-3': // Chord Progressions — I-IV-V-I, one chord per measure
      for (var m = 0; m < measures; m++) {
        var deg = [0, 3, 4, 0][m % 4];
        for (var beat = 0; beat < beatsPerMeasure; beat++) {
          var b = m * beatsPerMeasure + beat;
          if (beat === 0) {
            pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg), beatsPerMeasure, 64);
            pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg+2), beatsPerMeasure, 64);
            pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg+4), beatsPerMeasure, 64);
          }
        }
      }
      break;

    case '6-1': // Octaves — root + octave above
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        pushNote(b, root, 0.5, 64);
        pushNote(b, root + 12, 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '6-2': // Repeated Notes — same note with finger substitution (triplets)
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats * 3; b++) {
        pushNote(b / 3, root, 0.17, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '6-3': // Double Thirds — parallel thirds moving stepwise
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var deg = b % (scale.length + 1);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg), 0.5, 64);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg + 2), 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '6-4': // Hand Independence — RH melody over LH steady pulse
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        // LH: root on every beat (low octave)
        pushNote(b, keyRoot - 12, 0.5, 48);
        // RH: scale melody
        if (b % 2 === 0) pushNote(b, scaleNote(b % 8), 0.5, 72);
      }
      break;

    case '7-1': // Sight Reading — random scale notes
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var deg = Math.floor(Math.random() * 8);
        pushNote(b, scaleNote(deg), 0.5, 64);
      }
      break;

    case '7-2': // Rhythm Patterns — mixed note values
      var rhythms = [1, 0.5, 0.5, 1, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5]; // pattern in beats
      var pos = 0;
      for (var i = 0; pos < totalBeats; i++) {
        var dur = rhythms[i % rhythms.length];
        pushNote(pos, root + [0,2,4,5,7,4,2,0][i % 8], dur * 0.9, 64);
        pos += dur;
      }
      break;

    case '7-3': // Expression — phrase with dynamics
      var phrase = [0, 2, 4, 7, 4, 2, 0, -1];
      var dynCurve = [48, 56, 72, 96, 80, 64, 48, 40];
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
        var idx = b % phrase.length;
        pushNote(b, root + phrase[idx], 0.75, dynCurve[idx]);
      }
      break;

    default:
      for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) pushNote(b, root, 0.5, 64);
  }
  return notes;
}

function startDrill() {
  if (drillRunning) { stopDrill(); return; }
  if (!activeDrill) return;

  var drill = DRILL_CATALOG.find(function(d) { return d.id === activeDrill; });
  if (!drill) return;

  var root = parseInt(document.getElementById('drillNote').value);
  var bpm = parseInt(document.getElementById('drillBpm').value) || 80;
  var measures = parseInt(document.getElementById('drillMeasures').value) || 8;
  var timeSigParts = (document.getElementById('staffTimeSig').value || '4/4').split('/');
  var beatsPerMeasure = parseInt(timeSigParts[0]) || 4;
  var targetVel = drill.settings.indexOf('dynamic') >= 0 ? parseInt(document.getElementById('drillDynamic').value) : null;
  var key = drill.settings.indexOf('key') >= 0 ? document.getElementById('drillKey').value : 'C';

  // Sync BPM slider
  document.getElementById('bpmSlider').value = bpm;
  document.getElementById('bpmVal').textContent = bpm;

  // Generate target notes
  targetNotes.length = 0;
  var generated = generateDrillNotes(activeDrill, root, bpm, measures, beatsPerMeasure, targetVel || 64, key);
  generated.forEach(function(n) { targetNotes.push(n); });

  drillRunning = true;
  drillStartTime = Date.now();
  drillHits = [];
  drillMisses = 0;

  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').textContent = 'Stop Drill';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.borderColor = 'var(--red, #f66)';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.color = 'var(--red, #f66)';
  document.getElementById('drillResult').style.display = 'none';

  // Auto-stop when drill ends
  var drillDuration = (generated.length > 0 ? generated[generated.length - 1].arriveMs - Date.now() + 3000 : 5000);
  setTimeout(function() { if (drillRunning && activeDrill === drill.id) finishDrill(); }, drillDuration);

  // Notify Gemini
  if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    var camNote = cameraEnabled ? ' Camera is active — watch my hand technique.' : '';
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'text', content: 'Starting drill ' + drill.id + ': ' + drill.name + ' (' + drill.desc + ').' + camNote }));
  }
}

function stopDrill() {
  drillRunning = false;
  targetNotes.length = 0;
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').textContent = 'Start Drill';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.borderColor = '';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.color = '';
}

function finishDrill() {
  if (!drillRunning) return;
  var result = evaluateDrill();
  stopDrill();
  showDrillResult(result);

  // Send result to Gemini for coaching
  if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'text', content:
      'Drill ' + result.drillId + ' finished. Grade: ' + result.grade +
      '. Accuracy: ' + result.accuracy + '%. Timing avg error: ' + result.avgTimingError + 'ms.' +
      ' Velocity avg error: ' + result.avgVelocityError +
      '. Please give brief coaching feedback.'
    }));
  }
}

function evaluateDrill() {
  var total = targetNotes.length;
  var hits = targetNotes.filter(function(n) { return n.hit; }).length;
  var accuracy = total > 0 ? Math.round(hits / total * 100) : 0;

  // Timing errors (how far off from target time)
  var timingErrors = [];
  var velErrors = [];
  targetNotes.forEach(function(n) {
    if (n.hit && n.hitTime) {
      timingErrors.push(Math.abs(n.hitTime - n.arriveMs));
    }
    if (n.hit && n.hitVelocity !== undefined) {
      velErrors.push(Math.abs(n.hitVelocity - n.velocity));
    }
  });

  var avgTiming = timingErrors.length > 0 ? Math.round(timingErrors.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0) / timingErrors.length) : 0;
  var avgVel = velErrors.length > 0 ? Math.round(velErrors.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0) / velErrors.length) : 0;

  var grade = gradeDrill(accuracy, avgTiming, avgVel);

  return {
    drillId: activeDrill,
    accuracy: accuracy,
    hits: hits,
    total: total,
    avgTimingError: avgTiming,
    avgVelocityError: avgVel,
    grade: grade,
    medal: grade === 'gold' ? '🏆' : grade === 'silver' ? '🥈' : grade === 'bronze' ? '🥉' : '🔄'
  };
}

function gradeDrill(accuracy, avgTiming, avgVel) {
  if (accuracy >= 90 && avgTiming < 80) return 'gold';
  if (accuracy >= 75 && avgTiming < 120) return 'silver';
  if (accuracy >= 50 && avgTiming < 200) return 'bronze';
  return 'retry';
}

function showDrillResult(result) {
  var el = document.getElementById('drillResult');
  if (!el) return;
  el.style.display = '';
  el.innerHTML = '<div class="drill-result-bar">' +
    '<span class="drill-medal">' + result.medal + '</span>' +
    '<span class="drill-score">' + result.grade.toUpperCase() + '</span>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div class="drill-metrics">' +
    'Accuracy: ' + result.accuracy + '% (' + result.hits + '/' + result.total + ')<br>' +
    'Timing: ±' + result.avgTimingError + 'ms<br>' +
    'Velocity: ±' + result.avgVelocityError +
    '</div>';
}

// ============================================================================
// On Demand Analysis — Record a passage, then send to Gemini for deep analysis
// ============================================================================
var recordMode = false;
var recordBuffer = { midi: [], startTime: 0 };

function toggleRecordMode() {
  var btn = document.getElementById('recordBtn');
  var status = document.getElementById('recordStatus');
  if (!recordMode) {
    // Start recording
    recordMode = true;
    recordBuffer = { midi: [], startTime: Date.now() };
    btn.textContent = 'Analyze';
    btn.style.borderColor = 'var(--red, #f66)';
    btn.style.color = 'var(--red, #f66)';
    status.style.display = '';
  } else {
    // Stop and analyze
    recordMode = false;
    btn.textContent = 'Record';
    btn.style.borderColor = '';
    btn.style.color = '';
    status.style.display = 'none';
    analyzeRecordedPassage();
  }
}

function recordMidiEvent(note, velocity, timestampMs, isNoteOn) {
  if (!recordMode) return;
  recordBuffer.midi.push({
    note: note, velocity: velocity, time: timestampMs - recordBuffer.startTime,
    type: isNoteOn ? 'on' : 'off'
  });
}

function analyzeRecordedPassage() {
  var buf = recordBuffer;
  if (buf.midi.length === 0) return;

  var durationMs = buf.midi[buf.midi.length - 1].time;
  var noteOns = buf.midi.filter(function(e) { return e.type === 'on' && e.velocity > 0; });
  if (noteOns.length < 2) return;

  // Compute IOI (inter-onset intervals)
  var iois = [];
  for (var i = 1; i < noteOns.length; i++) {
    iois.push(noteOns[i].time - noteOns[i-1].time);
  }
  var avgIoi = iois.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0) / iois.length;
  var ioiVariance = iois.reduce(function(a,b){return a+(b-avgIoi)*(b-avgIoi);},0) / iois.length;
  var ioiStdDev = Math.sqrt(ioiVariance);

  // Velocity stats
  var vels = noteOns.map(function(e){return e.velocity;});
  var avgVel = vels.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0) / vels.length;
  var velMin = Math.min.apply(null, vels);
  var velMax = Math.max.apply(null, vels);
  var velStdDev = Math.sqrt(vels.reduce(function(a,b){return a+(b-avgVel)*(b-avgVel);},0)/vels.length);

  // Implied BPM
  var impliedBpm = avgIoi > 0 ? Math.round(60000 / avgIoi) : 0;

  // Build analysis summary for Gemini
  var summary = 'ON DEMAND PASSAGE ANALYSIS — ' + noteOns.length + ' notes over ' +
    Math.round(durationMs/1000) + 's.\n' +
    'TEMPO: avg IOI=' + Math.round(avgIoi) + 'ms (implied ~' + impliedBpm + ' BPM), ' +
    'IOI stddev=' + Math.round(ioiStdDev) + 'ms (' + Math.round(ioiStdDev/avgIoi*100) + '% variation).\n' +
    'DYNAMICS: avg velocity=' + Math.round(avgVel) + ', range=' + velMin + '-' + velMax +
    ', stddev=' + Math.round(velStdDev) + '.\n' +
    'RAW NOTE DATA (time_ms, note, velocity):\n';

  // Include note data (truncate if too long)
  var maxNotes = Math.min(noteOns.length, 60);
  for (var i = 0; i < maxNotes; i++) {
    var n = noteOns[i];
    summary += n.time + ',' + n.note + ',' + n.velocity + '\n';
  }
  if (noteOns.length > maxNotes) summary += '... (' + (noteOns.length - maxNotes) + ' more notes)\n';
  summary += '\nAnalyze this passage. Focus on tempo uniformity and velocity habits. Be specific with numbers.';

  if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'text', content: summary }));
  }

  // Show in chat
  var chatArea = document.getElementById('chatArea');
  if (chatArea) {
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'system-msg';
    div.style.fontSize = '10px';
    div.style.color = 'var(--text3)';
    div.textContent = 'Sent ' + noteOns.length + ' notes for analysis (' + Math.round(durationMs/1000) + 's passage)';
    chatArea.appendChild(div);
    chatArea.scrollTop = chatArea.scrollHeight;
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// Panel resize handles (grid columns: leftCol | handle | center | handle | scoreCol)
// ============================================================================
(function() {
  var main = document.querySelector('.main');
  var leftCol = document.getElementById('leftCol');
  var scoreCol = document.getElementById('scoreCol');
  var leftHandle = document.getElementById('leftResizeHandle');
  var scoreHandle = document.getElementById('scoreResizeHandle');
  if (!main) return;

  var activeHandle = null;
  var handleSide = null; // 'left' or 'right'

  function startDrag(handle, side) {
    return function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      activeHandle = handle;
      handleSide = side;
      handle.classList.add('dragging');
      document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
      document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
    };
  }

  if (leftHandle) leftHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrag(leftHandle, 'left'));
  if (scoreHandle) scoreHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrag(scoreHandle, 'right'));

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    if (!activeHandle) return;
    // Account for CSS zoom on .main
    var zoom = parseFloat(main.style.zoom) || 1;
    var mainRect = main.getBoundingClientRect();
    // getBoundingClientRect returns zoomed coords, so divide by zoom to get CSS px
    var leftW = leftCol ? leftCol.getBoundingClientRect().width / zoom : 260;
    var scoreW = scoreCol ? scoreCol.getBoundingClientRect().width / zoom : 560;
    var mainLeft = mainRect.left / zoom;
    var mainRight = mainRect.right / zoom;
    var mainWidth = mainRect.width / zoom;
    var mouseX = e.clientX / zoom;

    if (handleSide === 'left') {
      leftW = mouseX - mainLeft;
      leftW = Math.max(140, Math.min(leftW, mainWidth * 0.4));
    } else {
      scoreW = mainRight - mouseX;
      scoreW = Math.max(200, Math.min(scoreW, mainWidth * 0.5));
    }

    main.style.gridTemplateColumns = Math.round(leftW) + 'px 6px 1fr 6px ' + Math.round(scoreW) + 'px';
  });

  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function() {
    if (!activeHandle) return;
    activeHandle.classList.remove('dragging');
    activeHandle = null;
    handleSide = null;
    document.body.style.cursor = '';
    document.body.style.userSelect = '';
  });
})();
